body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=two_steps_to_stop_biden&n=1)
---
September 14, 2021
## Two Steps to Stop Biden Mandate
I have to be brief as we are working around the clock to Stop Vaccine Mandates. But I want to break down the two steps on how we can stop Biden in Minnesota: **Step 1** \- Unify all Republicans in the Minnesota House and Senate on not passing the $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay Bill unless it has Rep Erik Mortensen's Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment attached to it. We must get the Party of freedom on board first. They should ALL sign the [**pledge**](https://www.action4liberty.com/stop_vaccine_mandates_pledge?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=two_steps_to_stop_biden&n=2). **Step 2** \- Create overwhelming political pressure on Walz and vulnerable Democrats to sign on and pass the legislation. We just did that in June to End Walz' Emergency Powers! [**This plan**](https://www.action4liberty.com/here_s_how_to_stop_joe_biden_vaccine?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=two_steps_to_stop_biden&n=3) would nullify Biden's executive orders in Minnesota! Please [**call or email your legislator**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=two_steps_to_stop_biden&n=4) immediately. It makes a difference! Can I count on you? **Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=two_steps_to_stop_biden&n=5 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=two_steps_to_stop_biden&n=5)
---

You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=two_steps_to_stop_biden&n=7).

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Distorting facts is what Democrats do best

Fellow American,

I knew it was only a matter of time before left-leaning news networks would start attempting to slander our campaign at every possible opportunity.

CNN has stepped into the role they've come to embrace over the years: The Democrat Party's mouthpiece. _Recently they published a story about me that couldn't be further from the truth._

The truth is that Democrats - including the top executives at CNN - know that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year's midterm elections.

**Fellow American, we know that distorting facts is what Democrats do best. Well, I want to show my Democrat opponent and his supporters in the media that I've got the support of the conservative grassroots behind my candidacy.**

My opponents need to know that when they try and attack our campaign, we'll work even harder to raise the funds necessary to win this race. I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight tonight in response to the recent attacks on me and my campaign. **[Can I count on you to help us ensure we hit our goal before midnight with a gift of $10, $25, $100- or even my favorite number, $34!](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=9f38429d9d51447dbd53d131b07fc3bc&_e=7PMJI_ZYxytmkCpeUlbscW583LrNhlYR75yUp37RJg9ytSDt4gCEV5mG8aHB4RDbO_h7Uv3ZVbECOZmihXLuSLvYiAlllehPcEVdn1vjFvgRtTWesSF1vui7MTHgVbf4SFdSlJ6-Sg3U6zVrm7lBPvdBHDrp6l0wwHRBmjHYMql-FvCWPvju0sxxjjYyIOOl6qd2DxnNB9lnCh_XlaeQYWW1hngRHVfjRL2tPD8Wg2zfQgmiirCKdad0G52ORJ5yMVP8PN45Tx7bu3CoNEuUcyog1_AMON93b9NBascw23CzfMMo61mn1cR5gV2bKcScpb8jy-4Cfr4DAWbcEctx8y9A9zOwsOPK7d8-nH2XWF0z39ozlJ1XK5yUznGMbRqCqMvQ5djepkzg3gn-iAgB9EORfkGzrkYxGdScLCyWqwz670XEduDcg_XszelW8X9zI0_D5RqlsYNevu7pyjpkhA%3D%3D)**

When I was considering my entrance into the U.S. Senate race in Georgia, I faced a choice: let a progressive Democrat easily win reelection against another Republican not ready to take him on - or get into the race, win, and risk having the media attempt to tarnish my good name along the way.

I chose the latter because the future of our country - and the future of Georgia - is too important to sit on the sidelines.

**[You would be doing me a great honor if you would support our campaign to take back the Senate with a contribution today.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=9f38429d9d51447dbd53d131b07fc3bc&_e=7PMJI_ZYxytmkCpeUlbscW583LrNhlYR75yUp37RJg9ytSDt4gCEV5mG8aHB4RDbO_h7Uv3ZVbECOZmihXLuSLvYiAlllehPcEVdn1vjFvgRtTWesSF1vui7MTHgVbf4SFdSlJ6-Sg3U6zVrm7lBPvdBHDrp6l0wwHRBmjHYMql-FvCWPvju0sxxjjYyIOOl6qd2DxnNB9lnCh_XlaeQYWW1hngRHVfjRL2tPD8Wg2zfQgmiirCKdad0G52ORJ5y_LhMa01IPO4RvV5sIYh2AKHxZKD8JUhkUj0GZDPcIIq-8Ql_EAxG2l_QpjDQ4smcwY9ByQXe69b0yGLVK1RB8XKeu42zu2L3D2-_pDP5zwiDryXw3mtl_UkK9f2g6z1wvegrSrvfIABBK-wWYWN1GTbTg4H0J6dVYePtUazEf4QlongxbryCIN2H4kQ1o81BR4N_b1YJU68ikG2UVWOcMg%3D%3D)**

We've got to be ready for anything.

Thank you,

The most powerful bureaucrat in America is trying to destroy American democracy and turn this country into an authoritarian regime. My radical socialist opponent has been raking in money from Left-wing megadonors, and the media has been fawning over him. If I'm going to stop Fauci, I have to stop the Democrats from taking my seat. clean_body: [URGENT UPDATE] | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, I have an urgent update to my email yesterday. Anthony Fauci just doubled down on his demand for nationwide vaccine mandates. He called for "many, many more mandates" and demanded that unvaccinated people be fired from their jobs and expelled from their universities. This is a crisis of massive proportions. The most powerful bureaucrat in America is trying to destroy American democracy and turn this country into an authoritarian regime. His reign of terror over the American public has gone on for far too long. My friend, I need you to step up and help me fight back against this brazen power grab. If you haven't already, will you please read my email below from yesterday? This is a turning point in American history. We must not go down the wrong path. \------Begin forwarded message \------ Patriot, Anthony Fauci just let a dark secret slip from his lips. He believes that Joe Biden's illegal vaccine mandate did not go far enough -- and now he's attempting to seize more power. In an interview with CNN, Fauci said Biden was "being somewhat moderate in his demand, if you want to call it that." "Myself, I would make it just vaccinate or not. But he was trying to be moderate in what his pronouncement was." When I heard that, I couldn't believe my ears. Fauci is demanding a total vaccination mandate for all Americans, handed down like a decree from a dictator, with no input from Congress. This is intolerable. I knew Fauci would try to bring Australia-style COVID dictatorship to America, but I must say I'm shocked that it happened this quickly. How would Fauci enforce this new mandate? Would he send the military to the homes of every American to check their vaccination status? How far is he willing to go in his quest to eradicate the Constitution and seize control over American society? I have been Fauci's Kryptonite since the day the pandemic began. I have exposed him for funneling money to the Wuhan lab. I have exposed his disregard for science when it comes to masks and natural immunity. That's why he sneers with disdain every time he sees my face – because he knows I am standing in the way of his goal of having absolute control over your life. I will do everything in my power to stop this scheme, just like I have stopped so many of his other schemes. But if the Left manages to defeat me in my Senate race, I will be powerless to stop him. My radical socialist opponent has been raking in money from Left-wing megadonors, and the media has been fawning over him. If I'm going to stop Fauci, I have to stop the Democrats from taking my seat. Fauci isn't going to stop in his quest to force vaccination on every single American citizen. But I am doing everything in my power to stop Fauci's newest scheme dead in its tracks. I am confident that I can defeat him once again. But I can only continue this fight if I keep my seat in the U.S. Senate. And the Democrats are coming after my seat -- hard. In Liberty, Rand Paul | | | P.S. - Anthony Fauci has called for a total vaccine mandate against all Americans. He publicly stated that Joe Biden's mandate did not go far enough. This scheme from Fauci is illegal, immoral, and unconstitutional. It must be stopped. I have been Anthony Fauci's Kryptonite since the day the pandemic began. That's why he despises me so much. But I can only stop this latest scheme if I hold on to my seat in the U.S. Senate. And Democrats are coming after me -- hard. | | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate | No longer want to receive these emails? . RANDPAC PO Box 72598 Newport, Kentucky 41072

Donald J. Trump September 14th, 2021
If the story of “Dumbass” General Mark Milley, the same failed leader who engineered the worst withdrawal from a country, Afghanistan, in U.S. history, leaving behind many dead and wounded soldiers, many American citizens, and $85 Billion worth of the newest and most sophisticated Military equipment in the world, and our Country’s reputation, is true, then I assume he would be tried for TREASON in that he would have been dealing with his Chinese counterpart behind the President’s back and telling China that he would be giving them notification “of an attack.” Can’t do that!

The good news is that the story is Fake News concocted by a weak and ineffective General together with two authors who I refused to give an interview to because they write fiction, not fact. Actions should be taken immediately against Milley, and better generals in our Military, of which we have many, should get involved so that another Afghanistan disaster never happens again. Remember, I was the one who took out 100% of the ISIS Caliphate. Milley said it couldn’t be done!

For the record, I never even thought of attacking China—and China knows that. The people that fabricated the story are sick and demented, and the people who print it are just as bad. In fact, I’m the only President in decades who didn’t get the U.S. into a war—a well known fact that is seldom reported.

clean_body: Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | ---|---|--- | | | | | ---|---|--- Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump September 14th, 2021 If the story of “Dumbass” General Mark Milley, the same failed leader who engineered the worst withdrawal from a country, Afghanistan, in U.S. history, leaving behind many dead and wounded soldiers, many American citizens, and $85 Billion worth of the newest and most sophisticated Military equipment in the world, and our Country’s reputation, is true, then I assume he would be tried for TREASON in that he would have been dealing with his Chinese counterpart behind the President’s back and telling China that he would be giving them notification “of an attack.” Can’t do that! The good news is that the story is Fake News concocted by a weak and ineffective General together with two authors who I refused to give an interview to because they write fiction, not fact. Actions should be taken immediately against Milley, and better generals in our Military, of which we have many, should get involved so that another Afghanistan disaster never happens again. Remember, I was the one who took out 100% of the ISIS Caliphate. Milley said it couldn’t be done! For the record, I never even thought of attacking China—and China knows that. The people that fabricated the story are sick and demented, and the people who print it are just as bad. In fact, I’m the only President in decades who didn’t get the U.S. into a war—a well known fact that is seldom reported. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump September 14th, 2021 If we didn’t have RINOs, the Republican Party would totally dominate politics. The good news is there are far less than there were four years ago—it is a dying breed—but nevertheless, and unfortunately, they still exist! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump September 14th, 2021 So now it’s determined in a major Wall Street Journal article that Facebook is secretly protecting its so-called “Elite,” making them exempt from rules. Facebook and Big Tech are so corrupt (“unlocked boxes,” etc.), this should help my lawsuit against Big Tech, and those people who hate America. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump September 14th, 2021 People don’t realize that, despite the Rigged voting in California (I call it the “Swarming Ballots”), I got 1.5 Million more votes in 2020 than I did in 2016. The place is so Rigged, however, that a guy who can’t even bring water into their State, which I got federal approval to do (that is the hard part), will probably win. Billions of gallons of water coming to California from the North is being sent out to sea, rather than being spread throughout the State. This is to protect the tiny delta smelt, which is doing far worse now without the water. In any event, it all doesn’t matter because the California Election is totally Rigged. Many people are already complaining that when they go to vote they are told, “I’m sorry, you already voted” (Just like 2020, among many other things). They then leave angry, but fortunately, even the Fake News Media has been reporting it. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump September 14th, 2021 Endorsement of Anna Paulina Luna Anna Paulina Luna is a great fighter who is running for Congress in Florida. She is an Air Force veteran who puts America First, unlike her RINO opponents. Anna is committed to strong borders, serving our Veterans, and ensuring Florida’s beautiful coastlines are protected. This is an important race because it is “key” to taking back the House. Anna is a warrior, she is a winner, and it’s time for all America First Republicans to unite behind her strong campaign. Anna has my complete and total endorsement. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump September 13th, 2021 The inept Afghan government, led by corrupt President Ghani, released 5,000 prisoners—not the Trump Administration. Secretary of State Blinken is doing everything in his power to make the most inept withdrawal in history look, at least, acceptable. It never will. Now it is understood, on top of everything else, that billions of dollars will be paid to Afghanistan to help them along the way. The so-called leaders of our Country have gone crazy! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump September 13th, 2021 “The Big Lie” is the Presidential Election of 2020. When the Fake News Media uses that term, always remember that this was the Election that is destroying our Country, both inside and out! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump September 13th, 2021 Endorsement of Mark Finchem It is my great honor to endorse a true warrior, Representative Mark Finchem, of the Great State of Arizona, for the position of Secretary of State. He is a patriot who has fought for our Country right from his earliest moments in government. Mark was willing to say what few others had the courage to say. In addition to his incredibly powerful stance on the massive Voter Fraud that took place in the 2020 Presidential Election Scam, he is strong on Crime, Borders, our currently under siege Second Amendment, and loves our Military and our Vets. Mark will also be fighting hard for further Tax and Regulation Cuts. Mark Finchem has my Complete and Total Endorsement. He will never let the people of Arizona down! | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- We are up against the FAKE NEWS media, their Democrat Partners, and Big Tech who all want to see us FAIL. name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: Stand With Our Law Enforcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, Democrats want to make us less safe. We cannot let that happen.
Peter,Southeast Wisconsin is a great place to live due in large part to our vibrant and safe communities.**Local law enforcement officers deserve the credit for our peaceful way of life. They keep us safe and serve as role models.**[**But the radical left wants to change this. They want to defund our police departments and make us less safe while hypocritically hiring their own private security to protect themselves.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkkude-idtjvlhlh-r/)**We need to fund our police departments to ensure southeast Wisconsin remains a safe and prosperous place for everyone.**[**I am proud to stand with our local law enforcement officers. Will you contribute to our campaign so we can continue to "back the badge" together?**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkkude-idtjvlhlh-y/)Thank you!Bryan
--
**Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkkude-idtjvlhlh-j/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkkude-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkkude-idtjvlhlh-i/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fkkude-idtjvlhlh-d/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-fkkude-l-b) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

Peter,

I told you Biden didn't care about you.

He doesn't care about you or your freedoms. **He just mandated the Covid vaccine for 80 MILLION Americans.** The last time I checked, we live in a FREE Country.

_The Left is working overtime to CONTROL you, Peter._ **First,** they wanted to mandate MASKS, and **now** they're mandating VACCINES - can you believe it?

I think the vaccine is brilliant and I'm very pleased with how quickly we turned it around, _despite the Trump haters who said we'd never get it done._ **However, mandating vaccines is simply UN-AMERICAN.**

As if it wasn't obvious, I totally OPPOSE this liberal overreach that requires Americans to be vaccinated. I need my BEST supporters to stand with me right now.

name: Greater Georgia
subject: LOEFFLER OP-ED: JOE BIDEN’S BETRAYAL OF AMERICAN VALUES MUST BE OUR CALL TO ACTION
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, SEPT. 15, 2021
LOEFFLER OP-ED: JOE BIDEN'S BETRAYAL OF AMERICAN VALUES MUST BE OUR CALL TO ACTION
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler penned an [op-ed featured on ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OBJa3kyufaEpPU3ybwGFfepCtUbVrpQ4zTYfD3WoRxAC7leaLK9RKL7yXzW0-XPDB10-bLjiR9__ZXNcOZncN-dBZAl-PJxCym8fS3xQzJIw15VrX-d8CaH90UhjX8hSIdY0iFcp70xmsFEHCtpplCvpq4Z3TWBCE_7HSF0ZizDjAG-CW2cbkk8xoUY3QJZkLOpMBxNc9VTGx0QmaG_okKFvm5krYTchzuqm0oCMkBZvbaWEJoV8fU5ygpCD5fNZW5DYhdD_WUpgLqTIAR9p2ubBBOonXonKxLvzm16UsME=&c=WkwptnyURjk2c5QqOQMl0v5XwyRJCOjOBxuBbZ62uob-njw1QoF5Qw==&ch=oU8vQogvfTTCOmYSGNLzVY2owt7RQS9SVqgqe63KRXwHy9C-Yhzkeg==)[Townhall.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OBJa3kyufaEpPU3ybwGFfepCtUbVrpQ4zTYfD3WoRxAC7leaLK9RKL7yXzW0-XPDB10-bLjiR9__ZXNcOZncN-dBZAl-PJxCym8fS3xQzJIw15VrX-d8CaH90UhjX8hSIdY0iFcp70xmsFEHCtpplCvpq4Z3TWBCE_7HSF0ZizDjAG-CW2cbkk8xoUY3QJZkLOpMBxNc9VTGx0QmaG_okKFvm5krYTchzuqm0oCMkBZvbaWEJoV8fU5ygpCD5fNZW5DYhdD_WUpgLqTIAR9p2ubBBOonXonKxLvzm16UsME=&c=WkwptnyURjk2c5QqOQMl0v5XwyRJCOjOBxuBbZ62uob-njw1QoF5Qw==&ch=oU8vQogvfTTCOmYSGNLzVY2owt7RQS9SVqgqe63KRXwHy9C-Yhzkeg==) yesterday discussing how Joe Biden's betrayal of American values, lack of accountability, and sheer incompetence must be our call to action - and how Greater Georgia is fighting back. Read the full text of Kelly's op-ed below:
[Joe Biden's Betrayal of American Values Must be Our Call to Action](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OBJa3kyufaEpPU3ybwGFfepCtUbVrpQ4zTYfD3WoRxAC7leaLK9RKL7yXzW0-XPDB10-bLjiR9__ZXNcOZncN-dBZAl-PJxCym8fS3xQzJIw15VrX-d8CaH90UhjX8hSIdY0iFcp70xmsFEHCtpplCvpq4Z3TWBCE_7HSF0ZizDjAG-CW2cbkk8xoUY3QJZkLOpMBxNc9VTGx0QmaG_okKFvm5krYTchzuqm0oCMkBZvbaWEJoV8fU5ygpCD5fNZW5DYhdD_WUpgLqTIAR9p2ubBBOonXonKxLvzm16UsME=&c=WkwptnyURjk2c5QqOQMl0v5XwyRJCOjOBxuBbZ62uob-njw1QoF5Qw==&ch=oU8vQogvfTTCOmYSGNLzVY2owt7RQS9SVqgqe63KRXwHy9C-Yhzkeg==)
President Reagan once said that "The world must see an America that is morally strong with a creed and a vision. This is what has led us to dare and achieve. For us, values count."
If America's exceptionalism under President Biden is measured by this standard, Joe Biden is failing our country. Biden promised that America would "build back better," but his disastrous foreign policy, out-of-control spending, and unconstitutional government overreach point to decline.
With his haphazard exit from Afghanistan, Joe Biden stranded American citizens and Afghan allies and has made the Taliban the world's largest weapons dealer. Now, Biden entrusts the protection of these innocent lives to the same Taliban terrorists who harbored Al-Qaeda, reducing two decades of American sacrifice to an epic disaster that demands investigation and accountability.
At home, Biden promised unity and a competence that experience is meant to bring, but he divides our country and grossly mishandles his duties - while shamelessly blaming anyone but himself. Imagine being the President of the United States and acting powerless and beholden - but now we don't have to imagine it. Yet, with control of the House and Senate, Biden and the Democrats have no one to blame but themselves.
Open-borders Biden has allowed thousands of COVID-positive illegal immigrants, many victims of trafficking, to flood our frontier while placing exclusive blame on conservatives for the recent coronavirus surge. He's managed to politicize our health response to the pandemic in a way only previously imagined in novels.
Biden has blamed congressional Republicans for failing to support his socialist government takeover of the economy, which forces trillions of dollars in wasteful spending for "infrastructure" down the throats of working-class Americans, saddling generations with debt and lost opportunity.
He even blamed his failure to advance the federal takeover of elections on Republicans fighting to restore faith in elections, launching a failed misinformation campaign with Stacey Abrams that cost Georgians a $100-million opportunity.
While Biden promised unity, we now live in the most divisive political environments in our lifetime. Thanks to his relentless pursuit to placate the woke mob and keep up with the latest demands of a far-left that despises America. Biden said he would be the most progressive president in American history - likely a true statement, but to what end? His extreme agenda has little to do with the country that he swore to serve and protect and everything to do with politics and retribution.
Accountability, honesty and integrity are foreign phrases for Biden. This behavior comes as no surprise from a career politician who has spent five decades in Washington, using his power and influence to enrich himself and his family from his comfortable perch. As president, Biden dismisses serious inquiries into his policies - turns his back, walks away, and ignores them altogether. Meanwhile, the media runs interference for Biden and labels serious questions about the president's fitness to serve as "conspiracies."
Biden's actions have proven that he is more beholden to special interests, blue-state billionaires, and coastal elites rather than hard working Americans in need. Instead of providing access and opportunity to success for all, Biden shamelessly promotes cradle-to-grave government dependency and villainizes those who work hard and make an honest living.
We cannot stand by as Joe Biden and Washington radicals dismantle the American Dream. Now is the time to get vocal, get active, and get involved - which is exactly what we are doing at Greater Georgia, a conservative voter registration and mobilization organization in the biggest battleground state in the country. We are pushing back on the liberals' far-left agenda and advocating for the pro-freedom, pro-America values that uplift all communities. These are the values that unite our country and make us strong, and these are the values we must always fight to defend because, as President Reagan said, "values count."
To join the fight for American values, visit [www.greatergeorgia.com/volunteer](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OBJa3kyufaEpPU3ybwGFfepCtUbVrpQ4zTYfD3WoRxAC7leaLK9RKHmR-mjs7dN6CqTE2DWd1g7qKxlJge6D7-AaVZojj4NGv2aNS8dJDKcvYO8_CMB7zj-xsu5Z5-GKPbaapP3gachoSSb7HY1N9wndXBTemPqEkUutUlWEoxI=&c=WkwptnyURjk2c5QqOQMl0v5XwyRJCOjOBxuBbZ62uob-njw1QoF5Qw==&ch=oU8vQogvfTTCOmYSGNLzVY2owt7RQS9SVqgqe63KRXwHy9C-Yhzkeg==) today.

clean_body: | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, SEPT. 15, 2021 LOEFFLER OP-ED: JOE BIDEN'S BETRAYAL OF AMERICAN VALUES MUST BE OUR CALL TO ACTION ATLANTA - In case you missed it, Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler penned an == yesterday discussing how Joe Biden's betrayal of American values, lack of accountability, and sheer incompetence must be our call to action - and how Greater Georgia is fighting back. Read the full text of Kelly's op-ed below: == President Reagan once said that "The world must see an America that is morally strong with a creed and a vision. This is what has led us to dare and achieve. For us, values count." If America's exceptionalism under President Biden is measured by this standard, Joe Biden is failing our country. Biden promised that America would "build back better," but his disastrous foreign policy, out-of-control spending, and unconstitutional government overreach point to decline. With his haphazard exit from Afghanistan, Joe Biden stranded American citizens and Afghan allies and has made the Taliban the world's largest weapons dealer. Now, Biden entrusts the protection of these innocent lives to the same Taliban terrorists who harbored Al-Qaeda, reducing two decades of American sacrifice to an epic disaster that demands investigation and accountability. At home, Biden promised unity and a competence that experience is meant to bring, but he divides our country and grossly mishandles his duties - while shamelessly blaming anyone but himself. Imagine being the President of the United States and acting powerless and beholden - but now we don't have to imagine it. Yet, with control of the House and Senate, Biden and the Democrats have no one to blame but themselves. Open-borders Biden has allowed thousands of COVID-positive illegal immigrants, many victims of trafficking, to flood our frontier while placing exclusive blame on conservatives for the recent coronavirus surge. He's managed to politicize our health response to the pandemic in a way only previously imagined in novels. Biden has blamed congressional Republicans for failing to support his socialist government takeover of the economy, which forces trillions of dollars in wasteful spending for "infrastructure" down the throats of working-class Americans, saddling generations with debt and lost opportunity. He even blamed his failure to advance the federal takeover of elections on Republicans fighting to restore faith in elections, launching a failed misinformation campaign with Stacey Abrams that cost Georgians a $100-million opportunity. While Biden promised unity, we now live in the most divisive political environments in our lifetime. Thanks to his relentless pursuit to placate the woke mob and keep up with the latest demands of a far-left that despises America. Biden said he would be the most progressive president in American history - likely a true statement, but to what end? His extreme agenda has little to do with the country that he swore to serve and protect and everything to do with politics and retribution. Accountability, honesty and integrity are foreign phrases for Biden. This behavior comes as no surprise from a career politician who has spent five decades in Washington, using his power and influence to enrich himself and his family from his comfortable perch. As president, Biden dismisses serious inquiries into his policies - turns his back, walks away, and ignores them altogether. Meanwhile, the media runs interference for Biden and labels serious questions about the president's fitness to serve as "conspiracies." Biden's actions have proven that he is more beholden to special interests, blue-state billionaires, and coastal elites rather than hard working Americans in need. Instead of providing access and opportunity to success for all, Biden shamelessly promotes cradle-to-grave government dependency and villainizes those who work hard and make an honest living. We cannot stand by as Joe Biden and Washington radicals dismantle the American Dream. Now is the time to get vocal, get active, and get involved - which is exactly what we are doing at Greater Georgia, a conservative voter registration and mobilization organization in the biggest battleground state in the country. We are pushing back on the liberals' far-left agenda and advocating for the pro-freedom, pro-America values that uplift all communities. These are the values that unite our country and make us strong, and these are the values we must always fight to defend because, as President Reagan said, "values count." To join the fight for American values, visit == today. | ### Media Contact: mailto:press@greatergeorgia.com | | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. name: Mike Gibbons
subject: I fixed the text on AOC's dress
body:
AOC is a national embarrassment
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IIpevC79N1v9U2jhEJv0VEgbwtT2Ngi-5GZFxMt9TeWfhidcNAVnReFHt4lxhTshmDIw3llc618X0teyGMow_9cSV6faVchon1C3f7tUu7c92DOvW0EMVmngvHQypq1-1s4Zm6jOBpFy_91YOrmmdaMgsbrktBnKmGuhOoukh5YByQ1b9bZ3ug==&c=ngy14Mn483CaTLGwWO4yxGBpTkekMmsTeVnZr0D_0zYXPXF4EG6-bQ==&ch=ndEynn8PoMoZ3zieBV2Qy8zpq51fGe1ECVbnsFgrK8HAB9sXFG5O3w==)
---
| Peter,
AOC is a national embarrassment.
She attended the Met Gala by purchasing a ticket for $30,000 to schmooze with New York's elite, celebrities, and some of the county's most wealthy individuals.
And she has the audacity to wear a dress with the text, "Tax the Rich" on the back.
Unbelievable.
I was inspired to fix the text on her dress to show the world who she really is... a hypocrite.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IIpevC79N1v9U2jhEJv0VEgbwtT2Ngi-5GZFxMt9TeWfhidcNAVnReFHt4lxhTshmDIw3llc618X0teyGMow_9cSV6faVchon1C3f7tUu7c92DOvW0EMVmngvHQypq1-1s4Zm6jOBpFy_91YOrmmdaMgsbrktBnKmGuhOoukh5YByQ1b9bZ3ug==&c=ngy14Mn483CaTLGwWO4yxGBpTkekMmsTeVnZr0D_0zYXPXF4EG6-bQ==&ch=ndEynn8PoMoZ3zieBV2Qy8zpq51fGe1ECVbnsFgrK8HAB9sXFG5O3w==)
---
| Socialist politicians like AOC and Bernie Sanders need to be defeated.
So few "leaders" are willing to stand up to them in Washington and it's why we end up with $3.5 trillion budgets, Green Deal proposals, and a $30 trillion national debt.
Once I am elected to the U.S. Senate I will do battle with socialists like AOC and Bernie Sanders. Let's expose these socialists as the hypocrites and liars they are.

subject: Did you hear what George Bush said?

body:
"We have seen growing evidence that the dangers to our country can come not only across borders, but from violence that gathers within [...] It is our continuing duty to confront them." [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35808228/306211556/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4OWJmOWE3LTJlMTYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F_Bwo0BLzqPIPy5ekVzhh_Dtq5kXPi2B-HBWl9-pa8g=&emci=63d04312-a115-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=189bf9a7-2e16-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=16335001) Did you hear former President George Bush's remarks on September 11, team?

While speaking in Shanksville, Bush drew a connection to the January 6 insurrection at our nation's Capitol: "We have seen growing evidence that the dangers to our country can come not only across borders, but from violence that gathers within [...] **It is our continuing duty to confront them.** " Every member of Congress takes the same oath of office, promising to defend the Constitution against "all enemies, foreign and domestic." But the 147 members of the Treason Caucus have time and again refused to take a stand against the attacks on our democracy coming from members of their own party.

Donald Trump, his supporters, and his allies in Congress remain some of the biggest threats to American democracy to this day. As George Bush said, it's our duty to confront them. We don’t agree with George Bush on much but this is why we're working to defeat these dangerous and radical Republicans and replace them with leaders who will defend our democracy, but we need your help.

name: James Hartnett
subject: It may not seem like much
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,
We’re halfway through September, which means we only have a few weeks until our campaign will release our first full FEC report. That means our competitors will be able to see exactly how much money we’ve raised and how we’ve spent it. In other words, it shows how strong our grassroots campaign is.
We need to prove that we mean business and we intend to flip VA-01 BLUE! But the only way to have a strong report is if supporters like you help us finish these last two weeks off strong. Can I count on you to make a $10 donation to Stewart’s campaign today to ensure September is our best month yet? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2109-q3-sn-eoq?refcode=210915-email&amount=10]
$10 may not seem like a lot. But if 100 folks give $10 today, we’ve turned an individual action into a grassroots movement. That’s what real change looks like and it’s what our campaign is all about.
So can you chip in $10 today and become a part of our movement to restore dignity and integrity to Virginia’s First District? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2109-q3-sn-eoq?refcode=210915-email&amount=10]
All the best,
James Hartnett - Finance Director
Stewart Navarre is a Democrat running for Virginia's 1st Congressional District. He's ready to serve his fellow Virginians with integrity, ethics, and hard work. Support Stewart with a donation today.

name: Sen. Rob Ortt
subject: A Yom Kippur Message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
| | | |
---
---
|
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,
On behalf of the entire Senate Republican Conference, I wanted to say to all those celebrating Yom Kippur: G'mar chatima tova, or "May you be sealed in the Book of Life."
Yom Kippur is one of the most important dates in the Jewish religious calendar, and takes place on the 10th day of the Jewish month of Tishrei. It begins this evening at sunset and ends tomorrow evening at nightfall.
During this 25-hour period, families will fast and spend time in synagogues reflecting on the past year and asking for God's forgiveness of sins.
Whether you celebrate or not, I hope you have a blessed day.
---
|
---
---
---
---
|
---
| Rob Ortt Senate Republican Leader

---
| |
---
| PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR STATE SENATE

name: Eden & Megan
subject: pure ambition
body:
Bigger goals to tackle, mountains to climb, and barriers to break.

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35809578/306216079/1300596418?refcode=210915_FR_midmonth1duo-a_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyMzY0YWIwLTMxMTYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZDNt4NY2BR-Idz0wqSyM_iNkz9XspVNYs7X97iORyqE=)
---
Peter,

We just announced this week that we’ve officially merged our two sister PACs: Barrier To Entry and Pay Your Interns, with BTE being the lead.

Our hope is that by implementing this collaboration, we will strengthen our mission and unify our message as we seek to dismantle ALL socioeconomic barriers that keep working-class folks behind, particularly in the professional world and political sector.

**But with this major partnership comes some new challenges ahead. We have even bigger goals to tackle, mountains to climb, and barriers to break.**

On top of that, this month marks the end of the third financial quarter. So we’re not going to lie, there is a lot riding on our upcoming fundraising benchmarks.

**Tonight is our mid-month deadline, and we need to raise $7,400 by midnight.** It’s our most ambitious mid-month goal yet, but that’s exactly what is driving this movement -- **_ambition._** Ambition to make a difference by creating a government and society that works for ALL.

[**So will you help us crush this mid-month goal by donating right now so that we can keep opening doors for other ambitious progressives across the country by breaking socioeconomic barriers? clean_body: Bigger goals to tackle, mountains to climb, and barriers to break. | | | = Peter, We just announced this week that we’ve officially merged our two sister PACs: Barrier To Entry and Pay Your Interns, with BTE being the lead. Our hope is that by implementing this collaboration, we will strengthen our mission and unify our message as we seek to dismantle ALL socioeconomic barriers that keep working-class folks behind, particularly in the professional world and political sector. But with this major partnership comes some new challenges ahead. We have even bigger goals to tackle, mountains to climb, and barriers to break. On top of that, this month marks the end of the third financial quarter. So we’re not going to lie, there is a lot riding on our upcoming fundraising benchmarks. Tonight is our mid-month deadline, and we need to raise $7,400 by midnight. It’s our most ambitious mid-month goal yet, but that’s exactly what is driving this movement -- ambition. Ambition to make a difference by creating a government and society that works for ALL. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ____= ____= ____= ____= ____= Let's do this! Eden & Megan ********** ********** ****************EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier to Entry PAC**************** ****************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** ---|---|---|--- BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space. name: Meredith
subject: Mitch McConnell wants to flip NH red
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH

The stakes of this election are high, team. **Mitch McConnell only has to flip one seat to take back the Senate, and he and the rest of the Republican Party are laser-focused on New Hampshire.** If McConnell succeeds, he will block critical legislation like voting rights protections, affordable health care, and much-need investments in infrastructure. He also said that he would veto President Biden’s Supreme Court nominees. Let me say that again: **If there’s an opening on the Supreme Court, Mitch McConnell has promised to stop President Biden from filling it.** The fate of Roe v. Wade is hanging by a thread, and the last thing New Hampshire needs is another anti-choice Republican to further strip women of their reproductive rights. **[That's why I need you to please help me protect the future of our Supreme Court and reproductive rights in New Hampshire and across the country by donating $5 before our mid-month deadline tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35809577/306216077/-149339129?refcode=e20210915_ms-mm&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmE3NWQ5Ny0zMTE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XQ6jKLMWkdpK4xAz12HZ-7BcW0hi8CpAjkYQzhL0S3Q=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35809579/306216078/-149339129?refcode=e20210915_ms-mm&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmE3NWQ5Ny0zMTE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XQ6jKLMWkdpK4xAz12HZ-7BcW0hi8CpAjkYQzhL0S3Q=)

My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse.

As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it.

**Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.**

**[I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Common Good VA so we can stop the alt-right and Marjorie Taylor Greene:](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDIC4_ZqVgQ6ulKGh1tlQ8qivyeXKwWJEiymujBOWaEyM8tnf6bPHyrHJT2PymqKNDmCTMOYnFv1nvMLZv2m8g41Ah-7quiVx7FLh9dDfoclCRqswSVGtwSuoIerIDJDr0qcCiss9C0vENPO8s3FgsLhS_r1_TOCw_wWnHrL8hhYmNXJfTUNDN2pm2VNrb0yN7sZ-vbyc-jzRw0YWyk-26paFwPkCOn3fLnUl-K685sIqkn3WwvYauxn4Q8Ho2SBLjrLdpYFzEqOZF3nzwKueT-ggUTSlL4OJ4kKF6oRzZ8JTEwnSRd5DQ_nlbJSPOp_Zeqj-0SekgvLI7L95Wk0jGKxWnQRQZvdosZOnV1xyzHyaX4M35MQiN4f7HpYma1ph4wCMD0LUbIzJywVkZNbHCfc/3fc/IZ_2iQJyTAWVazTvxiPsYQ/h1/gJh7dLkJjcJbRByz-wbGZ5t4jNJ_KCVGER09SX0CKPQ)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDEv-DKGJ38W_JCLuCnC8dEV4CItKsKG_4ifruH8257RwDFWAF3z0fEf1yTSpArONMeRN1iZMGL-yNRdD6Dh8xx1CiE6wYa8EmGGWXfiobFP3v9oRJnB7AH0UTBB_poEKuL-vsi23jqB0P-1PgRtQPMllyXnzzlNoSUxhYMANp3XreTuJTbsc6EeBZyQdemrvUzpPUxdMIvByjAqUCmPNyWeHfsmnetpZC44jobJZf72eqvHmE9ymOZ0oTBGXdfUeRzGkFknBZJrgx4NKav5FFGNFLS1Y2VQ6EaU_PmBO2rG5dXYZdOHReh2sn0C-Y75duvV87Y45qo8WgTwOVqAZFsIk3KbhqKPpEu5BiYGgSZehoZUJ1JJjeip-Sbc-tf1PaVuukSbAetiyuZgFDdS2L_UY8K3zEJmvwerH_dWV2Ef8/3fc/IZ_2iQJyTAWVazTvxiPsYQ/h2/wG3v5KMh0gmhAKmTDili6AHNTWF1Yb5-addvk-SkjxY)

name: Team Franchot
subject: Delegate Pam Queen is on Team Franchot!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter,
We’re excited to share with you our latest endorsement video featuring the wonderful Delegate Pam Queen! As Delegate for House District 14 in Montgomery County, Pam has been a champion for working families and small businesses, and we’re incredibly honored to be standing with her in the fight to secure a better future for Maryland’s communities in 2022.
You can learn more about why she’s endorsing Peter Franchot by checking out our newly released video below:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pamqueenendorsement?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pamqueenendorsement?amount=20.22]Peter Franchot has already earned the endorsements of over 100 current and former elected officials -- far more than any other candidate in this race. He has a bold vision for the future of our state that includes creating 100,000 new family-supporting jobs in industries of the future, tackling the student debt crisis, and leveling the playing field for Black Marylanders.
His movement to change the way that government does business is building incredible momentum -- but we’re still going to need the help of our grassroots supporters if we’re going to win this highly competitive election. Fresh off the heels of this latest endorsement alert, will you chip in to help us keep the edge over the competition?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pamqueenendorsement?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pamqueenendorsement?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pamqueenendorsement?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pamqueenendorsement?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pamqueenendorsement]Anything you can contribute is greatly appreciated. Your contribution will help us print more field literature and yard signs, run more digital ads, place more phone calls, knock on more doors, and ultimately win the votes that we need to secure a better future for Maryland’s communities in 2022.
Thank you,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pamqueenendorsement?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b75de119-4412-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/e022d69b-3516-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDIyZDY5Yi0zNTE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1enlGH9VbsMjcpgI5f-Mp_4Sqzwj-suD9gs3RasBoDo=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Peter, This is bad. Really bad.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Coming to you with a humble request...

Peter, It's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58332486:6djrjy2NV:m:1:3253819041:25A9CC543521F79DA323A74996646D34:r)
This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: **_but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good._**

[**300% MATCH NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58332486:6djrjy2NV:m:1:3253819041:25A9CC543521F79DA323A74996646D34:r)

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

[**Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58332486:6djrjy2NV:m:1:3253819041:25A9CC543521F79DA323A74996646D34:r)

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

[**BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we 'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58332486:6djrjy2NV:m:1:3253819041:25A9CC543521F79DA323A74996646D34:r)

[**300% MATCH NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58332486:6djrjy2NV:m:1:3253819041:25A9CC543521F79DA323A74996646D34:r)

We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking.

She's dialing up dark money donors.

She's depositing max-out checks._

_And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._**

Pelosi's working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can't let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There's no way we make our mark without you, Peter.

[**I can 't extend this deadline again - even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58332486:6djrjy2NV:m:1:3253819041:25A9CC543521F79DA323A74996646D34:r)

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58332486:6djrjy2NV:m:1:3253819041:25A9CC543521F79DA323A74996646D34:r)
Dan Crenshaw

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: I'm entrusting you with this...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Congress
body:
Schiff’s hatred is based on the fact that Kash is a patriot who isn’t willing to sell out his country to the deep state.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3g8c2a58jl7c63kgh5ouilffnnkkgvrhsucgof0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfedpkm5jr3c35e5q66ppkm5qe8sjlmcoe4ptjekq78spimmrm3clh6oo79dtkc3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eaomccbkmdi6fdj4cooj1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cpi6ep30s1gm6oh5u)
This is Donald Trump Jr. -- I REALLY hope you get this in time, Friend...

I just got word that my father's top allies in Congress are getting PUMMELED by back-to-back waves of vicious attack ads.

First, House and Senate Democrats coordinated a devastating ad blitz in swing states.

Then, a major Liberal group announced a million-dollar ad-buy to attack America first Conservatives.

Now, our strategy for winning back a pro-Trump Majority will be COMPLETELY DERAILED unless we respond immediately.

I knew something had to be done -- and fast! Luckily, my friend Elise Stefanik agreed to an emergency 300% donor match to save our hides.

As you're reading this email: millions of Americans are being sold LIE AFTER LIE about our movement. If we let this Liberal propaganda take hold, we're finished!

This 300% donor match is exactly what we need to defend our America First allies and set the record straight. **[I'm entrusting you with a lot](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zin0cktomib62ig2bk55fua4js5jhsd6vlt1nago_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cti61o31cdh2bs). [Are you in](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z58u08ib7pap6rs74c7e72vmp3ravnv18gtq88fg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cti61o31cdh2bs)?** [**300% Match: $10 -> $40 Impact**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z05a72p9fla10tdu28kk45dols5uug60lvp37pk0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cti61o31cdh2bs) [**300% Match: $25 -> $100 Impact**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z1783djujk548d85ln3rdnm8mai9msskapl4ses8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cti61o31cdh2bs) [**300% Match: $50 -> $200 Impact**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9afr9ootr3eim1p7jkegvpskvqeuv7mu80ogf28_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cti61o31cdh2bs) [**300% Match: $100 -> $400 Impact**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4vgkcleokujhlmvcsch3pon0eebiami8a0g56eg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cti61o31cdh2bs) _This is important: every dollar you pledge before 9:00 AM tomorrow will have **THREE TIMES **the impact. _
I've never been one to sugarcoat things (I think I get that from my dad) -- so let me level with you: Democrats are unleashing swarms of attack ads to spread vicious lies and sink Conservatives in tight races. If they tip the scales by even a handful of votes, we will lose and America will never be the same. **[The time for sitting on the sidelines is over. I need you with us on this](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zkidvpt3pbecra78ijgfigf2j8iju2p8p3ilhtqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cti61o31cdh2bs)**. **[Right now](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zops9gj3lnfoln7v3anaeog42ts987n9bfue8hsg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cti61o31cdh2bs)**.

name: Joan Greene
subject: Pilot program
body:
I believe the city council member’s focus should be on how to improve your neighborhood and quality of life if possible. Sometimes it’s zoning, improving parks or it may be infrastructure. It is also about keeping you informed about the City of Phoenix services that are available.

| | **
**Hi,

I believe the city council member’s focus should be on how to improve your neighborhood and quality of life if possible.

Sometimes it’s zoning, improving parks or it may be infrastructure. It is also about keeping you informed about the City of Phoenix services that are available.

City of Phoenix has a pilot program where they will come to your home and pick up paint, batteries, computers and other household hazardous waste items. The list of items they will and will not pick up is on their website.

Click on the picture to take you to the City of Phoenix website.

"Serving as your Attorney General has been the honor of my life. I've proudly worked on your behalf to expand and secure the rights of our fellow Virginians, and to show Virginians a new vision for what their Attorney General can do for them. The progress we’ve made has been historic, but the work isn’t done." = | | = Mark has been the most progressive Attorney General in the history of Virginia and we need your help to keep him in office working for us. name: Rep. Andy Biggs
subject: Keep YOUR health decisions private
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIGGS FOR CONGRESS**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58330888:67ZzQy2NJ:m:1:3103520637:CCDC373DA85B2A4E5EF4E27944EC9C2B:r "Protest") Peter, Employers should not be meddling in their employees' personal, private health care decisions by mandating the COVID-19 vaccine. This is the basic concept of American liberty - your healthcare decisions are your own, **_and you do not owe me, your employer, or anyone else an explanation._** So often, the companies that now feel empowered to mandate the healthcare decisions of their employees are the same companies that were first in line for a government handout when COVID hit. I have introduced a bill that, if passed, will prohibit businesses that received federal COVID-19 relief funds from mandating vaccination of their employees. **This bill has legislative co-sponsors,_but I need to know if the American people are behind it._** If you believe that your job should NEVER dictate your health decisions, **[I need you to support my efforts.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58330888:67ZzQy2NJ:m:1:3103520637:CCDC373DA85B2A4E5EF4E27944EC9C2B:r "I need you to support my efforts.")** If you believe that Americans should never allow our government to mandate a vaccine, **[I need you to support my efforts.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58330888:67ZzQy2NJ:m:1:3103520637:CCDC373DA85B2A4E5EF4E27944EC9C2B:r "I need you to support my efforts.")** **If you believe in freedom as a birthright for American citizens,[I need you to support my efforts.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58330888:67ZzQy2NJ:m:1:3103520637:CCDC373DA85B2A4E5EF4E27944EC9C2B:r "I need you to support my efforts.")** The leftists pushing the vaccine mandates are the same people who are concerned with personal [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58330888:67ZzQy2NJ:m:1:3103520637:CCDC373DA85B2A4E5EF4E27944EC9C2B:r "Safety Measures")healthcare when it involves murdering an unborn baby, but have no issues with a mandate to inject chemicals into your body. I often look at the latest liberal "public safety" idea and wonder how we ever got this far. Our leaders now feel it is entirely normal for them to decide when you can go to work or church, even when our children can go to school, or to demand that you must take a vaccine against your will. This new normal must end, **_and I am fighting night and day to prevent government and private business from infringing upon your liberty._** **[Will you join me in the fight to protect YOUR right to keep your health decisions private?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58330888:67ZzQy2NJ:m:1:3103520637:CCDC373DA85B2A4E5EF4E27944EC9C2B:r "Will you join me in the fight to protect YOUR right to keep your health decisions private?")** Protecting Our Liberty, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58330888:67ZzQy2NJ:m:1:3103520637:CCDC373DA85B2A4E5EF4E27944EC9C2B:r "Andy Biggs") Rep. Andy Biggs (AZ-5)
Chairman, House Freedom Caucus

clean_body: "Protest" Peter, Employers should not be meddling in their employees' personal, private health care decisions by mandating the COVID-19 vaccine. This is the basic concept of American liberty - your healthcare decisions are your own, and you do not owe me, your employer, or anyone else an explanation. So often, the companies that now feel empowered to mandate the healthcare decisions of their employees are the same companies that were first in line for a government handout when COVID hit. I have introduced a bill that, if passed, will prohibit businesses that received federal COVID-19 relief funds from mandating vaccination of their employees. This bill has legislative co-sponsors,but I need to know if the American people are behind it. If you believe that your job should NEVER dictate your health decisions, "I need you to support my efforts." If you believe that Americans should never allow our government to mandate a vaccine, "I need you to support my efforts." If you believe in freedom as a birthright for American citizens, "I need you to support my efforts." The leftists pushing the vaccine mandates are the same people who are concerned with personal "Safety Measures"healthcare when it involves murdering an unborn baby, but have no issues with a mandate to inject chemicals into your body. I often look at the latest liberal "public safety" idea and wonder how we ever got this far. Our leaders now feel it is entirely normal for them to decide when you can go to work or church, even when our children can go to school, or to demand that you must take a vaccine against your will. This new normal must end, and I am fighting night and day to prevent government and private business from infringing upon your liberty. "Will you join me in the fight to protect YOUR right to keep your health decisions private?" Protecting Our Liberty, "Andy Biggs" Rep. Andy Biggs (AZ-5) Chairman, House Freedom Caucus | PAID FOR BY BIGGS FOR CONGRESS Please take a minute to read the special message from our sponsor. Sponsorships like this one help us keep our news service free of charge. The sponsorship above reflects the opinions & representations of the advertiser, & not necessarily the opinion of USA Freedom Fighters.

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: ATTN Berkeley County Democrats!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP02/1/67825/images/D%20Logo.png]

16th Senate District Democrats Will Meet To Fill Vacancy of Senator Unger

Now accepting name applications

The 16th Senate District Democratic Executive Committee will meet to vote on three names to submit to Governor Justice to fill the vacancy of Senator Unger.

Senator Unger submitted his letter of resignation effective September 11, 2021.

All interested applicants from Berkeley County can submit their resume and cover letter to the West Virginia Democratic Party.

Submission via email is preferred at wvparty@wvdemocrats.com, but if you would like to send by mail you may also do so at: PO Box 11926, Charleston, WV 25339. All submissions must be received by Friday, September 17th.

Jefferson County currently has a sitting Senator, therefore, submissions from that county will not be accepted. All applicants must be registered Democrat.

The committee will hold interviews on September 20th and will send names to Governor Justice on September 24th.

###

Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). This communication is not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Public employees may disregard. Contributions are not tax-deductible.

West Virginia Democratic Party
PO Box 11926
Charleston , WV 25339
United States

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I remember
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I remember when I first launched my campaign for Senate more than 2 years ago.
#

Friends -
I remember when I first launched my campaign for Senate more than 2 years ago.
I wasn’t sure what to expect. One of my biggest concerns was whether or not we’d have the resources to win an expensive race with wild amounts of outside money spent to beat me.
But then, minutes after we announced, a teacher from Tucson made one of the first donations and we were off...
We’ve received hundreds of thousands of donations since then, funding our campaign with grassroots support that I’m very proud of. You should be too.
But today, I have to ask if you can chip in online for the first time. Because our mid-month fundraising drive ends at midnight and we still haven’t reached our goals.
Can I count on you?
[**I’m humbly asking if you can make a $3 contribution before our mid-month fundraising deadline comes to a close at midnight tonight? I need your help to reach our goals.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210915-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1328_6688874_orfh55&akid=1328%2E6688874%2Eorfh55)
This is an FEC deadline month, and that means when it ends we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers. We can’t afford to come up short.
Thank you,
Mark Kelly
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210915-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=1328_6688874_orfh55&akid=1328%2E6688874%2Eorfh55)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1328%2E6688874%2Eorfh55).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: And the first Marjorie Taylor Greene Award goes to...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=091521 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=091521]

Dear Friend,

Ever wonder who’s Pennsylvania’s version of Marjorie Taylor Greene?

Please, let us introduce you to PA Sen. Doug Mastriano.

He's the winner of our first ever Marjorie Taylor Greene Award . We are launching this honor to the most anti-democratic, anti-humanitarian, and plain old stupid leaders that hail from Pennsylvania.

Here's why we know he's the winner:

He's anti-democracy. This election denier was spotted on camera on January 6 participating in the insurrection at the Capitol in DC. At first, he lied, saying he never crossed police lines or walked on Capitol steps. But there is literally video evidence of insurrectionists pulling metal barricade fencing from Capitol Police officers, throwing it away, and Mastriano walking through the police line -- with a crowd! Has he faced any consequences for his part in trying to overthrow the government? Not yet.

He's delusional. He’s been spreading lies about our elections and pushing for a “forensic investigation” of our 2020 presidential election. President Biden won in PA by 80,000+ votes and the courts have repeatedly thrown out these atrocious fraud claims. This Trump lackey even claims that 45 asked him to run for governor.

He's against public health. How’s he helping the war on COVID? He’s not! He’s siding with the deadly virus against life-saving mask and vaccine mandates. To help those who don't want to protect their fellow Pennsylvanians, Mastriano is drafting legislation to make sure that workers who are fired for refusing a vaccine get unemployment benefits and he's writing a proposal to require schools to let parents opt out of life-saving masks for their kids.

Can we go on? Sure we can. But do we have to? It’s clear that Sen. Mastriano is more than deserving of this award.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=091521 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=091521]

We are against everything he stands for and we’re working hard to make sure that voters don’t support people with his values. Please donate today so that we can continue to fight Sen. Mastriano and others like him at every turn.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=091521 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=091521]

Thank you,

Patrick Clark
Keystone Progress

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Doctor’s licenses threatened – you can help defend them
body:
| |
---
Do you see what’s happening? Do you see the escalating and coordinated effort to suppress early treatment options for Covid patients, while at the same time unconstitutionally and immorally trying to force people to inject substances into their bodies they don’t want?
[HOST A PROTEST](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU4LWM4YmEyOWE0ZTljNjQ3M2RhZjMwYzgzYjMwNTc2OTRj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MzIzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=BGDgTl2SuhfA0X4iyEawtw)
It’s bad enough that the federal government and the media demonize and lie about legal and safe treatment options for Covid. Now medical boards and associations are getting in on the act.

As I write this email to you, the following boards and associations have released statements threatening physicians who try to save the lives of their patients by using Covid treatments that work, or who publicly voice concerns they have about the Covid vaccines.
* Federation of State Medical Boards
* American Board of Emergency Medicine
* American Board of Family Medicine
* American Board of Internal Medicine
* American Board of Pediatrics

They are threatening disciplinary action, including _suspension or revocation doctors’ medical licenses!_

I want to let you know that we stood with doctors in July, 2020 to tell the truth to the American people about early treatment options (yes, even that long ago, these brave doctors were already treating people), and we are standing with them again today.

We’ve now updated our _Just Say No to unAmerican Medical Mandates_ _How-to Guide_ to **[include all of the action necessary for you to defend the courageous doctors](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU4LWM4YmEyOWE0ZTljNjQ3M2RhZjMwYzgzYjMwNTc2OTRj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1NUT1AtTWVkaWNhbC1NYW5kYXRlcy1Db250YWN0LU1lZGljYWwtQm9hcmRzLWFuZC1Bc3NvY2lhdGlvbnMucGRmP21pZD00NDMyMyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=71OHOsolKRZFAxRVJhlrGg) **who are risking their medical licenses to provide people like you and me with care – to potentially save our lives. We’ve done all the research and put it together for you, so that you can easily contact these corrupt boards and associations.

And, while you’re at it, [**please sign up to host a protest in your community for Wednesday, September 22nd**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU4LWM4YmEyOWE0ZTljNjQ3M2RhZjMwYzgzYjMwNTc2OTRj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MzIzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=kNXgZq4w-FqnCKQt8pXMFQ)**.** We need both kinds of action to stop the mandates and defend doctors and nurses – we need behind the scenes calls and emails, as well as public protest. The how-to guide I mentioned will walk you through organizing everything from a simple sign waving event at a busy intersection to a more complicated, larger protest event.

When you [**sign up**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU4LWM4YmEyOWE0ZTljNjQ3M2RhZjMwYzgzYjMwNTc2OTRj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MzIzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=DbmrkkfU43Eajxn77CpQrQ)**,** we’ll send you the how-to guide and the schedule for the conference calls we are holding over the next couple of weeks to help you plan.

There are many of you – employees and employers – who have said: we will not comply. We are fighting with you, and with the doctors and nurses who are upholding their oaths to their patients, who are trying to save lives.

[**Sign up today**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU4LWM4YmEyOWE0ZTljNjQ3M2RhZjMwYzgzYjMwNTc2OTRj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MzIzJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=LPyGVG4IEmSXGWtQA3RX4w)**,** and help us show all of the tyrants that the American people will not submit. And if you appreciate the work our team is doing, [please consider a financial gift](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU4LWM4YmEyOWE0ZTljNjQ3M2RhZjMwYzgzYjMwNTc2OTRj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9taWQ9NDQzMjMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=G-e8m10tzQOR8cOoiYCEpA) so that we may keep fighting.

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjU4LWM4YmEyOWE0ZTljNjQ3M2RhZjMwYzgzYjMwNTc2OTRj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9taWQ9NDQzMjMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=3sX90nTPm2fBHmY-dY7_dw)

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: It's time for decision makers to listen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
Kirsten Engel is an environmental law professor and a climate and water policy expert. Read her op-ed from the AZ Daily Star and learn how you can help send her to Congress. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35816582/306244874/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2MxNzBjOC00MTE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YJ7rttYsRAY-rqFRi5_28sira64nL7FTWclwFupx-iY=&emci=d3221669-1e0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d3c170c8-4116-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
For years, the world's top scientists have been sounding the alarm on climate change. It's time for decision makers to listen.
Throughout my career, I've made it a point to stand up and fight for policies that address climate change and key issues affecting our environment. That's why I wrote an Op-Ed for the Arizona Daily Star, to highlight the critical choice we face.
[**Take a moment to read my full Op-Ed here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35816583/306244875/698675404?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2MxNzBjOC00MTE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YJ7rttYsRAY-rqFRi5_28sira64nL7FTWclwFupx-iY=&emci=d3221669-1e0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d3c170c8-4116-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12898431).
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35816584/306244876/-939308004?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2MxNzBjOC00MTE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YJ7rttYsRAY-rqFRi5_28sira64nL7FTWclwFupx-iY=&emci=d3221669-1e0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d3c170c8-4116-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12898431)
---
Southern Arizona has been experiencing extreme heat and drought for decades. We are on the frontlines of the climate crisis and the cutting edge of a clean energy future.
The stakes of this crisis demand nothing less than the most ambitious plan for clean energy and resilient infrastructure in American history.
As your Congresswoman, I will do everything I can to encourage smart investments that will create jobs, save families money, and create opportunities for sustainable growth. I hope you will support me in my fight.
Thank you,
Kirsten
---

A recent poll has Terry McAuliffe and his Trump-endorsed Republican opponent _neck and neck_ in the Virginia governor’s race. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35816671/306245614/1150750638?refcode=em_RC_FR_McAuliffeSplit_091521_ND_Img&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTdhMWEzMy00MjE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AE1QRjA94cx_fn1dOvtP0DjT50oXH0UaVo-MBD0BgLM=) And here’s the thing: The same poll showed that a significant percentage of voters may _still_ be undecided — **with less than two months to go until Election Day.** **[If Terry is going to pull ahead in this critical election, he needs the resources to sway undecided voters. You can help him out — even from here in North Carolina — by splitting a donation of $25 to Team Cooper and Team McAuliffe today>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35816672/306245621/1150750638?refcode=em_RC_FR_McAuliffeSplit_091521_ND_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTdhMWEzMy00MjE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AE1QRjA94cx_fn1dOvtP0DjT50oXH0UaVo-MBD0BgLM=)** I’m all in for Terry McAuliffe because I know he’ll be the governor Virginians deserve — and because Democrats simply can’t afford to lose this race. Just look at Texas to imagine what’s at stake: The Republican governor just signed into law discriminatory, restrictive anti-voter legislation and the most radical anti-choice laws since before _Roe v. Wade._ **We need Virginia’s voters to understand exactly what’s on the line when they choose their next governor.** Terry is taking on record spending by his multi-millionaire opponent who’s pledged to spend _$75 million_ overall, including millions of his own money, to win Virginia for Republicans. name: Natalie Monteiro
subject: Celebrate Hispanic Heritage Month With Us!
body:
| | Friend, **Today, September 15, is the start of Hispanic Heritage Month!** As NextGen’s Pennsylvania Organizing Manager, I wanted to share what Hispanic Heritage Month means to me. Hispanic Heritage Month is not only a _fiesta_ but a period of time where we recognize, appreciate, and honor the many cultures and contributions of the Hispanic and Latinx communities in the United States. As a Latina, first-generation American, and daughter of Puerto Rican immigrants, I am proud of how far the Latinx community has come, and look forward to the many accomplishments we can achieve together. [Act now: Sign up to volunteer with us as we work together to mobilize and uplift the voices of all young voters, in all communities, across the country. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35816746/306245708/-374105823?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjk5MDEyYy00MjE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ICQDqAlf9DDVjNpZGrKBoK0-y6JnOYrZUu903kunh0M=&emci=74706d87-2816-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ff99012c-4216-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172) I also want to take this time to spotlight the incredible impact Latinx youth voters had on the 2020 election. Here are just some of the amazing outcomes of the hard work Latinx organizers put in to elect President Biden and Vice President Harris:
* **73 percent of young Latinx voters** voted for President Biden in the 2020 election.
* 20.6 million Latinx voters cast their ballots in 2020, **a 63 percent increase from the last presidential election.**
* Latinx young voters make up **40 percent of all eligible Latinx voters.**

NexGen understands the power and influence of young Latinx voters. In 2020, we communicated with 1.3 million young Latinx voters through texts, calls, mail, and more. NextGen received more than 29,000 pledges to vote from Latinx voters in 2020 — and we’re increasing this number as we work toward the 2022 midterm elections. To put it simply, we would not be here today without the incredible movement of the Latinx youth. [Volunteer with us to ensure youth voters in all communities know the impact and importance of their voices.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35816748/306245713/-1940189764?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjk5MDEyYy00MjE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ICQDqAlf9DDVjNpZGrKBoK0-y6JnOYrZUu903kunh0M=&emci=74706d87-2816-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=ff99012c-4216-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172) Thank you, Natalie Monteiro
Pennsylvania Organizing Manager
NextGen America
---

clean_body: | | Friend, Today, September 15, is the start of Hispanic Heritage Month! As NextGen’s Pennsylvania Organizing Manager, I wanted to share what Hispanic Heritage Month means to me. Hispanic Heritage Month is not only a fiesta but a period of time where we recognize, appreciate, and honor the many cultures and contributions of the Hispanic and Latinx communities in the United States. As a Latina, first-generation American, and daughter of Puerto Rican immigrants, I am proud of how far the Latinx community has come, and look forward to the many accomplishments we can achieve together. I also want to take this time to spotlight the incredible impact Latinx youth voters had on the 2020 election. Here are just some of the amazing outcomes of the hard work Latinx organizers put in to elect President Biden and Vice President Harris: 73 percent of young Latinx voters voted for President Biden in the 2020 election. 20.6 million Latinx voters cast their ballots in 2020, a 63 percent increase from the last presidential election. Latinx young voters make up 40 percent of all eligible Latinx voters. NexGen understands the power and influence of young Latinx voters. In 2020, we communicated with 1.3 million young Latinx voters through texts, calls, mail, and more. NextGen received more than 29,000 pledges to vote from Latinx voters in 2020 — and we’re increasing this number as we work toward the 2022 midterm elections. To put it simply, we would not be here today without the incredible movement of the Latinx youth. Thank you, Natalie Monteiro Pennsylvania Organizing Manager NextGen America | NextGen America** 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =
