body:
Hello --

In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for United States Senate in Wisconsin. Let me explain why this request is so important:

We’re facing an all-important FEC fundraising deadline at the end of this month. We need to show that we have the resources to build the kind of campaign that can stand up to Mitch McConnell and Ron Johnson’s dark money network -- or let their right-wing donors buy this Senate seat.

I’ve seen it happen far too many times in Wisconsin, and it’s exactly what's wrong with our politics. It's also why I have always refused to accept a single dollar from corporate PACs, and why I never will. Instead, I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you to help build a winning campaign that will overcome the outside spending we’re going to see from the Republicans.

I’m running for U.S. Senate because I’m frustrated by the influence of corporate interests in Washington. I’m sure you are, too. The truth is, the system isn’t working for everybody. We need to replace Ron Johnson with someone who will prioritize working families over outside interests or wealthy campaign donors. That’s what I will do as senator, but I cannot do it alone, which is why I’m asking:

**Can you make a contribution of $10 or more before our critical FEC end-of-quarter deadline? I refuse to take a dime from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on people like you to help us defeat Ron Johnson and flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat. But I know this incredible team has what it takes to match them dollar for dollar, that’s why national Republicans are taking us so seriously.

Election experts are saying this race is winnable because the people of Wisconsin are fed up with politicians who don’t work for them -- like Ron Johnson. They’re sick and tired of leaders like him who do the bidding of wealthy corporations, special interests, and their rich campaign donors.

[**We deserve so much better, that’s why I’m running to be the fighter Wisconsin workers and families deserve in the U.S. Senate today. body:
Every day, it seems we endure yet another failure from the Biden Administration. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/42feb9cb5ead78f2/625d43f581898753c3d6b838967d376c/35903) Peter, President Biden promised to be a unifier for our country. He told his supporters he would bring our country together. Instead, we’ve seen one failure after another. A crisis at our southern border, a shaky economy riddled with inflation, a sham infrastructure bill laced with Green New Deal provisions, and a deadly and disastrous military withdrawal from Afghanistan – and that’s just to name a few. It might be hard to keep them all straight, so we’ve created an easy way to see everything at once: Biden’s Wheel of Misfortune. These are the men and women that President Biden has tasked with “leading” our country. It’s time to STOP the Wheel of Misfortune. We need strong, conservative leadership if we want to break the complete tailspin that radical democrats have put our country into. [**SEE WHAT AWAITS - SPIN BIDEN'S WHEEL OF MISFORTUNE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/42feb9cb5ead78f2/c94681beab66500bc3d6b838967d376c/35903) This U.S. Senate race is one of the TOP races in the country – and the Democrats know it. body:
If i'm going to reach my end of quarter goal by September 30th and keep competitors out of the race. For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=335755bfb97c4dcf99ec030ac58c9418&_t=69QPaZQ0LVVv7rd5nwh5geg0_rKRd1TyZAyX66QN1fHRd5D2Sz-f41cnlqvcJjXWwfoYZ_5wghx_fV8ZY7xy7Ts_esg5jA6GHg9ZnW3Upue1XVM8E74xBABzqm5yH4Bz-hAoPI3pebBQ6QsD6PnEsvNDcLy-s3BaBbps0RgrWWM%3D) |

Fellow Conservative,

The headlines above say a lot about the unenviable positions moderate Democrats in the House find themselves in these days.

How much clout do they have? Do they stay silent? Or stand in protest against the authoritarian style leadership Nancy Pelosi and her lieutenants in the House operate by?

As it turns out - they do a whole lot of nothing.

They write letters protesting the hasty withdrawal from Afghanistan, and on occasion, have attempted – without success – to get Nancy Pelosi to negotiate the price tag of the $3.5 TRILLION spending package she’s about to ram through, despite the narrowest of majorities.

Remember what Pelosi famously said before Democrats passed Obamacare in 2010? ****We need to pass it first so the American people can find out what’s in it!** **

Well, ten years later and here we are again, Fellow Conservative. And the moderates, like my opponent Abigail Spanberger?**Well, she’ll end up voting for the socialist spending spree out of fear of Nancy Pelosi’s wrath**.

It doesn’t have to be this way. I know that with the right message, **[I can flip this district to the Republican column. Last year, Abigail’s opponent fell short by just 8,000 votes](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=335755bfb97c4dcf99ec030ac58c9418&_e=aHE3GUgZKnaNXrWcGZayuHrQATnPuOoEMbXu7ZV2BucmFqsnqk2G7hCkno0h0XyoN5YQkjFdASBJqeOlx0mikyK4VTSduXhCbz_jHGG-eCol9IljSWZlw9rUpLt2uCev7D_vcSTtBucAg7ROYEHdFhHDh8XT5xUQccIiyv3nB6Dja0qiS_KrjQY70zzbJPfxzigD3cM15kgm8R1MogMjq8BOAh1Q5flQ-9t-EnfzelKRGx_NyRBAYl8dsIPslSBHcCxSaN4Kg7-LUkuOD5y-7Tw2JGKY1uPN7pwAHAsL9gfln8OdyQ-17dxu0EjxOsPC1vhEX_5v2hQDpePWPZxAAwUFvrp86UR4A28AYyZyPJMcG_qvaGL6Ri5SLzQZiXj1Ub9X-aHnjZxSOUcT1au-bXG5xtx4c5-xTebCZmTFYUjGQgbeQl2gKU9uZOClgGjYh0fl0moRVB2ecE8vq11mWV15Ky3Ib7RgSlIsDl4CRB7Xgg2-0YY3BN3T3e6wPPQ-)**.

Next year’s race is shaping up to be even closer, because folks all around the country know that a Democrat in the House doesn’t make any of their own decisions, but rather they take every single cue from Pelosi herself.

Here’s what I’m asking of you today: **[please pitch in $8 or more to help me reach my goal of raising $150,000 online this quarter. To date, I’ve raised $96,000, meaning every day between now and September 30th I have to raise $2,700 to reach our goal](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=335755bfb97c4dcf99ec030ac58c9418&_e=aHE3GUgZKnaNXrWcGZayuHrQATnPuOoEMbXu7ZV2BucmFqsnqk2G7hCkno0h0XyoN5YQkjFdASBJqeOlx0mikyK4VTSduXhCbz_jHGG-eCol9IljSWZlw9rUpLt2uCev7D_vcSTtBucAg7ROYEHdFhHDh8XT5xUQccIiyv3nB6Dja0qiS_KrjQY70zzbJPfxzigD3cM15kgm8R1MogMjq8BOAh1Q5flQ-9t-EnfzelKRGx_NyRBAYl8dsIPslSBHcCxSaN4Kg7-LUkuOD5y-7Tw2JGKY1uPN7pwAHAsL9gcwBaczigPb6o4dkUz0r_7d4njz43NH_LuXLipmz5OIcv9TS9GYjPTU-1o17Mjn_9XttFtoIhMQl1B_GlJViERA34b--6nM9JcHua6K40ncg-SEPlp6MmuF5aUMXBNIFjdvlmrIq1rz6dX7_w7S1I5_660GTg6hDBSz5gZ7yp34Bid3GjDTUlSM2OOlE4HLT0bGX9auwwPRhpe72d0k-aUK)**.

| [**CHIP IN $8 TO FLIP THE HOUSE ->** ](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=335755bfb97c4dcf99ec030ac58c9418&_e=aHE3GUgZKnaNXrWcGZayuHrQATnPuOoEMbXu7ZV2BucmFqsnqk2G7hCkno0h0XyoN5YQkjFdASBJqeOlx0mikyK4VTSduXhCbz_jHGG-eCol9IljSWZlw9rUpLt2uCev7D_vcSTtBucAg7ROYEHdFhHDh8XT5xUQccIiyv3nB6Dja0qiS_KrjQY70zzbJPfxzigD3cM15kgm8R1MogMjq8BOAh1Q5flQ-9t-EnfzelKRGx_NyRBAYl8dsIPslSBHcCxSaN4Kg7-LUkuOD5y-7Tw2JGKY1uPN7pwAHAsL9gcUvILi8ArOKsTtqiA2N4M1L0xOllcq40JK87VJziKBz-UKdDjVQzwiWOpJqsU42eIQqtxF89u57D_BR5uOzyhChQPBrYn9X1RdGEKaPo2V5yvho6SWzqNizSPIMNnBlEmLWf8yhlNIRth6ByDo6ciW7zODQN5Ew3ych2HsnGEPdZdEk4owvxV93d7QTW-zQt0aqTP-oRK3DY6qdDZkNxUN)
---

A little bird told me that there are several other Republicans who are actively considering an entrance into this race – which would create a combative Republican primary we really must avoid if we’re going to flip this seat Republican next November. That being said, **the potential candidates are waiting to see what I’m able to raise this quarter before making their decisions**.

**[That’s why hitting my goal of raising $150,000 even all the more important](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=335755bfb97c4dcf99ec030ac58c9418&_e=aHE3GUgZKnaNXrWcGZayuHrQATnPuOoEMbXu7ZV2BucmFqsnqk2G7hCkno0h0XyoN5YQkjFdASBJqeOlx0mikyK4VTSduXhCbz_jHGG-eCol9IljSWZlw9rUpLt2uCev7D_vcSTtBucAg7ROYEHdFhHDh8XT5xUQccIiyv3nB6Dja0qiS_KrjQY70zzbJPfxzigD3cM15kgm8R1MogMjq8BOAh1Q5flQ-9t-EnfzelKRGx_NyRBAYl8dsIPslSBHcCxSaN4Kg7-LUkuOD5y-7Tw2JGKY1uPN7pwAHAsL9gdwceChpa20wLGXk_zpkUABSfMuWjOvZ-g2S5aMbPkM7HjV5fk9EIyMRSxFUC7RCoR60R6Ju-lJ5QjVqaIAMBY9yosYfx9uST-_wfRN-b2Q-3LJa38opiy9CNH9z8AVvMJQboFiFEw9Y7Y_RxT-Uk4xSud6yT3ZEWlN54LLbaiyIVG6dzLZaGaUs4MGfYNlD_SY0aRWeCJ-LdcHCt8JCE9u)**. Voting rights are under attack, but Derek is working hard to defend our democracy. **[Rush a donation before the mid-month deadline to support Derek in the fight to protect the right to vote.](https://act.myngp.com/el/9Jf2vuDDPK0NyL1nGsOhCCa-nOUH4NZm4baf93BuEpw=/sPcHsKhwHh4qVUlVHQl9P-k2RHBupvdw-P2DcD6SDrA=?refcode=em21_210915_MM1_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210915_MM1_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)** [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/9Jf2vuDDPK0NyL1nGsOhCCa-nOUH4NZm4baf93BuEpw=/sPcHsKhwHh4qVUlVHQl9P-k2RHBupvdw-P2DcD6SDrA=?refcode=em21_210915_MM1_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210915_MM1_fndd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

| **FIRST:** Democrats in Texas fled the state to try to stop an extreme anti-voter bill.

**THEN:** Texas' governor threatened to arrest Democratic lawmakers, forcing them to return.

**NOW:** Governor Greg Abbott has signed the anti-voter bill into law.

This is bad news, Peter, and we can't overstate how dangerous this law is. It BANS drive-thru voting, 24-hour polling locations and drop boxes for mail ballots. It disproportionately impacts Black voters and their ability to cast their ballots.

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Stand Up to the New Racists
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Patriot:

You have probably heard about Critical Race Theory.
It's not just Political Correctness on steroids. It is the
hateful, elitist scam that fuels the woke Left's anti-American
cancel culture. You've seen the stories:

❌ CRT says white children start becoming racists
at three months old!

❌ Coca-Cola employees were forced to take a class
telling them to "try to be less white"!

❌ At one federal agency, all white, male employees
were forced to write letters apologizing to women and people of
color.

❌ In San Diego, the school board declared that it
was racist to expect minority students to hand in homework on
time.

When these stories pop up, the first thought is,
"That's insane." But Critical Race Theory is not crazy - it's
just racism. It's bigotry. Prejudice. Hate. And it's on the
march.

CRT racism has taken over American college campuses,
elite corporations, and the mainstream media. But it won't stop
there. It's coming for our local schools, our small businesses,
our rights, our jobs, and our speech.

The good news is, deep down, Critical Race
Theorists, like all bullies, are cowards. If Americans stand up
to CRT racism, the New Racists will back down. But we know
Establishment Republicans won't take up this fight. They are too
afraid of the media and too beholden to corporate donors.
That's why Senate Conservatives Fund only supports principled
conservatives who fight.

Just talking about Critical Race Theory was not
enough for Donald Trump - who banned CRT from federal training
programs and launched the 1776 Commission to promote patriotic
education in American schools. And talk is not good enough for
us. As you know, SCF is the only organization in American
politics exclusively committed to recruiting, vetting, and
electing principled, conservative fighters to the U.S. Senate. We
don't care about a candidate's Party - we care about their guts.
Today I want to tell you about three conservative Senate
candidates we have endorsed to replace finger-to-the-wind RINOs.

✅ In Alabama, Congressman Mo Brooks has our
support and the support of conservatives around the country -
from grassroots activists all the way to Donald Trump. Brooks is
leading the fight against the New Racism in the House
Representatives, with legislation to bar CRT from federally
funded programs and schools.

✅ In North Carolina, we have endorsed Congressman
Ted Budd, a member of the House Freedom Caucus committed to the
color-blind, equal opportunity America we all know and love. Budd
has not only been working in the House to strip CRT from the
federal budget. He's been helping North Carolina legislators to
do the same in his home state.

✅ In Ohio, former Secretary of State and combat
veteran Josh Mandel is the strongest, toughest conservative in a
crowded Republican primary to replace moderate Republican Senator
Rob Portman. Mandel is a rock-solid social, economic, MAGA
conservative who has made Critical Race Theory - which he calls
"a cancer" - a centerpiece of his campaign. He's not backing down
from the outrage mobs or the Big Tech censorship machine.

By contributing today, you will push these three
candidates one step closer to winning those races and winning
back our country from the woke mob.

Brooks, Budd, and Mandel are exactly the kind of
leaders we need to stand up to the racist bullies of CRT. They
won't shy from the truth, or the bigoted beltway insiders who try
to hide it.

SCF supports them because they, like us and like
you, stand against the racism, hatred, and lies of the Woke Left.
We have their back because they have ours.

Now we need your help. I'm asking you to contribute
$25 or more today. Will you please help us fight against the New
Racists?

The Left is all in, and the established elites won't
give up their power willingly. To win in 2022, conservative
Senate candidates have to fight both of them - but with SCF and
your help, they will succeed.

Thank you for being part of our team and for doing
so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are

body:
#
Odessa Kelly, Rana Abdelhamid, Kina Collins, and Jessica Cisneros. These 4 working-class progressive women of color make up the Justice Democrats slate for 2022. **_So far._**
Our slate will challenge the political establishment. But we have a lot of decisions to make about our work for 2022. That's where you come in.
**Can you help us think through our strategy?[Take this survey on what you'd like Justice Democrats to focus on for next year's primaries!](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=3783a89bd3&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
[What kind of candidates do you most want Justice Democrats to recruit?](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=f8ce921267&e=5a4b10d0ec) Activists Teachers Nurses As long as they don't take corporate PAC money, I'm on board **[Take the survey->](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=b72b05caf1&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
---
We have some big decisions ahead of us to ensure we're strategic in our mission to transform the Democratic Party and elect more Justice Democrat recruits like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, and Jamaal Bowman.
**[Can you give your input today so we know what our movement is thinking? It will really help us chart our path towards 2022. It will only take 2 minutes!](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=6a0195d356&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Fellow Conservative, Have you heard of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s “Young Gun’s Program? ” I hadn’t either until my first campaign for Congress last year. I’d like to give you an explanation as to what the purpose of the program is and The Young Guns program serves to help Republican candidates running in some of the most competitive districts around the country with a playbook on how to vanquish Democrat opposition, along with providing strategic support on everything from polling, fundraising, advertising and grassroots outreach. Membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C. – and prove they can WIN. This year, I’m aiming to be one of the first candidates to qualify for the program because with my race expected to be one of the closest in the nation for a second year in a row, . If you’re interested in making an investment in flipping the House Republican, you needn’t look further than this email. body:
Putting your dollars behind our movement sends a message
#

Hi friend,
I’m sorry to bother you again, but it looks like we need about 230 more folks to chip in before midnight, and I’m hoping you’ll be one of them.
If we can hit this goal today, we’ll go into our FEC deadline later this month with a surge of momentum, and everyone will be able to see the tremendous strength of our movement when our fundraising numbers go public.
[So, I’m personally asking — can I count on you to be one of the folks we need to make a contribution and help us reach our goal today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35819958/306256976/-353695395?refcode2=432fd2ba-4816-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210915-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzJmZDJiYS00ODE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=diFz9AaihFtseUidGzq0cuvnVQc6xhC68O5TAZ13wuU=)

Any amount you give makes a big impact in building our movement, but it’s the donation itself that means the most.
That’s because when you step up to make a donation, you’re choosing to own a piece of this campaign, and that’s a powerful statement.
Putting your dollars behind our movement sends a message that says working people are speaking for ourselves this time around — and we demand a voice of our own in Washington.
**Now, it’s going to take a big coalition of folks stepping up for us to hit our goal by midnight, so I’m counting on your support.**
I know in my bones we can create a government that works for working folks like us if we stand together.
[If you’re able, please pitch in before you close this email. Your contribution could be the one that puts us over the top.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35819963/306256980/-353695395?refcode2=432fd2ba-4816-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210915-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzJmZDJiYS00ODE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=diFz9AaihFtseUidGzq0cuvnVQc6xhC68O5TAZ13wuU=)

name: Rand Paul
subject: why does Fauci want Americans to stay sick?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
There's no vaccine, no law, and no regulation that will satisfy a power-hungry bureaucrat like Dr. Fauci. That’s why they
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0rsoshdgmiekb1go7l3n0a8u58mgi8jqpqb1vk8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cth6eo34clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongs1oe4olk6kp34d5mclieed5mc9oraspmm4pjeo3n62pmcp71cmr60o3jepo7eduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75cb665ob6p9nmpgmccdgm9h3csh5u)
**IT’S TIME TO STOP THE ANTI-SCIENCE COVID MOB** **[Chip in if you agree!>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo0uqldr24ep9f0uibce15bud4dageb1iu5q5foo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cth6eo34clh2bs)** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3t098uqbn25bucbn1rap7v82v2icbvvvavjvctg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cth6eo34clh2bs) | |
---
Friend,

There's no vaccine, no law, and no regulation that will satisfy a power-hungry bureaucrat like Dr. Fauci.

That’s why they’re hiding the truth about REAL COVID treatments.

_They’ve made that very clear._**_ [STAND UP >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z73lttd0svcq0k6emahb44lhs422o7k88e3ogsg8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cth6eo34clh2bs)_**

In a commonsense move last week, Florida’s surgeon general announced that any Floridian is now eligible to receive monoclonal antibody treatment for COVID-19, without having to deal with the bureaucracy of a doctor’s office.

These clinics offer access to monoclonal antibody cocktails which are highly effective in treating COVID-19 patients before their condition worsens. The treatment is an IV infusion but is done as an outpatient.

_It's common sense, live-saving stuff, right?_

**So why are our “pro-science" friends like Dr. Fauci and the CDC doing everything they can to stop it?**

**We know the reason. It’s because they've decided that Americans don't deserve the truth. They want to keep us sick and scared to maintain their own power and it's about time this sham comes to an end.**
[**I AGREE: STAND WITH RAND >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2agqkmbh8kdr85occ52bps1jflhg8dhh6n397dg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cth6eo34clh2bs)
It's really pretty simple: monoclonal antibodies are an effective treatment for this virus that little attention has been paid to.

**THAT has to change.**

And while these crooks don't want Americans to get real treatment, they're not going to stop me from speaking the truth. Both in media interviews and while traveling across Kentucky.

For quite a while now I’ve publicly praised the benefits of monoclonal antibodies and urged Kentuckians and Americans to be aware of this remarkable and effective treatment for ONE REASON: You deserve to have this critical information.

**That's why I'm putting my foot down. It's time to stop the politics and embrace science. and if you agree I hope you'll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2870552/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2931jsgk30o7sbfi7fmt3vjs931bv800vl38eg8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cth6eo34clh2bs)**

I refuse to allow this anti-science COVID chaos to become permanent, Friend.

I have real power as a U.S. Senator to spread the word, but I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength now, when it counts. **[Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhcdplbr82k8pohbumeffg7e9pba57uc2v2sj0ng_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cth6eo34clh2bs) **

Thanks in advance.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

subject: My opponent is a far-right seditionist.

I am committed to making sure that Doug LaMalfa and seditionists like him in the Republican Party do not return to office in 2022. |

Friend,

**My opponent Doug LaMalfa is a far-right seditionist -- plain and simple.** Unlike folks like Matt Gaetz or Marjorie Taylor Greene, he may not make news headlines. But he's been just as dangerous for our democracy as those who are front and center on Fox and CNN.

I am committed to making sure that Doug LaMalfa and seditionists like him never return to office in 2022, but I need your help to do it:

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: NH Republicans just defunded Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
New Hampshire Republicans just defunded Planned Parenthood, friend. From cancer screenings to family planning services, Planned Parenthood has provided thousands of Granite Staters with primary and preventative care for years – and this disastrous vote will threaten access to care for women and families across our state. This isn't the first time women's reproductive freedom has been under attack in New Hampshire. A restrictive abortion ban, along with mandatory ultrasound requirements, was recently signed into law, with no exceptions for rape, incest, or fatal fetal anomaly. But it's not just in New Hampshire. Across the country, Republican-led legislatures are restricting access to women's health care like contraception, cancer screenings, and abortion. In Texas, the most restrictive abortion ban in the country went into effect this month after the Supreme Court rejected an emergency request to block the legislation. Attacks like these are deeply troubling, as the Supreme Court has rendered _Roe v. Wade essentially meaningless._ I will always fight for a woman's right to access safe and affordable reproductive health care and her constitutionally protected right to choose if and when to start a family. That's why I have led efforts in the Senate to protect Title X family planning centers like Planned Parenthood. At a time when Roe v. Wade is under attack like never before, it's imperative that we have a pro-choice Democratic majority in the Senate. **[That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Before our mid-month deadline, will you chip in $5 to keep NH and our Senate blue and protect women's access to health care?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35821738/306262449/-149339129?refcode=e20210915_mwh-pp-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGE5MzdmNi00ZDE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U4WmQA9MmWWIGfGPfdims14qVGa2JcA5oQAs1gP8iWU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35821740/306262450/-149339129?refcode=e20210915_mwh-pp-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGE5MzdmNi00ZDE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U4WmQA9MmWWIGfGPfdims14qVGa2JcA5oQAs1gP8iWU=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35821631/306262082/-2023814932?refcode=20210915.4_TM_9CO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTgyYzRhNi00YzE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_lzaGhsxGPc6z3S9mR0nUus2u4lm_srDECXQbpKrerQ=)

| | I’m flabbergasted, Derek ...

We’ve been sending you email after email about just how important this pre-debate fundraising goal is, but we’re barely making any progress toward our goal.

**I thought folks would be fired up to see Glenn have to answer for his lies and Trumpian rhetoric, but at this point,_it seems like enthusiasm is at an all time low._**

Derek, we’re going to need all hands on deck if we want to pull this off, and I’m counting on you to step up today.

body:
Your support is critical to help us stay competitive against the National GOP. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35821901/306262762/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGJkMzk0Yi00ZTE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uLwZGfveTV4QLJUeXjz6ANyHncw3rEJBzFJTDYw-ptA=)
Hey, there — I’m back in Washington after being home in Colorado. I got to spend time with Susan and our girls, and I visited 15 counties, covering 1,850 miles. Coloradans across the state made it clear they want to see progress on the challenges they face, whether it’s struggling to get their kids out of poverty or the harm caused by climate change. That’s why I’m ramping up my fight to extend the expanded Child Tax Credit — which has already helped one million Colorado kids — for years to come and why I’m advocating for a $60 billion investment in our forests and watersheds to combat climate change and create jobs. But my work makes me a target for National Republicans, folks. Mitch McConnell and the National GOP have raised almost $60 million to flip the Senate and they see Colorado as a top target. We don’t have to outraise them, but we do have to keep pace, which is why we set a mid-month goal to make up for our summer slump in fundraising. **So, I’m respectfully asking (Not begging! That’s not my style) you to please make a donation of $10 — or whatever you can afford — to help us reach our goal before tonight’s mid-month deadline. ** [**_Donate by clicking this link today: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfb-em-sep2021_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35821902/306262763/-544172133?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20210915_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGJkMzk0Yi00ZTE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uLwZGfveTV4QLJUeXjz6ANyHncw3rEJBzFJTDYw-ptA=) Thank you and talk soon, Michael _Sent my from my iPhone_ |

| Fellow Patriot, Over my years working in the D.C. swamp, including as Acting Director of National Intelligence for the greatest President in history, Donald J. Trump, and his Ambassador to Germany, I received some important advice: **_" Judge a man by the character of his enemies."_** And when it comes to Kash Patel, he has all the right enemies. As he writes in the email below, lead deep stater Adam "Shifty" Schiff recently launched an all-out assault on his character - where I'm honored to be name-dropped alongside him. **[The timing of Schiff's smear is extremely telling, as it comes as Kash is launching a historic first-of-its kind LEGAL OFFENSIVE TRUST against the fake news media.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqrlm4ctk2n1948htnt3029gsaa6c4u9cjulrbk0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cth61o71c9h2bs)** **After all, it was Kash who drafted the Nunes memo exposing just how fake the Russia investigation was.** And unlike most weak-kneed "investigations" coming out of Washington, Kash didn't pull any punches, and named names going all the way to the top, including corrupt officials like Hillary Clinton and James Comey. So Schiff's hatred is based on the fact that Kash is a patriot who isn't willing to sell out his country to the deep state. **[I consider Kash a good friend, and close ally in the fight for America First- and that's why I'm hoping you will help him continue that fight by chipping in to his LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND against the fake news media.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztvi0h4pm4qg2eanqq376hqgfcshlkqf8n54u6lg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cth61o71c9h2bs)** You can read more about his fight below. But just know that Kash is the man, and a true patriot we can count on. Thank you! Richard Grenell
Former Acting Director of National Intelligence for President Donald J. Trump [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze3aqgeuhp8chiv52tcgh7h7o19b6b9ok3dlsofg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cth61o71c9h2bs)

With Adam Schiff being this angry with me, I know that I'm right on target, and the only thing to do now is double-down. But to do that I need the support of American patriots, thousands of which have already stepped up. **[So can I count on you to make a generous contribution to my LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND against he fake news media?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8lf8aj2ivmvskg43335snk6iqj7ghg23flb8vj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cth61o71c9h2bs)** | | | | [Chip in $25](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp3vr1f9d4p4tjirjkr1g73lcisqpfijcsmfp2hg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4cth61o71c9h2bs)

clean_body: It’s possible, Peter. | Trump-Endorsed Republican Senator Tim Scott has been fighting non-stop to save President Trump’s America First Agenda in the U.S. Senate, but Joe Biden’s Socialists are raising millions of dollars to defeat him and expand their majority. If we can’t find 2,901 more donations by 11:59 PM TONIGHT , we are almost certainly going to fall behind -- and the Democrats will leap into the lead for Tim Scott’s must-win Senate seat! | | | | | | | | | | Here’s the deal, Peter: the battle for the Senate Majority will be so very close. That’s why it’s essential that we keep up with the Democrats in terms of Grassroots Fundraising. If we slip behind, it could mean fewer canvassers, fewer ads, and fewer opportunities to reach out to the voters that will be essential on Election Day. | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much, Peter. \-- Elect Republicans

name: Dory MacMillan, CheriBeasley.com
subject: introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I wanted to introduce myself and share a bit about why it’s so important that we win North Carolina’s Senate race and elect Cheri.
#

Hi there -
It’s Dory, Cheri’s communications director. I wanted to introduce myself and share a bit about why it’s so important that we win North Carolina’s Senate race and elect Cheri.
We all know that the Senate majority is at risk. It’s 50-50 now, and North Carolina can decide whether we can hold (or hopefully expand!) that margin next year.
This is one of only three toss-up Senate races in the entire country, according to the Cook Political Report.
Our ability to make progress in our state and across the country could hinge on the outcome of this race. Cheri could be the deciding yes vote on legislation to protect voting rights, codify reproductive freedom, combat climate change and more. But first, we have to win this race, and that’s where folks like you come in:
[**Will you pitch in $3 to our campaign today to help us send Cheri Beasley to the Senate and defend our majority? Cheri could cast the deciding vote on critically important legislation, and your support can make that possible.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35823558/306269128/1741212721?refcode2=de529ad9-5016-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210915-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTUyOWFkOS01MDE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GaKodl015XwjKwHnCUFKQvSL-UUA9bkq_7OioLOsaTQ=)
We know this race is going to be tough, and it's going to be expensive. But there is no doubt that Cheri is the person who can win.
I joined this team because Cheri will be the kind of Senator who fights tirelessly for our state and stands up for what’s right. It’s who she is, and what she’s always done.
But we also need someone who can win. And that’s Cheri. She is the only candidate in this race — Democrat or Republican — to win twice statewide. And in 2020, she earned more votes than almost every Democrat on the ballot, including Joe Biden — and more than Thom Tillis.
That is a testament to Cheri’s record of serving North Carolina and her unique ability to motivate and persuade voters in a purple state like North Carolina.
She has spent her life in service to North Carolina, and it is clear she is the person our state needs and deserves to represent us in the Senate. I know that she will fight for all of us — but first, we must have her back in this fight if we’re going to flip this seat.
[**If you want to hold the Senate and build a better future for our state, please make a $3 donation to our campaign today. This seat could decide whether Democrats are able to continue making progress or if McConnell will be able to block our entire agenda.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35823559/306269129/1741212721?refcode2=de529ad9-5016-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210915-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTUyOWFkOS01MDE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GaKodl015XwjKwHnCUFKQvSL-UUA9bkq_7OioLOsaTQ=)
I’m thrilled to be on this team and in the trenches with you. It’s going to take all of us doing our part to win this fight, so thank you in advance!
\- Dory MacMillan
Communications Director
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35823561/306269130/1741212721?refcode2=de529ad9-5016-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210915-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTUyOWFkOS01MDE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GaKodl015XwjKwHnCUFKQvSL-UUA9bkq_7OioLOsaTQ=)**

* * *
Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina

Cheri Beasley for North Carolina

Raleigh, NC 27611
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35823564/306269133/1066802432?refcode=em-footer&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTUyOWFkOS01MDE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GaKodl015XwjKwHnCUFKQvSL-UUA9bkq_7OioLOsaTQ=) today to help us make history.

clean_body: | A few updates on our campaign for you, folks: Yesterday, our team officially raised one million dollars since we launched our exploratory campaign, a huge testament to the grassroots movement we’re building in Texas. Next week begins the third special legislative session, and we are calling on Dan Patrick to add fixing the damn grid to the agenda. Our mid-month deadline ends tonight at midnight, and we need your support to spread Mike’s positive message to voters all across Texas. Will you please contribute $1 or any amount toward our mid-month fundraising goal before midnight? Every dollar makes a difference. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for being part of our movement. subject: Judge blocks Gov. Reynolds’ law banning masks in schools

body:

Big news, team: **A federal judge has officially blocked Governor Kim Reynolds’ law that bans Iowa schools from requiring masks.** This is a major blow to Gov. Reynolds’ attempt to take local control away from our school districts, and will temporarily allow them to put mask requirements in place if they feel that will best protect students and staff from COVID-19. This decision comes after a number of families sued the state of Iowa for failing to properly protect children with existing medical conditions, and as COVID cases in children continue to rise at an alarming rate with the spread of the Delta variant. It’s a great step in the right direction to hold Gov. Reynolds accountable for her power grab. But in 2022, we can finish the job by voting her out at the ballot box and giving Iowa a leader who will empower communities to do what’s best for them. **[Our campaign for governor is just two weeks away from our very first End of Quarter fundraising deadline. subject: Can I ask you something?

body:
We have to win the Virginia elections that are less than two months away. We have to give our Democratic Senate candidates the support they need to fight Republican attacks that are already underway. And we have to keep delivering real results for the American people.

|

Meanwhile, we also have to keep raising the money we’ll need to win in Virginia this fall and defend the Democratic Senate majority next year. While I’m focused on the big legislative work ahead, I’m counting on dedicated supporters like you who care about Virginia and the future of our communities to keep us in this fight. **_[Derek, will you help me keep up our fight for Virginians? We have to win the Virginia elections that are less than two months away. We have to give our Democratic Senate candidates the support they need to fight Republican attacks that are already underway. name: Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
subject: "Brown on the outside, white on the inside"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Is what's been said about me for being a Hispanic Republican I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e54e2fa927b04e749413c9820248ecbd&_e=hvG6MhTAqi4w2lFEqcxfqZH-PoJy7tMk4jMJDpvZSNg-sc2VK0IR0U4AogKFW7ZAF6qisqtQTtam4YqIjsTea9MqMmxMm9IRF4LVJTTojOqKKGk_G7nPgRIeqfMgSN4Rl703h_kvpR8q66VC0uZzByPhiiBpcAKwjG-A8grj-sSBwz_krJHDU3R1FQacscP3krAYVHE0B_HEDFsbD3VNBACl4Mfechk91YuXAC5AKgOxn5XFN088DyMVHqlzWUk0nPC_snb3c18LaZOzdK6Ai2p848F22SMmtuAJkoCGGfgTx4aZOHBjC1X3dy12RUxObDf_XK4ifAnnGdLX8qVHxAYFMhH_2g5Om9Q2QoXx_mCnKhrQ4GeramGBm7Hyhqgf5z5i3uIu86aPs6WSU9ECvBKHrYWZtY0bKH_KiDnqbZZvjVVc6IRhtXQ9X-ABF0qj89T1WL3iPXyohYwyvQB3EnU_ljaX1vVvO-X0zA0p0kU%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Hispanics were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Hispanic,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, **a proud Hispanic Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e54e2fa927b04e749413c9820248ecbd&_e=hvG6MhTAqi4w2lFEqcxfqZH-PoJy7tMk4jMJDpvZSNg-sc2VK0IR0U4AogKFW7ZAF6qisqtQTtam4YqIjsTea9MqMmxMm9IRF4LVJTTojOqKKGk_G7nPgRIeqfMgSN4Rl703h_kvpR8q66VC0uZzByPhiiBpcAKwjG-A8grj-sSBwz_krJHDU3R1FQacscP3krAYVHE0B_HEDFsbD3VNBACl4Mfechk91YuXAC5AKgOxn5XFN088DyMVHqlzWUk0nPC_snb3c18LaZOzdK6Ai4L30wC7jagArcq_UpuG3W4DMecigq41vch2EyPMkV5xaYlZ3donNjzFjEVWPeok5_SuF9Igo2_13qfgvjLH3UGPVVZ5zQm9ntlqwpSpiUc5FdHdWMOJ3gPFb9S4827EISMtELDPexDISYv4_oIl8_SYd93xntDFnO4BVFIZpGeyHsGShQkNkVwtn8xbf9Zfb7S-v3IfDHPnyS1w6qYll-o%3D)

I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Hispanics?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e54e2fa927b04e749413c9820248ecbd&_e=hvG6MhTAqi4w2lFEqcxfqZH-PoJy7tMk4jMJDpvZSNg-sc2VK0IR0U4AogKFW7ZAF6qisqtQTtam4YqIjsTea9MqMmxMm9IRF4LVJTTojOqKKGk_G7nPgRIeqfMgSN4Rl703h_kvpR8q66VC0uZzByPhiiBpcAKwjG-A8grj-sSBwz_krJHDU3R1FQacscP3krAYVHE0B_HEDFsbD3VNBACl4Mfechk91YuXAC5AKgOxn5XFN088DyMVHqlzWUk0nPC_snb3c18LaZOzdK6AizDtngd1_JpVOUy-Rw5gGHjAeOa2-7zy0YJySe5-9zs-huS3gOGaVJh1LUnWQhjKhPTTiRcjGv2JyeRqDEQHqLfJMHsTBIfYai5sQat-jGkQUHNa6VncsElx1HdhC9ty5wepGaps7ThrJVGgmfDr_IZHWvbwSlrFIowxtDTAgi3o7aZHQHu2nWWl_P-vFpu4XtKwvWawRYde9kYizfRg7Oo%3D)

Culturally, Hispanics are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Hispanic communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
Republican for Congress

body:
CNN knows that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year’s midterm elections. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bcf7acd78a17441a907d696f2bf0a363&_e=f8eWG49kdTLqv6VLE7V5e_DXsC3U_hHF84w8Sw1aLSLnI-8CRDEYDik4C-ugbEZeRplBiYVl7omfZH-Qg6GztDG20bEdLbEQrPoaqsppgzEEjceHuT5mkkd6v3cF0SggN9gEFOMGLDnNTs_8wqIa9anM8SdQ3kpus--2yWBlCIBLOpXCNmWydn7YVFeehuYMQcGrokyPDPym2nds-6xDeoLlEMxooSL0E4CvFC1mnF2GMaKKiw7u3u9zuecx6uOE283LVRKuiZdnHqHDykgI7sm-N45v5ittwxzdOA1G0c-1zhRbXPedziDayuFladF-u0CKPjMdNM9TJkoBcFK3x__azTLTD9cbf3yMuuYSjHQU91Ex7Y_yWP-rVzRp7PXieH4YYFaTPuDynfkgYwSrAzaH0_IdYtUbCg9KIH_yNH6FUKMVtwxoAurlQ39IA-VTtIneUZ_R07LOpXIRgFIhAg%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

I knew it was only a matter of time before left-leaning news networks would start attempting to slander our campaign at every possible opportunity.

CNN has stepped into the role they've come to embrace over the years: The Democrat Party's mouthpiece. _Recently they published a story about me that couldn't be further from the truth._

The truth is that Democrats - including the top executives at CNN - know that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year's midterm elections.

**Fellow American, we know that distorting facts is what Democrats do best. Well, I want to show my Democrat opponent and his supporters in the media that I've got the support of the conservative grassroots behind my candidacy.**

My opponents need to know that when they try and attack our campaign, we'll work even harder to raise the funds necessary to win this race. I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight tonight in response to the recent attacks on me and my campaign. **[Can I count on you to help us ensure we hit our goal before midnight with a gift of $10, $25, $100- or even my favorite number, $34!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bcf7acd78a17441a907d696f2bf0a363&_e=f8eWG49kdTLqv6VLE7V5e_DXsC3U_hHF84w8Sw1aLSLnI-8CRDEYDik4C-ugbEZeRplBiYVl7omfZH-Qg6GztDG20bEdLbEQrPoaqsppgzEEjceHuT5mkkd6v3cF0SggN9gEFOMGLDnNTs_8wqIa9anM8SdQ3kpus--2yWBlCIBLOpXCNmWydn7YVFeehuYMQcGrokyPDPym2nds-6xDeoLlEMxooSL0E4CvFC1mnF2GMaKKiw7u3u9zuecx6uOE5j6wTOeozq7L3Bvgr7T6r2JlkZKkxqrfJyNlgU9do7-bRDTTxQpB6T9uW-Gncnu9T2HpLa5YSzKFZKnKqUrM6szW0gzSpGuXEc80eEStaXEoUKvCm3mOwbGxItb0VQ1KJx3TcQWvjYE2Qwv71KtZkQOss_k1jE2thID9nh6uhLOurpYFHJi7ZE0JniIWiV4jYxmRy0LMdi-N0WS4It_Y8Q%3D%3D)**

When I was considering my entrance into the U.S. Senate race in Georgia, I faced a choice: let a progressive Democrat easily win reelection against another Republican not ready to take him on - or get into the race, win, and risk having the media attempt to tarnish my good name along the way.

I chose the latter because the future of our country - and the future of Georgia - is too important to sit on the sidelines.

**[You would be doing me a great honor if you would support our campaign to take back the Senate with a contribution today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bcf7acd78a17441a907d696f2bf0a363&_e=f8eWG49kdTLqv6VLE7V5e_DXsC3U_hHF84w8Sw1aLSLnI-8CRDEYDik4C-ugbEZeRplBiYVl7omfZH-Qg6GztDG20bEdLbEQrPoaqsppgzEEjceHuT5mkkd6v3cF0SggN9gEFOMGLDnNTs_8wqIa9anM8SdQ3kpus--2yWBlCIBLOpXCNmWydn7YVFeehuYMQcGrokyPDPym2nds-6xDeoLlEMxooSL0E4CvFC1mnF2GMaKKiw7u3u9zuecx6uOEm9gVfZXjiMVn5iFqb7KqaQIegIDlNyo8Jl7Eab5h28diQmZSfJIalA-kxj3JsIp_I5n-SJn8q2W_WVMmAsEqr5bf8cyVorbdL8JbbKnAc4_ny97OWR3dQmeYw8IL7MQIAp1Euc1UtnRD-07S7cTya3aO96czuUuVmtIQ9_2oSAJeAo1K5ABC28WHYDoghDMfj81CIEXbTYfZSSCFUuENQw%3D%3D)**

We've got to be ready for anything.

Thank you,

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump’s recall election lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, We did it. We defeated the recall of Gavin Newsom. Your activism, your support, and your dedication played a huge part in this victory. **But our work is far from over.** The same forces at work who led this failed Republican recall in California are the ones subverting and threatening our democracy in other parts of the country. They reject their own humiliating defeats by falsely claiming voter fraud. Just like their craven leader, Donald Trump. Trump alleged voter fraud in California in 2016. In 2020. And again Monday: _“Does anybody really believe the California Recall Election isn’t rigged? Millions and millions of Mail-In Ballots will make this just another giant Election Scam, no different, but less blatant, than the 2020 Presidential Election Scam!”_ —Trump **It’s the same damn, cynical, political playbook. Spread misinformation. Confuse the voters. Subvert our democracy. Repeat.** Make no mistake. Democracy prevailed yesterday on the ballot in California. No matter how loud Trump wails, or tries to drag our country to the abyss of dictatorship, the American people are fighting back. People like you and me. My team and I have been amazed by your impassioned support in defeating this sham Republican-led recall. **When Gavin Newsom and I asked for your help defeating this recall, you responded by helping us raise almost $500,000.** And I’ll be honest, Derek, — we’re going to need an even bigger response to protect our House and Senate majorities in the midterm elections next November. **We need to raise every dollar possible before midnight — our mid-month deadline of this FEC quarter — to defend our House and Senate majorities in California and across the nation. The dangerous cult leading the Republican Party will follow wherever Donald Trump leads them. As Trump continues to spread the Big Lie and sow distrust in democracy itself, we must do everything possible to keep Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy out of power.
I wish I could tell you that defeating Trump in 2020 was enough to save our democracy. But it wasn’t. He planted a dangerous seed in this country, and has proven the greatest threat to our democracy isn’t from a foreign power – it’s from within.
Republicans echoing Trump’s lies and conspiracies about election fraud are undermining confidence in our democratic institutions. Stopping the GOP from taking the House and Senate next year has never been more important.
**[Please, if you can, pitch in $10 or whatever you can afford, and let’s keep the momentum going after the stinging defeat of the recall. — Adam

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Facebook: Doug the Pug is better than you . . .
body:
Recently released Internal Facebook documents obtained by a Project Veritas whistleblower show that Zuckerberg and his company have been giving special account status to
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/f255M8q9La8xaYew892MnuGA/iKkGFr2ecziHQwhXUNW4Zg)
Patriot,

Recently released Internal Facebook documents obtained by a Project Veritas whistleblower show that Zuckerberg and his company have been giving special account status to 5.8 million users - including "animal influencer" Doug the Pug.

The program, known as XCheck, turns off moderation for "VIP" accounts, letting them post pretty much whatever they want without censorship.

**Meanwhile, tens of millions of American conservatives are censored or banned on Facebook!**

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/f255M8q9La8xaYew892MnuGA/iKkGFr2ecziHQwhXUNW4Zg)

This further proves that Facebook operates a political caste system for its users:
> You have people like me who are totally banned and considered "Dangerous Individuals."
>
> Then you have people who are friends with other users that Facebook has flagged as "extremists" who are frequently suspended.
>
> Those who post about COVID-19, MAGA, America First or even use the word "patriot" are censored on nearly every post.
>
> Then you have the leftist users who can threaten, dox and get away with posting pretty much any political speech they want even if it advocates for violence or supports terrorism.
>
> Finally, you have the VIP, "XCheck" members who can post literally anything, including explicit photos of rape accusers just as a Brazilian soccer star did in 2019.
On numerous occasions, Zuckerberg has appeared before Congress and blatantly lied to the American public while under oath. This is what you call perjury, and if he were an everyday person like me or you, he would be sent to prison.

But, because he's a billionaire, Democrat mega-donor, there's a separate set of rules for him just like Facebook's XCheck.

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/f255M8q9La8xaYew892MnuGA/iKkGFr2ecziHQwhXUNW4Zg)

The "community standards" that Facebook presents to lawmakers and the public is total B.S.

And to date, no one in our government has held them accountable!

Instead of joining together to repeal Section 230, lawmakers on both sides of the isle would rather sit around and go on Fox News and MSNBC and express their complaints about Facebook.

Even worse, these same people who constantly complain about Facebook are constantly giving the company money!

I just checked, and in the last 30 days alone, these Republican and Conservative accounts have PAID Facebook ABSURD amounts of money:
> The NRSC (National Republican Senate Committee) has spent $811,295 on Facebook!
>
> The GOP? $783,519!
>
> The America First Policy Institute, which fundraises off "social media bias" racked up $121,693 in advertising bills on Facebook. These are the same people who claim to be representing President Trump in his lawsuit against Facebook and Twitter. Why are they giving six figure sums to a company that banned President Trump and his supporters?
>
> Even Kevin McCarthy who has raised money on Big Tech Censorship and promised to reign them in, gave Facebook $92,000!
**And that 's money all spent on Facebook in the last 30 Days!!**

Imagine how much more money these same people will spend on Facebook by the end of the 2022 elections!

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/f255M8q9La8xaYew892MnuGA/iKkGFr2ecziHQwhXUNW4Zg)

And for full disclosure, I need to tell you how much I've spent on Facebook . . . **not a damn dime!**

When Republicans spend money with Facebook, they are only making the prison walls that hold them hostage stronger while proving themselves to be total hypocrites.

I won't be part of that, and I certainly don't want your donations going to Facebook. I want to STOP THE BIAS against conservatives, [**and you can help me do that by donating to fund my campaign today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/f255M8q9La8xaYew892MnuGA/iKkGFr2ecziHQwhXUNW4Zg)

Thank you for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

clean_body: Recently released Internal Facebook documents obtained by a Project Veritas whistleblower show that Zuckerberg and his company have been giving special account status to | | | Patriot, Recently released Internal Facebook documents obtained by a Project Veritas whistleblower show that Zuckerberg and his company have been giving special account status to 5.8 million users - including "animal influencer" Doug the Pug. The program, known as XCheck, turns off moderation for "VIP" accounts, letting them post pretty much whatever they want without censorship. Meanwhile, tens of millions of American conservatives are censored or banned on Facebook! This further proves that Facebook operates a political caste system for its users: You have people like me who are totally banned and considered "Dangerous Individuals." Then you have people who are friends with other users that Facebook has flagged as "extremists" who are frequently suspended. Those who post about COVID-19, MAGA, America First or even use the word "patriot" are censored on nearly every post. Then you have the leftist users who can threaten, dox and get away with posting pretty much any political speech they want even if it advocates for violence or supports terrorism. Finally, you have the VIP, "XCheck" members who can post literally anything, including explicit photos of rape accusers just as a Brazilian soccer star did in 2019. On numerous occasions, Zuckerberg has appeared before Congress and blatantly lied to the American public while under oath. This is what you call perjury, and if he were an everyday person like me or you, he would be sent to prison. But, because he's a billionaire, Democrat mega-donor, there's a separate set of rules for him just like Facebook's XCheck. The "community standards" that Facebook presents to lawmakers and the public is total B.S. And to date, no one in our government has held them accountable! Instead of joining together to repeal Section 230, lawmakers on both sides of the isle would rather sit around and go on Fox News and MSNBC and express their complaints about Facebook. Even worse, these same people who constantly complain about Facebook are constantly giving the company money! I just checked, and in the last 30 days alone, these Republican and Conservative accounts have PAID Facebook ABSURD amounts of money: The NRSC (National Republican Senate Committee) has spent $811,295 on Facebook! The GOP? $783,519! The America First Policy Institute, which fundraises off "social media bias" racked up $121,693 in advertising bills on Facebook. These are the same people who claim to be representing President Trump in his lawsuit against Facebook and Twitter. Why are they giving six figure sums to a company that banned President Trump and his supporters? Even Kevin McCarthy who has raised money on Big Tech Censorship and promised to reign them in, gave Facebook $92,000! And that 's money all spent on Facebook in the last 30 Days!! Imagine how much more money these same people will spend on Facebook by the end of the 2022 elections! And for full disclosure, I need to tell you how much I've spent on Facebook . . . not a damn dime! When Republicans spend money with Facebook, they are only making the prison walls that hold them hostage stronger while proving themselves to be total hypocrites. I won't be part of that, and I certainly don't want your donations going to Facebook. I want to STOP THE BIAS against conservatives, Thank you for all that you do. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: all eyes on us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2jdTQqBz9Mw1oLW4wtIsg1QF7fGj8a2jKSrfrLfug_c=/ETpyumHSaVxn_SXgFmYNZ2tGZM7Se7GC-gE8b-E4lvc=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210915-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

As of today, we're halfway through September, which means we are running out of time before the critical FEC end-of-quarter deadline.

At the end of the quarter, we have to report our fundraising numbers publicly. That means everyone -- from my multiple opponents to the outside groups running negative attack ads against me -- will have their eyes on us, hoping to see signs of weakness.

Luckily, this team has shown nothing but immense strength and growth, and I am confident that our quarterly fundraising report will reveal that once again. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: quick note from the finance team and me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The only way we can win is with lots of small online donations from people like you.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210915-2642-header&t=1&akid=2642%2E434096%2ENQJ9W9)
Peter, I wanted to reach out directly ahead of tonight's mid-month fundraising deadline.
The finance team has been working overtime to sort through the donor files of every Team Fetterman supporter. Here's something we noticed when we came across your name:
**According to our data, you've never chipped in to John Fetterman's campaign to fight for us in the U.S. Senate _— but there's never been a better opportunity to chip in than right now, with just a few hours before this crucial deadline._**
[_**What do you say, Peter? Any chance you could send $5 our way before midnight?**_](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30053?refcode=em20210915-2642&t=2&akid=2642%2E434096%2ENQJ9W9)
**_Peter's Official Team Fetterman Record_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2021 Donor:** No — not yet! **2021 Total:** $0.00 **Suggested Donation: $5** **[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30053?refcode=em20210915-2642&t=3&akid=2642%2E434096%2ENQJ9W9)**
---
It's not lost on my team and me that we come to you often to ask for your support on behalf of John, Gisele, and the entire Fetterman campaign team.
But the reality is that, if we want to continue being *the* winning grassroots campaign in a crowded race for the #1 Most Likely to Flip Senate seat of 2022, then we MUST raise as much money as possible before the Q3 FEC Deadline on September 30.
We absolutely have the team out there to make it happen. We’re doing this the right way, no corporate PACs allowed.
We've said it before but it bears repeating: **The only way we can win is with lots of small online donations from people like you.**
[**Will you donate $5 to help close the gap on our mid-month fundraising goal before midnight tonight? We're really hoping to see an uptick in donations before our deadline, so we hope you'll chip in if you can.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30053?refcode=em20210915-2642&t=4&akid=2642%2E434096%2ENQJ9W9)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30053?refcode=em20210915-2642&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2642%2E434096%2ENQJ9W9)**
Thank you so much!
Eric 💙
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210915-2642-footer&t=24&refcode2=2642_434096_NQJ9W9&akid=2642%2E434096%2ENQJ9W9)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2642%2E434096%2ENQJ9W9)

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: re: worst governor in the country
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]
Peter,
We have the worst COVID numbers in the country because we have the worst Governor in the country. Tennessee is not only leading the country in all-time COVID-19 infections, our lead is GROWING. Is this the "winning" that conservatives like to brag about? Because this is not a competition we want to win — it's at the expense of all of us.
Next year, we have the opportunity to vote him out of a job — to help us get there, a generous group of donors has agreed to match EVERY donation throughout the month up to our $50,000 end-of-quarter goal at the end of September.
Can you donate $25 now (which doubles to $50!) to help us get the edge on Bill Lee for 2022? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 → BECOMES $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25] DONATE $50 → BECOMES $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50] DONATE $100 → BECOMES $200 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100] DONATE $250 → BECOMES $500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250] DOUBLE ANOTHER GIFT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]I'm not going to lie, beating Bill Lee is going to be one of the hardest things we've ever done. The Republican money machine is unlimited, and they're pulling out all the stops to maintain power. But what they don't have is you — regular folks who want to see power back in the hands of working people.
Which is why we can't do this without you — will you help us meet our goal by donating now (and having your gift doubled!)? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Building Back Blue,
Hendrell Remus
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since winning.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35830154/306293731/859910255?amount=3&refcode=UD_20210915_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2NmNkYjRlLTYyMTYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G0pv-awa7wZHfASB_FFrHuAzHuV9v6xuWe22XUGPeAA=) Peter -

In just a moment, I am going to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign for the U.S. Senate and UniteDemocrats. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.

Here is the truth:

When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since taking office.

Now, that approach doesn’t make everyone happy. And we just learned of yet another right-wing dark money group running ads targeting me in Arizona.

So with our end-of-month deadline coming up, I am asking you to contribute $3 to help me fight back.

I know $3 doesn’t sound like the kind of money that can beat multi-million dollar ad campaigns targeting me, but by the time you got to this point in the email, someone else added their own $3. And they’re hoping you do the same.

It all adds up, and that’s how we win: together. So I am asking:

**[Can you please split a $3 contribution between my campaign and UniteDemocrats before this critical, end-of-quarter fundraising deadline comes to a close? That’s what I’ve done since winning. | = Peter - In just a moment, I am going to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign for the U.S. Senate and UniteDemocrats. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important. Here is the truth: When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since taking office. Now, that approach doesn’t make everyone happy. And we just learned of yet another right-wing dark money group running ads targeting me in Arizona. So with our end-of-month deadline coming up, I am asking you to contribute $3 to help me fight back. I know $3 doesn’t sound like the kind of money that can beat multi-million dollar ad campaigns targeting me, but by the time you got to this point in the email, someone else added their own $3. And they’re hoping you do the same. It all adds up, and that’s how we win: together. name: Nikki Fried
subject: I’m ready for this fight
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

With your help, we’re going to win this race and elect the first Democratic Governor in Florida since the 1990s. We’re also going to make history by electing Florida’s first woman Governor.

Today, I want to tell you about what that means to me and millions of women across Florida.

Since I was in college, I’ve been told to sit back and wait my turn. When I arrived at the University of Florida, I encountered a good old boys network that looks a lot like Florida’s capitol.

I fought back, and I won, becoming the first Jewish woman to serve as Student Body President.

When I became an attorney, plenty of men told me to stay quiet in the face of injustice and wait my turn.

Instead, I became a public defender to help give everyone a fair shot in our justice system. Then, I served as an advocate for children in need, working to pass legislation that provided the right to counsel for foster care kids with special needs.

People have underestimated me for my entire life. Let me be clear: I’m ready for this fight, and I’m ready to make history as Florida’s first woman Governor. But I can’t do it alone. If you’re in a position to support our movement, please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-personal-reflection]

Representation matters, but there’s much more at stake right now. As Florida’s GOP legislature plans to attack Roe v. Wade , women’s voices are more important than ever.

I’m ready to stand up and fight back: against Ron DeSantis, against anti-choice legislators, and against anyone who tells me to wait my turn.

We’re going to make history next year, but only with your help. If you can help us continue the fight with a contribution, it would mean the world to me. Please click here to donate now if you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-personal-reflection]

With Gratitude 🙏 💜

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Hannah Nayowith via Mondaire for Congress
subject: 🚨 Redistricting update 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

We have some bad news —
New York State’s independent redistricting commission just released a first draft of its Congressional map for 2022, and I’ll be honest: it’s not looking good for Mondaire.
Check it out:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35830519/306294786/451935881?refcode2=94528263-6316-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210915-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDUyODI2My02MzE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2gqp75v1Ep6GvaSQAn8az_v73cv21QZ8tgGprMbJxKQ=)
If this new map is implemented, Mondaire will have a much redder district. The map moves him into Trump Country — Putnam County, which is in our proposed district, went 54-46 for Trump. Rockland County, which Mondaire would largely retain, nearly went for Trump too: 50-49.
By saddling him with a much more Republican and much less diverse electorate, the proposed map makes Mondaire vulnerable to challenges in both primary and general elections. Securing reelection for Mondaire will be much more difficult and expensive.
**Republicans can do the math. So can we. **That’s why we’re setting a goal of $15,000 in the next 24 hours. It’s ambitious, but this team has stepped up to help us hit major goals in the past. So we’re asking:
**[Can you make a contribution today to help us meet our $15,000 goal so that Mondaire can stay competitive after redistricting? We wouldn’t ask if it weren’t so important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35830521/306294788/-271015136?refcode2=94528263-6316-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210915-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDUyODI2My02MzE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2gqp75v1Ep6GvaSQAn8az_v73cv21QZ8tgGprMbJxKQ=)**
This new map would leave us vulnerable to challenges in the primary election _and_ general election. Mondaire has already accomplished so much in his first eight months in office, and his work is just getting started.
But with your support — even if it’s just $5 or $10 — we’ll be prepared to compete and win no matter what.
Thank you for reading,
Hannah Nayowith
Campaign Manager

But Republicans aren’t backing down from Trump’s Big Lie. Now they’re holding hearings to try to overturn the 2020 election results with their sham “audit,” and they’re moving fast.

**[Today, I’m asking you: Can you split a donation of just $15 (more if you can) between my fight to stand up for democracy and Common Good VA to show Trump and his enablers that we’ll always stand up to their attempts to undermine our democracy? →](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi_0WJBo6BAkMCp9iLtv6G546dCAO3accpfLSS1MKuO2kbzxa9yQiArflwvnUJZHs7T5fw6kSE3ABCAMPemO_v-zfCa_uPsvPkUhP95WKiwHeLzk8tIeQpWe_77P1jsni0H4gz6W2-NNZrNHu2iid47HXVsKC2vwceh32j_KiU2_-VD4drHoQCCs4Nq2atSGP6pjIwYEd6dSYOuL6Z7brxY5yXuEVgsJl8PKhCWzC65Oop27opul_gp366DYXZsGsSYWV_eaHfowA32NlJ-untDqV62URepffIn0t69WvVnrDCMeFhs7_5NdefPvNbuB_0zCqgLNHOtqkfVwx-IHc2gOvzkG5v4W2FhHK6L4fOHKV3_poHJ_QNSHMYzq-o5E16rim9yfV4w3AK580qREE1BrM-DmmT8k7jbY-X-MetO_g/3fc/vbnB4EKCR7OzDGyC2RKFiQ/h2/pCqWZCkSAXWzkPCqtsKJgHYTDuDL_ipgqKX3Q6UrFuE)**

We need to do some serious truth-telling right now.

The 2020 election was free and fair, safe and secure. Two bipartisan, legal audits have already been conducted in Pennsylvania, and they proved that Joe Biden won fair and square.

These baseless attempts to overturn the 2020 election here in Pennsylvania are a dangerous attack on our democracy — and as Attorney General, I’ll always fight to protect it.

I want to show that Pennsylvanians are standing up to support our democracy in every corner of our Commonwealth. So I’m asking you to split a donation of just $15 between Common Good VA and my campaign today to show that voters are taking a stand for democracy.

“Lawmaker's rigged map would steal Ohioans’ right to representation.” |
Marcy Kaptur | |

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux5rTXePTq_zAzKi5TP0ML36Jgqch7WebAOEsfNF-BCigrAhcDYOUaceK1tM5uyV9tbfk2AGELVam0oxvY_DIqwXnSi2L1h3CTOh-WHMv6WYUbiozj_Z3DMj4daSyQcgq3XeEV8kIQNWW9XwuWG_rxZrxj5gdW3P1mA3R71MXuBEOlC72QiICVUgJdCkiV-8HA-bJI0dnOIaQ1J1MZpAOS-mEDaop2L9sEBou_fUgRgPRv07XpeaZxFeqY6SM3TnReI_CoDQTUCYm0AfWR7GkESw5QHUKZoB43f4sTnIZ3Atghm6cuFue0dekBfvNfNtnE1tHMVmnxWM1qeWSSYlFOSE/3fc/9_VhTx9NTIqeghyQNJy7fg/h0/NYcuJgxVIHgzlX6Dl8Cx5H807BV_A_a16sMhttg2VZI)

| | Team,

**These headlines _merely_ scratch the surface of what’s happening in Ohio --** [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux5rTXePTq_zAzKi5TP0ML36Jgqch7WebAOEsfNF-BCigrAhcDYOUaceK1tM5uyV9tQehK8A1Bz1tMqMrToyL_G2bJkH0R6N2AtOsU0W12GEi6n1UaPvr2shOdfff65xbLYNvBrjC9O1cMUuktxnSTtKQ7tt8eXM9nlk-GBhmzXH67gaJhnuZH_j1xRwgDl0zeuSvieJGmEi9ohtApGLt1r9RMXHvnAq8FTRsZqaIJtZXgIKehVvujwz9kH2FqciAXMJL7FWTU8kesxc3vSttikZbdQpm8k6wQ-9ZjWz806qh-iv9oGL8EnGXyEXsd_V8XR_bPREIwKdp55ZzceUkGmI/3fc/9_VhTx9NTIqeghyQNJy7fg/h1/sCnG1TwsV_VDGifwGYmzz8VRG1MhDCTUHkHjzdozHrc)
If the GOP succeeds in **drawing unfair, partisan maps,** the people of Ohio will face unprecedented repercussions.

**These proposed maps are the _very definition_ of gerrymandering.** They are taking our districts, slicing them up, and concentrating the voting strength of the Republican Party in the districts they need to win -- **suppressing the voices** of those who don’t vote in line with the GOP.

Ohioans could be **forced into this plan for the next 10 years.** Unfairly locking in _deeply-red_ districts for that many years will _discourage_ voter participation for an **entire decade** or more.

We deserve fair districts that follow the law and accurately represent the people of Ohio. That is why it’s more important than ever that we send Rep. Marcy Kaptur back to Congress.

**Marcy Kaptur fights for local communities. Her dedication to strengthening Northern Ohio’s economy gives working Americans a fair chance and supports the middle class.**

**[Can you chip in $20 today to help Marcy keep her seat in Congress to continue the fight for Northern Ohio?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCEkdHNItV39y3s-lvKgkMA4wdHHN35CFRCbAMDF5yZdLFlqmtyf_jtqj-bA0azI-rbhm_Z8ejR25J51mz35rezEllFMlP7nsXA7mSQ-zzCdPHAhWvpMFeJukobPkDZtknB0IQecWg1brjB-8L2gHn0LeAOlw95q8xz0ZmQiBVwba5leJCP_FdnrhoNzaaS7L4LUIXFitpjtU3Woi9jZXdqb8pOSyhy65iSEDzWfz3U7KEaie0ExF2XEXJK4yy2mH4vhlXrY8hpm9d0OMkaKoOrgQ9ohY9lb1Qs3Ur9oYywSBaA3zoNOkspLT2h8l_VqEdBitZ-eEH6dKnzvwMsaQ7WUaP53blUzcdIlk4UnFsRSyk4ljgYNhp9qCHl31viAmQ/3fc/9_VhTx9NTIqeghyQNJy7fg/h2/EKMoHjzva3pbugY3NuYUqcP66GJWAZXHGqWRdbBY2hA)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**Donate $10 »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCEkdHNItV39y3s-lvKgkMA4wdHHN35CFRCbAMDF5yZdKKQ8_q_i-5MU1_3bqsfJJXUBHXKK1rjjAk0WLtd_1MCAhdfq8WyADI4-hlzzcPW_1XxUiKKyYz8Wp7yqLTEzubO5fQtwPxsiEbhG9hGrCyu8c9FbjqgXPmTNw_QwV_p3aRy_aFeYUNfekJuxjb43qoWbTC2awTTkiDQJtKnQhT07UoHknsj-7aglwr4raH8LRJ-KeV5Yxkcus5Zq6g8hbwrcyY4qaIuNWJreV9YH3yarQW-ORtfeTrCJGK6YcCkHg_PZUBREYcBIOhFnOUVDqTvNU7ctPoXZzaHqZf49QSMsDnKWxfa1HNy-Ea0HPAZvG5JgwBoRGbClYI9d_bWw_a/3fc/9_VhTx9NTIqeghyQNJy7fg/h3/hsM19leazfBMPeGy0ktyUssjakdeCkoZirgDE3JvSHs)

clean_body: “Lawmaker's rigged map would steal Ohioans’ right to representation.” | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Team, These headlines merely scratch the surface of what’s happening in Ohio -- If the GOP succeeds in drawing unfair, partisan maps, the people of Ohio will face unprecedented repercussions. These proposed maps are the very definition of gerrymandering. They are taking our districts, slicing them up, and concentrating the voting strength of the Republican Party in the districts they need to win -- suppressing the voices of those who don’t vote in line with the GOP. Ohioans could be forced into this plan for the next 10 years. Unfairly locking in deeply-red districts for that many years will discourage voter participation for an entire decade or more. We deserve fair districts that follow the law and accurately represent the people of Ohio. That is why it’s more important than ever that we send Rep. Marcy Kaptur back to Congress. Marcy Kaptur fights for local communities. Her dedication to strengthening Northern Ohio’s economy gives working Americans a fair chance and supports the middle class. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | Together, we can continue to make history, \-- Team Kaptur Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. Can you help us send Marcy Kaptur back to Congress? ****** | **** **** **** **** | | Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress Checks may be mailed to: P.O. Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697, United States | | | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Marcy Kaptur for Congress, please .
