body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ryIgZGxEVLTlr452VqOjPp46wHLTxvbXVfUckqDIx9pE3d1KQ5LrihI-gByMPG_nOOi2_ZPLE8t7kKC7OSt4b131ZNBjIYeBsaGrSIkP6mUq61RW7Bhzx2U438KbFdw-m199Jc5iSSedAe_gIxIPOsBbblH4V5N5r26mKGl3Ou95jtPUoRgnrA==&c=ALRvqTNPPT8gAKWl0-jn9ODNUSfryhPCHhUjbWSA59uhfmAoekHZwA==&ch=CwZmqDdm_WUN9MzdbGusjnk-poxL3P_MgCsI8s5DH38C3zrl21OGFA==)

| Peter,
Yesterday, the [Washington Post](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ryIgZGxEVLTlr452VqOjPp46wHLTxvbXVfUckqDIx9pE3d1KQ5Lrihp_zHOSRRb7aCg64kzQUx6KGT_CG-rjbzhG0Fq2ZbJXJKKJdRTujvDzSZm3vq15m9u3uzdDcg_Sne452-pcKZhrXGzgr_et8olgQl1u3KMoRtPGSNDVTqQrfS-YDhg1xYz1UzAAIJERCw0vFTrJdA0GjP-fwJSTTaR8CHPaMMyBUY-JsdDsTmtU6NHmwcoTkg==&c=ALRvqTNPPT8gAKWl0-jn9ODNUSfryhPCHhUjbWSA59uhfmAoekHZwA==&ch=CwZmqDdm_WUN9MzdbGusjnk-poxL3P_MgCsI8s5DH38C3zrl21OGFA==)[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ryIgZGxEVLTlr452VqOjPp46wHLTxvbXVfUckqDIx9pE3d1KQ5Lrihp_zHOSRRb7aCg64kzQUx6KGT_CG-rjbzhG0Fq2ZbJXJKKJdRTujvDzSZm3vq15m9u3uzdDcg_Sne452-pcKZhrXGzgr_et8olgQl1u3KMoRtPGSNDVTqQrfS-YDhg1xYz1UzAAIJERCw0vFTrJdA0GjP-fwJSTTaR8CHPaMMyBUY-JsdDsTmtU6NHmwcoTkg==&c=ALRvqTNPPT8gAKWl0-jn9ODNUSfryhPCHhUjbWSA59uhfmAoekHZwA==&ch=CwZmqDdm_WUN9MzdbGusjnk-poxL3P_MgCsI8s5DH38C3zrl21OGFA==)broke a story that General Mark Milley made a call to his Chinese counterpart, Army General Li Zuocheng, that he would alert the CCP if President Donald Trump planned to launch an attack before Biden took office.
These reports need to be investigated and if they are accurate, Milley committed an act of treason.
---

| Only a political opportunist would turn on their country for perceived personal gain with a communist regime. His actions are a betrayal to every American citizen and every member of the armed forces who has worn a uniform from Bunker Hill to Afghanistan.
This new report comes on the heels of Milley's botched exit from Afghanistan, further proving he is unfit to lead and derelict in his sworn duty to serve the United States of America. Milley should resign.
***
This past weekend our nation commemorated the 20th anniversary of the September 11th terrorist attacks. I was honored with the opportunity to speak at the Brooklyn, OH memorial ceremony. We must never forget that tragic day and it's up to us to pass along our memories to the next generation.

All year we’ve been seeing one natural disaster after the other — the Gulf of Mexico was on fire, wildfires are destroying millions of acres of land, hurricanes have been creating devastating destruction, and our towns and cities were underwater from floods.

**But, here’s the thing:** it could get even worse. We need to act now to avoid the worst impacts of climate change.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Did you catch huge endorsement?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Picking up big momentum |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=203c156f02&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the proud America First Patriot leading the charge in America’s audit and Election integrity around the country.

**And President Trump just endorsed my campaign for Secretary of State of Arizona.**

>From the very beginning I backed President Trump. From the very beginning I KNEW that Arizona was stolen from President Trump by the conniving Democrats in the coup of the millennium. I paid for the initial hearings out of pocket and I spoke up when others were silent.
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b423131545&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _Look at what President Trump had to say:_

**_“It is my great honor to endorse a true warrior, Representative Mark Finchem, of the Great State of Arizona, for the position of Secretary of State. He is a patriot who has fought for our Country right from his earliest moments in government. Mark was willing to say what few others had the courage to say. In addition to his incredibly powerful stance on the massive Voter Fraud that took place in the 2020 Presidential Election Scam, he is strong on Crime, Borders, our currently under siege Second Amendment, and loves our Military and our Vets. Mark will also be fighting hard for further Tax and Regulation Cuts. Mark Finchem has my Complete and Total Endorsement. He will never let the people of Arizona down!” – President Trump_**

Thank you, President Trump for your endorsement. You are leading the way on restoring election integrity. I am truly honored to be recognized for the hard work I put in and will continue to do to restore the integrity of our elections.

This is huge news. This is not only a validation of all of our good work in Arizona but this is a STRONG statement that the Fake News Media can’t cover up. We have the President on our side in Arizona.

**_And now with President Trump, and your continued support, there is nothing that can stop America’s Audit going NATIONAL._**

This is why I am writing you _urgently_ today. This is a tremendous opportunity to strike a blow to the Radical Left who stole the election in 2020. But to take advantage,_[I need your support now to press the attack.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6eeee0f322&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=712c9599db&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| ***JOIN ME AND PRESIDENT TRUMP***
In 2022, the Secretary of State Races will be the most critical to watch. Despite the fact that we are about to drop HUGE news from the Maricopa Audit, the good work that we do in Arizona can only be CEMENTED when we have an America First Patriot overseeing the elections, not a Corrupt Leftist like Katie Hobbs!

**_And that is exactly what I will do as Secretary of State in Arizona. I will never let the people of Arizona down!_**

But there are already attacks from all sides, and we _only expect those to increase_!
**Legal attacks, media attacks, political attacks. **At this point, I wake up expecting a new one.

**And now with President Trump validating and joining our movement in Arizona, nothing can stop us.**

[_But I need your help. Donate TODAY to join me and President Trump in restoring election integrity around the country!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=88f847609f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=878ecc393b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| I am proud to go on record stating that there is more than enough evidence to show clear and convincing fraud in 2020.

**It is our duty to recall the electors and Arizona MUST decertify the 2020 election results.**

_This is the only way to stop election fraud in the future. This is the only way to fight back against the unjust, incompetent, and evil coup of a Presidency that is the Joe Biden administration. [Join the fight today!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f100a21bef&e=44b8c466b0)_
[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4728369f61&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=62b0ec0a84&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. President Trump just endorsed my campaign. We must raise what is needed to defeat the corrupt Democrats. I have to raise $75k by the end of this month to meet my fundraising numbers. [Will you contribute $15, $35, $100 or more to help me get there?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a96ef3b319&e=44b8c466b0) Every amount helps!

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=4aa8228269) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=4aa8228269).

name: Unite the Country
subject: [RESPONSE NEEDED]: President Biden’s job performance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [unitethecountry
body:

name: Karen Bass
subject: re: The GOP recall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
I have good news, friend.

Yesterday, California voters came together and voted NO on the sham recall election. Democratic Governor Gavin Newsom thankfully remains governor, putting a stop to the right-wing, anti-science opponents running to replace him.

But the fight isn't over. National Republicans lied about Trump winning the 2020 election, and now, they're at it again. Even before polls closed, GOP leaders were pushing baseless claims of fraud in the recall race.

The California recall is just the beginning of this Republican charade, team. The GOP's new normal of fear-mongering and sowing division doesn't stop here, so I am fighting in Congress to defend our democracy and our voting rights -- and I need your help.

**[Can you make a contribution right now to help me keep fighting to protect our democracy from corruption in Congress? If you're able, please donate what you can now. This work isn't possible without you.](https://act.myngp.com/el/NdsdbJLqZhVi_OtiZ_0iYy-DsBFk1WEWMHk92KMom-E=/k-R4Y0WddKH-8ZWsg_zCd2kZqScm9wsWiQoPtiSiaBs=?ms=em21_210915_news_fndd_gq_act_win_kb_ettx_alask1&source=em21_210915_news_fndd_gq_act_win_kb_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_210915_news_fndd_gq_act_win_kb_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

body:

I know you’re busy Peter, so I’m going to make this quick.

**Conservatives like you make up the backbone of the Republican party.** **That means if you don’t help re-elect Donald Trump in 2024, then no one will.**

**I’m only going to ask once;** [**do you want Donald Trump to be our President again?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=afb18ccec2804699b76215997bb597cb&_e=8Gbbyq5mE3_z6h7muPwtvM0cJ9gEd7r9isIln8FyDq1Mdp_JN6nl1S2pacX5YH7Fbhql8MIhyHMnmJcJfDM9zcQf4KlCwFmwUZPOKEQajYUSdeZDZ9TuFd_9wnnVVhQw-TZ3_E0GG_scc0GD6w-yPlCNuhjazX9Qwl_HUgJwwOZZuh6tifGNXrUAAEK0hMhFwAXjLymyk45xi3HY6xCMdQBQi5FGFCUDp9RPxl1iHr-7IA3Itg9mIXPwPduT8YRFtY50vK1sdwiY9jefUT4mHB4jqJAkI25j74x8R2314xOlidq2g-d7mLjNrqOW8-coIZ7SxyxLU-m405GtVbw6NpMcpWv85qPlgRoj9Dyebc9TYK30wBUiZ9zMSYV8BUR_XHvCtXzftBlP7r0theaf1ZQWrhILsITZxekvAgrUZSImGXQdCHWyW7e0bf6qdcFm)

[** ****Yes, America needs Donald Trump! **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=afb18ccec2804699b76215997bb597cb&_e=8Gbbyq5mE3_z6h7muPwtvM0cJ9gEd7r9isIln8FyDq1Mdp_JN6nl1S2pacX5YH7Fbhql8MIhyHMnmJcJfDM9zcQf4KlCwFmwUZPOKEQajYUSdeZDZ9TuFd_9wnnVVhQw-TZ3_E0GG_scc0GD6w-yPlCNuhjazX9Qwl_HUgJwwOZZuh6tifGNXrUAAEK0hMhFwAXjLymyk45xi3HY6xCMdQBQi5FGFCUDp9RPxl1iHr_2U6xNXMhx7cOWD7CFz8hNJ-ulu186GGRPb9d7JJ7jucF2Ngi78Dae3akMrdGuedRFR3BeNBnWhqKOjMfi54VbaANqOu9HJSYx-K6k0O4dzr7X7_5vp4GKZ5Izz0W1rIZ-4WKHfiiKLRMRnEX2VW6U8FCeSnVQQD0LqwZItpbtx0WqLR2Q6jMDC5Fn4cPFdztnUmsqRg63PfN3K6WYhXuE)
[** ****No, I like how Joe Biden and the Democrats are running this country! **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=afb18ccec2804699b76215997bb597cb&_e=8Gbbyq5mE3_z6h7muPwtvM0cJ9gEd7r9isIln8FyDq1Mdp_JN6nl1S2pacX5YH7Fbhql8MIhyHMnmJcJfDM9zcQf4KlCwFmwUZPOKEQajYUSdeZDZ9TuFd_9wnnVVhQw-TZ3_E0GG_scc0GD6w-yPlCNuhjazX9Qwl_HUgJwwOZZuh6tifGNXrUAAEK0hMhFwAXjLymyk45xi3HY6xCMdQBQi5FGFCUDp9RPxl1iHr9UYOqldV09kUMKiOkNWW7MAZx-TZDBh-zDX7Pa5MDXsqYhHqq95qSSa24vScDsan8MwxGC2eKJqS7B-pUvIH0E5F4ddGg6XiRL37X1XbCRWmHGaJo1qBiUScE-h6TqHZybK595ufNMnC1EqgdrpIyRE_ESMIcCVeKtRpD5tCM1pd08_RvQNfsYB45UL1AJ1-wfvHOazn7qb-fEZtTLWlsA)
If you support re-electing Donald Trump, then thank you for your time and help in getting our nation back on track.

**If you don’t,** _**then too bad because we’re going to make sure he gets re-elected anyway.**_

**God Bless and have a great day!**

**\-- Sheriff Joe Arpaio**

name: John Stossel
subject: How you and I can overthrow the fake news media
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Center for Independent Thought
body:
I have watched the mainstream media transform into a merchant of half-truths, woke propaganda, and a non-stop push for bigger go

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z5b12k8jgm9mn1ek4l6v64sbeicr8pr9psr4espg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4ctj69or2clh2bs)

Friend,

I have watched the mainstream media transform into a merchant of half-truths, woke propaganda, and a non-stop push for bigger government. **I need your help to push back.**

**_I left my ABC News job because they resisted my attempts to report on unintended consequences of big government programs_**. They wouldn't let me explain how free market capitalism was saving lives and lifting billions out of poverty.

Fox News let me, but after 7 years, I gave up my show on FBN because I wanted to reach younger people, people who haven't already made up their minds.

That is why I created **Stossel TV and partnered with Center for Independent Thought.**

Stossel TV has produced more than 400 videos explaining the benefits of free markets and the harm done by big government. Thanks to social media, we don't need TV networks anymore. Young people don't watch Fox or CNN. They surf the web and get their news from Facebook, YouTube, Instagram, Twitter, etc.

A surprise benefit of posting video on the internet is that our videos keep finding new viewers. We've gotten more than 450 million views.

[**You can help Stossel TV reach millions of people by making a donation today. Please click here or one of the links below to donate >>>**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zs9n2s24itsumqmhoqs69a541m1jg1qvpk0vordo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4ctj69or2clh2bs)

[**Donate $20.22 >>>**
**Donate $50 >>>**
**Donate $100 >>>**
**Donate $250 >>>**
**Donate $500 >>>**
**Donate $1,000 >>>**
**Donate $5,000 >>>**
**Donate ANY Amount >>>**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zdte6nhta1bpvet6j3u6q5fs9k7ftos1ua37hj6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4ctj69or2clh2bs)

My reporting is different from most news on cable and the networks. Most of that is "Donald Trump said today ... !" "Congress just passed ... " "Biden will promise ... " At a time when media is polarizing and politicized, Stossel TV maintains journalistic integrity by covering topics such as Socialism vs. Capitalism, Anti-racist Racists, and Social Media Censorship. We challenge the alarmism that demands more regulations.

These topics remain important year after year, election cycle after election cycle, and that's why our videos keep finding new viewers.

This allows more people to keep learning the truth--years after the video was first released.

**Stossel TV 's rapidly growing views demonstrate people want to hear the facts and think for themselves--despite mainstream media's pro-government, anti-business bias. **

[**Please help me spread our message of free markets, civil liberties, and individualism by making a donation today >>>**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zcva2a1nlrgihfch39iavfncj4dcgriv6pdtfbn8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4ctj69or2clh2bs)

Your donation will help me produce more videos, reach more viewers, and expose the truth about the corrupt media, government, and political elites.

[**Please click here to make a donation.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z84j6mdvabbg7oud6lpk51oqj6dsc1et8q56dce8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4ctj69or2clh2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

In liberty,

We've gotten more than 450 million views. My reporting is different from most news on cable and the networks. Most of that is "Donald Trump said today ... !" "Congress just passed ... " "Biden will promise ... " At a time when media is polarizing and politicized, Stossel TV maintains journalistic integrity by covering topics such as Socialism vs. Capitalism, Anti-racist Racists, and Social Media Censorship. We challenge the alarmism that demands more regulations. These topics remain important year after year, election cycle after election cycle, and that's why our videos keep finding new viewers. This allows more people to keep learning the truth--years after the video was first released. Stossel TV 's rapidly growing views demonstrate people want to hear the facts and think for themselves--despite mainstream media's pro-government, anti-business bias. Your donation will help me produce more videos, reach more viewers, and expose the truth about the corrupt media, government, and political elites. Thank you, Friend. In liberty, John Stossel Journalist - Stossel TV Center for Independent Thought Paid for by Center for Independent Thought | This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central MATERIAL CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: You should assume that the sender of this email has an affiliate relationship and/or another material connection to the persons or businesses mentioned in this message and may receive commissions from purchases you make on subsequent web sites. name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: Leave no man behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58335958:JXFaCy2QN:m:1:3253819041:1115BB0DD88D5EE4A9B3150F160147D0:r)
---
| Peter, 11 years ago this week, when I was serving as a bomb technician under Joint Special Operations Command in the Army, my life changed forever. I lost both legs and a finger when a roadside bomb blew up beneath me while in the Kandahar region of Afghanistan.

If it weren't for the bravery and selflessness of my fellow soldiers, and the grace of God, _I very well could have lost my life_.

What I remember most clearly from that day is my fellow soldiers sprinting towards the bomb instead of away from my motionless body. They rushed in the direction where an explosive device had just detonated, putting their own lives in danger to save mine.

While I may have lost my ability to continue being an asset on the battlefield that day, I didn't lose my drive to keep fighting for our amazing country. So, I learned to walk again, graduated from college and set my sights on a new mission: restoring America First greatness to the United States.

On this anniversary of that explosion, will you help me win this latest battle for the future of our country?
---
| [JOIN THE FIGHT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58335958:JXFaCy2QN:m:1:3253819041:1115BB0DD88D5EE4A9B3150F160147D0:r "JOIN THE FIGHT")
---
| I wouldn't be alive today if it weren't for the most solemn of mantras: leave no man behind.

Unfortunately, Joe Biden has done the exact opposite. He has abandoned Americans and our allies in Afghanistan, and in doing so, he has betrayed the men and women I served alongside.

**His behavior is completely unforgivable, and as a result, Joe Biden does not deserve to have the words "commander" or "chief" anywhere in his title.

If you agree, please help me hold Joe Biden accountable for his betrayal and stop his disastrous America Last agenda:**
---
| [DONATE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58335959:JXFaCy2QN:m:1:3253819041:1115BB0DD88D5EE4A9B3150F160147D0:r "DONATE $25")

---

| [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58335958:JXFaCy2QN:m:1:3253819041:1115BB0DD88D5EE4A9B3150F160147D0:r "DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT")
---
| I want to thank you all from the bottom of my heart for your support in letting me continue my service to our country in Congress. My prosthetic legs may hold me back from serving on the battlefield in Afghanistan, but I will always serve you and the America First movement in Congress with everything I've got!
---

name: Brianna Mast
subject: Please, can you help me?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
You may have heard of my husband Brian Mast. He currently serves as a Republican Congressman from Florida [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8775%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=1u1IzVPi1RadFo7H%2bwv67Q&sysid=1)
|
---
| | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03486%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EI7Tx82dHVk0AiVHUZdguw&sysid=1)
---
| Friend, You may have heard of my husband Brian Mast. He currently serves as a Republican Congressman from Florida where he has been fighting to keep our communities safe and ensure the best possible future for our children.

What you might not know is that Brian was deployed to Afghanistan when our first child was just 4 months old. There, he was blown up by a bomb planted by terrorists. I feared the worst: that our beautiful little boy was going to go through life never knowing his father.

By the grace of God, though, Brian survived. He lost two legs and a finger, learned to walk again on prosthetics and has been the most amazing father I can imagine for our (now four) little munchkins.
---
| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03486%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EI7Tx82dHVk0AiVHUZdguw&sysid=1)
---
| I was by Brian’s side during the long and exhausting days of his recovery. I saw in him a drive and passion to not let his best service to our nation be behind him.

When Joe Biden abandoned Americans and our allies in Afghanistan, it brought all of those memories rushing back. Like it has for so many veterans, this past month has made Brian question whether all the bloodshed and sacrifice was worth it.

On top of that, this week marks the 11-year anniversary of the day Brian was blown up. In our family, it is usually a moment for celebration: we call it his “Alive Day.” This year, though, that day feels a little bit different for Brian.

You see, he has been working overtime to help get Americans and the Afghans that he served with out of the country. Brian is determined to help them, even if Joe Biden won’t.

But as a result, I’m told that there has been less time for fundraising this quarter, and he is behind where he needs to be to set up a winning campaign. His next election will likely cost millions of dollars, but Brian is determined to spend his time helping those he served with instead of hosting fundraisers.

That’s why I told Brian I would help him raise $10,000 toward his end of quarter fundraising goal. I’m hoping you’ll help me with a contribution of [$5](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03487%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IiJdh1DWFb%2byBAxRZBk4qw&sysid=1), [$15](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03488%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ss8ShLv%2bELNqTAzu2SEjlQ&sysid=1), [$35](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03489%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G72vAJH6Kk3Z7QnrHadnEQ&sysid=1), [$50](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03480%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JN2Nz86oTowJkuyWTaZ2Ww&sysid=1), [$100](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03481%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fj3EhgHmIBylDzB6iC2Oeg&sysid=1), or [any amount you can afford](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03482%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mAC4SVyDymGBqhy2avuqWQ&sysid=1).

I don’t want to let Brian down, and I want to show him that his sacrifices were not in vain! Your support would mean so much to Brian and me so he can continue doing what he does best: helping others.
---
| [SEND BRIAN YOUR SUPPORT](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03483%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BOySUcQKbCB94zm3lfUH%2fg&sysid=1 "SEND BRIAN YOUR SUPPORT")
---
| Brian loves his job, and he is proud of his mission to serve the American people. He’s always been there for us, even sacrificing two legs and a finger, so I hope you will consider being there for him now.

Brian and I will be proud to have you on our team, and I will be so grateful when your support arrives!

Sincerely,
Brianna Mast
---
| | | | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03484%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fbUqCEeu2yHcOzD6oqlWmA&sysid=1)
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c03495%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WSxg2D3Rg8sjsDk9uGj7KA&sysid=1)
---
| | PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
---

subject: The Cook Political Report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:

All eyes are on Wisconsin right now. This will be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the entire country. It’s critical we capitalize on this momentum, so we’re asking:

**Can you donate $10 to help us flip Wisconsin blue and expand the Senate majority? We have an important FEC fundraising deadline coming up, and we’re trying to reach 2,000 grassroots donors in the next few hours to stay on track for our goals. Major election forecasters are saying we’re one of the Democrats’ best chances to flip a Senate seat, they’re calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable GOP incumbent, and saying Wisconsin will be a battleground in 2022. But we can’t take anything for granted.

National Republicans are plotting and planning ways to keep this seat red. Ron Johnson raised more than any other Democrat in the race last quarter and Mitch McConnell has millions more to spend at a moment’s notice.

We need your help to build the necessary resources to fight back against the attacks we’re already fielding from Ron Johnson and the Republicans. They're only going to ramp up from here on out, especially now that this race has been upgraded!

[**Donate $10 (or more!) right now to help us give Ron Johnson the boot, flip this Senate seat blue, and expand the majority for Democrats.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35835552/306302102/-623328154?gpsid=50_130_20394&refcode=em21_210915_MM5_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210915_MM5_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTg3OTJmYi02OTE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SN7LjtqVxcSG2yFmo9wBM99fbeG4bX9FOoiLQKjzEmQ=)

Sarah Godlewski isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means small-dollar grassroots donors are the real power behind this campaign. And if we're going to defeat Ron Johnson and his special interest allies, we need a groundswell of support to get the job done.

With your help, we can overcome all of the attacks and large sums of money the Republicans will throw at our campaign in the months ahead. Let’s do this.

For Wisconsin, for our country. Thanks!

— Team Sarah

clean_body: Some news: The Cook Political Report upgraded Wisconsin’s Senate race from “lean Republican” to “toss-up.” All eyes are on Wisconsin right now. This will be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the entire country. It’s critical we capitalize on this momentum, so we’re asking: Can you donate $10 to help us flip Wisconsin blue and expand the Senate majority? We have an important FEC fundraising deadline coming up, and we’re trying to reach 2,000 grassroots donors in the next few hours to stay on track for our goals. Add your donation right here: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Major election forecasters are saying we’re one of the Democrats’ best chances to flip a Senate seat, they’re calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable GOP incumbent, and saying Wisconsin will be a battleground in 2022. But we can’t take anything for granted. National Republicans are plotting and planning ways to keep this seat red. Ron Johnson raised more than any other Democrat in the race last quarter and Mitch McConnell has millions more to spend at a moment’s notice. We need your help to build the necessary resources to fight back against the attacks we’re already fielding from Ron Johnson and the Republicans. They're only going to ramp up from here on out, especially now that this race has been upgraded! = Sarah Godlewski isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means small-dollar grassroots donors are the real power behind this campaign. And if we're going to defeat Ron Johnson and his special interest allies, we need a groundswell of support to get the job done. With your help, we can overcome all of the attacks and large sums of money the Republicans will throw at our campaign in the months ahead. Let’s do this. For Wisconsin, for our country. Thanks! — Team Sarah Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put hard-working Wisconsin families first. She's the only Democrat in this race who has won statewide twice. With your help, she can defeat Ron Johnson, too. Chip in to join our grassroots campaign: | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

name: Bennet HQ
subject: re: the Child Tax Credit expansion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35837507/306304667/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTdhOTQyMy02YzE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K3ZT5cq0wxVbSDgZpNMSQlVUQvNve4Zta-8ZmmHN0Dk=)
Today, families in Colorado and nationwide are receiving another monthly payment thanks to Michael’s work to expand the Child Tax Credit. This payment marks the halfway point of the temporary expansion that expires in December. With just three months left, Michael’s work to extend this tax cut is more critical than ever. The temporarily expanded Child Tax Credit has helped one million Colorado children. We kept three million children nationwide out of poverty with the first round of payments alone. Here’s how it’s helping folks in our state: _“[The Child Tax Credit] helped my daughter pay for summer day camps for my two granddaughters.” _ _— Barbara H, Denver_ _“I... don't have children but have a huge community of young families in my life who live at the edge of poverty. This CTC has been great for them. I hope it becomes permanent.”_ _— Deborah B, Boulder_ Michael is back in Washington, D.C. fighting to extend the expanded Child Tax Credit for years to come because far too many parents in Colorado and across the country are working multiple jobs while struggling to lift their children out of poverty. body:
The climate crisis isn’t some distant worry for another day. It is here now and we need to act.
#
Peter,
**Wildfires. Drought. Heatwaves.** Here in Washington state, we are not only seeing these headlines, we’re dealing with the devastating impacts of extreme weather in our communities.
In the Senate, Patty Murray is fighting hard for Washington state -- and places all across the country -- to get crucial funding to make communities more resilient, mitigate future damage, and begin to reduce emissions.
**Right now, we have the opportunity to include funds for climate action in the Senate’s Build Back Better budget.** Patty urgently needs supporters like you to step up and add your voice to this fight.
**[Add your name right now to call on the Senate to include climate action in the budget.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35837657/306305050/-151823271?ms=pm_em_210915_1&refcode=pm_em_210915_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODk5NDM4NS02YzE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L8TXM8Ve0M0BbpFTPeIk_Viy3MHCA3e0JF7jKvSYCvw=&emci=79654184-3e16-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=b8994385-6c16-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=13116610)**
The climate crisis isn’t some distant worry for another day. It is here now -- and this summer’s heat dome and wildfires in Washington state provide a clear example of why we need to act.
We know we can count on Senator Murray to keep fighting for action on the climate crisis -- but in order to get these priorities over the finish line, she needs a huge wave of grassroots support.
**[Peter, will you sign the petition now to demand action on the climate crisis?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35837658/306305051/-151823271?ms=pm_em_210915_1&refcode=pm_em_210915_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODk5NDM4NS02YzE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L8TXM8Ve0M0BbpFTPeIk_Viy3MHCA3e0JF7jKvSYCvw=&emci=79654184-3e16-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=b8994385-6c16-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=13116610)**

Team Patty

body:
Sorry not sorry. We’re making unapologetically bold and aggressive moves. Are you with us?

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35837965/306305941/1300596418?refcode=210915_FR_midmonth2btexpyi-a_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwMjgwZGM0LTZkMTYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JWRI8YYcYMUlvglSwAd0iApejKrpHqghJLscEutjdXQ=)
---
Happy Hump Day, Peter!

But it’s not just Hump Day because it’s a Wednesday. Today also marks the “hump” or middle of this month. And you know what that means: **We have a critical fundraising deadline at midnight.**

This is our most aggressive and bold mid-month goal yet. But six months into the creation of these PACs, we’re making aggressive and bold moves every day. So we need to keep up our numbers if we’re going to continue growing our audacious movement.

| | | **[We need to move NOW. Republicans have raised a RECORD-BREAKING $79.1 MILLION this year -- and now have $7.5 million more in the bank than we do. Make no mistake: They'll use every last cent to attack our House Democrats and defeat our Majority, so we must rise up like never before to fight back and turn the tide. Can you chip in $3 before our 12-hour Mid Month Deadline to defend our House Majority? EVERYTHING is on the line >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/vWPEQ94q4-)**

We don't have a moment to spare.

**FIRST: **

President Biden called on us to protect our House Majority with everything we've got:

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

**BUT THEN:**

National Republicans broke FIVE monthly fundraising records in a row -- _and now have $7.5 MILLION more at their disposal than our Democrats!_

**SO NOW:**

**[We're calling for an IMMEDIATE surge of support to stop this Republican momentum in its tracks, turn the tide, and DEFEND our House Majority once and for all. Can we count on your $3 before our Mid Month Deadline?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)**

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Did you See Joe Biden's New Plan to Increase Taxes?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Did you see Joe Biden and the Democrat's new proposal to increase your taxes?
Even as we continue to see disappointing job growth, Joe Biden and House
Democrats want to tax millions of Americans and further harm our economy.
Their recently proposed plan will raise individual tax brackets and drastically
increase taxes on businesses by record amounts, further crippling small
businesses in Houston that are already struggling to operate in a post-pandemic
economy. Joe Biden and House Democrats are also targeting the 2.5 million jobs
the oil and gas industry provides Texas, and especially Houston, with billions
of dollars worth of new taxes and increased regulation on the industry.
These dramatic tax increases, combined with record high inflation, are the
direct result of Joe Biden and Democrats in Washington, who would rather reward
their private interest allies than support struggling Americans by helping them
keep more of their own money.

Sincerely,

Wesley Hunt

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe
<http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=afc085f051c346e785fc6a87b0ba36fb&_t=Fs268cRB6JFZuNB9prFtt1WPnnklw0sFDwVX4aOlDrdE-TdfEqKHHfUUMNAm35DPAo9ddgukz_QCM5Tnl77Qb9lcUnJCATAddEsWuxLl-yHkbrUPwsF-BcuWr82U0ydff9JkWX9PHi-0oOVnc0W-NE6Hva8u3s_QQT6DXAm_fvU%3D>
.

name: Tony Vargas
subject: I want you to know this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
I don’t take this for granted, not even for a single day.

|
---

| | [**I wanted to take a moment before my Mid-Month Deadline hits to send you a personal note. If you have a moment, please read to the end.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35838504/306307604/1129282168?refcode=20210915_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGQyNjQ5NS02ZjE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5i1AvzSxX4LdxB8H2KBqgrIOZZEvrzjMlasCLLquIw=)

I’m the proud son of immigrants and union workers.

My parents struggled when they first came here, working multiple jobs to make ends meet.

There was even a time when my family all shared a single room.

I never imagined that one day I’d serve as a State Senator, or run for Congress.

That’s why I don’t take this for granted, not even for a single day.

My family experienced housing instability [**_\-- that’s why I worked to create affordable housing._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35838505/306307605/1129282168?refcode=20210915_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGQyNjQ5NS02ZjE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5i1AvzSxX4LdxB8H2KBqgrIOZZEvrzjMlasCLLquIw=)

My family taught me to work hard [**_\-- that’s why I’ve dedicated my life to public service._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35838506/306307606/1129282168?refcode=20210915_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGQyNjQ5NS02ZjE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5i1AvzSxX4LdxB8H2KBqgrIOZZEvrzjMlasCLLquIw=)

My family is the story of the American Dream [**_\-- that’s why I’m determined to make it to Congress and fight hard to save it._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35838507/306307607/1129282168?refcode=20210915_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGQyNjQ5NS02ZjE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5i1AvzSxX4LdxB8H2KBqgrIOZZEvrzjMlasCLLquIw=)

I will never forget the struggles my family faced and the lessons I’ve learned along the way.

But my opponent has shown indifference to the hardship everyday folks deal with.

That’s unacceptable -- and that’s why I need your support.

[**_I have an ambitious strategy, but that’s what it takes to win a close race like this. Hitting my $9,032 Mid-Month Goal is critical to stay on track and win this race for families like yours and mine. So if you can relate to my story, even a little bit, will you chip in $14 now to help me make it? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35838508/306307608/1129282168?refcode=20210915_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGQyNjQ5NS02ZjE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5i1AvzSxX4LdxB8H2KBqgrIOZZEvrzjMlasCLLquIw=)

I’m proud of where I came from.

And I couldn’t have made it here without help from my family, my teachers, and the communities I’ve been lucky to call home.

[**Now, I’m humbly asking for your help. Can I count on your $14 before my deadline hits at midnight? Your support will have a massive impact.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35838509/306307609/1129282168?refcode=20210915_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGQyNjQ5NS02ZjE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5i1AvzSxX4LdxB8H2KBqgrIOZZEvrzjMlasCLLquIw=) | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35838510/306307610/1129282168?refcode=20210915_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGQyNjQ5NS02ZjE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5i1AvzSxX4LdxB8H2KBqgrIOZZEvrzjMlasCLLquIw=)

clean_body: I don’t take this for granted, not even for a single day. | | | = I’m the proud son of immigrants and union workers. My parents struggled when they first came here, working multiple jobs to make ends meet. There was even a time when my family all shared a single room. I never imagined that one day I’d serve as a State Senator, or run for Congress. That’s why I don’t take this for granted, not even for a single day. My family experienced housing instability = My family taught me to work hard = My family is the story of the American Dream = I will never forget the struggles my family faced and the lessons I’ve learned along the way. But my opponent has shown indifference to the hardship everyday folks deal with. That’s unacceptable -- and that’s why I need your support. = I’m proud of where I came from. | | Hi Peter,

As if it's not enough that Biden and his godless commies are destroying the country with his traitorous acts, he also insists on dishonoring us at every turn.

It's time to #FIREBIDEN!

[That's where we come in.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=f66bfdf95d&e=ba6e67b849)

My name is Jarrin Jackson, and I am the chairman of Drain the DC Swamp PAC - I also served in Afghanistan as an infantry officer. We are America First patriots supporting Trump and actually FIGHTING Biden - making life difficult for him until we can give him the boot!

As an Afghanistan vet, 9/11 means a lot to me. It's somber time, and respect and solemnity are what is demanded by our leaders.

_Apparently, no one told Biden._

_Once again, Joe Biden showed just how disrespectful he is off the victims of 9/11, their families and friends. Sometime during the ceremony, Biden was photographed pulling down his mask and yelling at someone as the ceremony was taking place. Who Biden was yelling at and what he was yelling is still a big mystery and will probably be kept hidden by the corrupt media.

Of course, mush mouth Biden couldn’t be bothered to give a live speech either, becoming the first president since 9/11 happened no to do so. Even Obama looks stunned. _

That's right.

Biden was the first President since 9/11 not to give a speech to unite the nation. Instead, he went to New York and beclowned himself. He is showing himself to be the godless commie that he is.

[Will you help us pressure lawmakers to #FIREBIDEN?](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=663039f35b&e=ba6e67b849)

Tiiiiiiiiiiiiiiimber. It is TIME to FIRE BIDEN.

He's just some old clown with an anger problem.

It's time to end this nightmare.

We must use every tool to reveal Biden's illegitamacy.

We must push for forensic audits & canvassing, impeachment, and the 25th Amendment.

We should attack on all fronts and give no quarter.

We must #FIREBIDEN.

my friend, these mandates have 0 exemptions for natural immunity.

---
Join me, friend, in celebrating the first day of Hispanic Heritage month! Part of what makes Florida so special is our rich diversity, and we wouldn’t have that today without our strong and vibrant Hispanic communities.

This month is also an important opportunity to recognize that our Hispanic neighbors have been disproportionately impacted by COVID-19, climate change, and social and economic factors — that’s simply not right. We owe these communities a debt of gratitude for being an instrumental part of the fabric of our state, and I’m here to fight to ensure Florida’s Hispanics are never left behind.

This month and the next — let’s continue to honor and celebrate their achievements and contributions to our beautiful state and country, while building a more equal and just Florida for all.

\-- Charlie

name: Christy Smith
subject: This story doesn't have a happy ending
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35840074/306312675/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzQyYTcxYi03NDE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UdyvzhW3xNws-jrtje5mpwueA3VZ4sYCZ7Haold35P0=&emci=fa42a71b-7416-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=fc42a71b-7416-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

I want to tell you about my mom, Gail.

She was a nurse for most of her life and was a tireless advocate for the people in her care. She taught me that dedicating yourself to serving others is the best way to leave a mark on this world. She's a big reason why I've spent so much of my life as an advocate for our community.

But my mom's story doesn't have a happy ending. After decades of taking care of patients my mom, Gail Fisher, lost her life because she could not afford her prescriptions -- too proud to tell our family she needed help. I miss her every single day.

Heartbreakingly, this story is not unique to my family.

40% of Americans can't afford their prescriptions. Take a moment to let that sink in -- that is 4 in 10 Americans who do not have access to the medications they need. My mom's story is the story of America -- a country that for far too long has put profits over people.

I'm telling you this story because politicians like Mike Garcia make decisions every day that have real implications for the American people. When Mike Garcia votes against the Affordable Care Act he's voting against people like my mom, Gail. He's voting against his constituents. He's voting against the American people.

**Winning this seat has always been about more than beating Mike Garcia. It's been about my mom and my daughters and this district and _you_.**

**[Please chip in $25 or whatever you can, and let's send Mike Garcia far away from making any decisions that impact the people of this district.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35840076/306312677/-392799195?refcode=em21_210915_mombio-s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzQyYTcxYi03NDE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UdyvzhW3xNws-jrtje5mpwueA3VZ4sYCZ7Haold35P0=)**

Thank you for your unwavering support.

\-- Christy [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35840078/306312681/-392799195?refcode=em21_210915_mombio-s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzQyYTcxYi03NDE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UdyvzhW3xNws-jrtje5mpwueA3VZ4sYCZ7Haold35P0=)

* * *
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/fa42a71b-7416-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/fc42a71b-7416-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzQyYTcxYi03NDE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UdyvzhW3xNws-jrtje5mpwueA3VZ4sYCZ7Haold35P0=&id=113000550). name: Mike Thompson
subject: Thank you CA Voters!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://email
body:
# [#]
Peter,

Thank you to everyone who came out to vote in the California recall election.

This election was incredibly important and your participation showed how much our voters care. California voters came out and their voice was clear — they want leaders who are dedicated to solving the problems that our state faces, and Governor Newsom will continue his work to help all Californians!

Thank you so much for amplifying your voice by voting. Thanks to you, we can continue to be a state that puts our people first.

I am so grateful to have you on our team. Thank you for all that you do!

Mike Thompson

September is halfway over, friend – but our grassroots donations have been slipping. The end of this month is our biggest FEC deadline to date, and we don't want to be in a bad spot when our numbers go public. Republicans have a Rolodex of right-wing mega-donors who are already spending millions against us in an attempt to flip this seat. If we report weak numbers, it will only invite more dark money into New Hampshire. clean_body: | | | | | Folks, I have some good news and bad news. The good news is that we’ve made some progress since yesterday on our mid-month goal. But, here’s the bad news: although we’ve been making progress, our projections show that we still need 63 grassroots donations to meet our mid-month goal. So, I’m writing with you in hopes that we can make this happen right here and now. | | | | | | | | | | | | | This could be one of the closest races in the entire country, team. The reason I bring that up is because every penny we spend from here on out matters in a huge way. Thankfully, Steve’s supporters have helped us in a huge way to hit our previous goals so I’m hoping this time will be no different. That said, with the recent news that we’re still down by 63 donors, things are a little more up in the air. I need your help to make sure that this is a mid-month performance for the books. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for being there when we’ve needed you the most! Onward, Eva Black Finance Director Steve Sisolak for Governor | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. Peter,

Joe Biden proved what we’ve known since day one.

_➡️_ _ __He’s weak._
_➡️_ _ __He’s incompetent. _
_➡️_ _ __And he is absolutely desperate._

He made that crystal clear when he announced his new “plan” (aka mandate) for COVID that is nothing more than an unconstitutional power grab.

Biden’s advisors are out there saying that if Governors stand in the way, the President is going to run them over.

Well I have a message for the Biden Administration: **the hell you are!**
[](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=33fd76aacd8f4c568af325e4e24ce256&_e=C1k7GeLZ3B9PU_qlTQ0D4sYBKSACoIG9BsfAC08FDIehXpwEa24DyAERvJi8759LbkTTzN78YTxwGQ7jCGBQPvSjAdcOqbn4Sp_QnHpf_tBgJiZVyuHqDae3WW0d4AJ14OENYuRQYKO5T36ttCWZOg4z-UxWRlYBaT-7CFSDgW5hsZtSWRZDXAabJlEsjNSl0aDBYksbJXSGy--XCetHOcW9gWWUkuK7h2KOfaGnT4UaOEqDNf7xZ9gSeTasQMdrDl8NO-Qezp7JPvZ88nj6CKiyubNIJk1wEpsfxCoGPOVva1euLgUdPmf_jgDTuvK9X8zwkHxIgYtI9M5e2rc1U2tjCgOhbDJCBfgMgT-SFgFFhVy9RVu3BM7b_Qi-gc7TnJK4kO58y4Plhtu9dazmwzjD665vHs4WNmGsHqTjgek%3D)

I want to be that leader for our state, but I need Patriots like you to help get me there. Thank you for signing your name and joining me in this fight. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Republicans are subpoenaing part of your social security number and other personal info
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
This is not a drill
#

Friend,
As I have said repeatedly, we are in the fight of our lives to preserve our democracy — and today, the Big Republican Lie took a dangerous and scary turn.
Today the PA GOP announced they will try to subpoena state and county officials for personal information belonging to millions of Pennsylvanians, including but not limited to _name, driver's license number, partial social security number, and method of voting._
**This is a blatant move to try and dismantle our democracy — all to embrace a twice-impeached, one-term, former president who nearly ripped this country apart.**
[So I refuse to stand by and watch, and I want to know if you’ll stand with me and fight back. Will you rush $3 by midnight to help fight back against the PA GOP’s flagrant abuse of power?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35841873/306317846/-353695395?refcode2=a8bf01d1-7916-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210915-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGJmMDFkMS03OTE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pgXPUiKn3NNi4ukwDmQb6r9A_xferfRpURvxZbxh7MM=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35841874/306317847/-353695395?refcode2=a8bf01d1-7916-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210915-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGJmMDFkMS03OTE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pgXPUiKn3NNi4ukwDmQb6r9A_xferfRpURvxZbxh7MM=)**
Encouraged by Donald Trump’s Big Lie, people are showing up yet again in DC this weekend for part two of the violence and chaos we saw on January 6.
As State Representative and as an advocate for working families, I have stood up to Republicans to protect the right to vote for ALL, and with your help, I have beaten them.
But they will stop at nothing to try and make it harder for working folks like you and me to vote, so I need our whole coalition on my side to beat them again.
With the GOP attempting to take voters’ personal information for their partisan games, we have entered into a completely new and dangerous phase in our democracy that we cannot abide.
[So this is not a drill, folks. I need you to rush a donation of $3 to help us immediately push back on the GOP’s attacks on our election. Anything you can give makes a big impact in this critical moment:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35841875/306317848/-353695395?refcode2=a8bf01d1-7916-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210915-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGJmMDFkMS03OTE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pgXPUiKn3NNi4ukwDmQb6r9A_xferfRpURvxZbxh7MM=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35841876/306317849/-353695395?refcode2=a8bf01d1-7916-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210915-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGJmMDFkMS03OTE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pgXPUiKn3NNi4ukwDmQb6r9A_xferfRpURvxZbxh7MM=)**
Let’s be clear: They don’t want to stop everybody from voting. They want to shut up working people, Black people, brown people, young people, and anyone else who stands against them.
That’s because our coalition — and the work we have done in spite of their constant attacks — has always pulled this nation closer to fulfilling the American promise.
And with your help, we will keep fighting. So, from the bottom of my heart, thanks for being a part of this team.
In solidarity,
Malcolm

major endorsement from Republican Senator Josh Hawley.

Who can forget Josh Hawley’s role in attempting to overturn the 2020
election and fist pumping the insurrectionists on January 6th? JD Vance

We can’t say we’re surprised. Josh Hawley’s far-right, dangerous policies

But this race is too close for comfort -- the most recent poll has JD and

anywhere else — the Senate majority hinges on Ohio.

Republicans can see the writing on the wall: our campaign has what it

Who can forget Josh Hawley’s role in attempting to overturn the 2020 election and fist pumping the insurrectionists on January 6th? JD Vance even said Josh Hawley “did the right thing.” We can’t say we’re surprised. Josh Hawley’s far-right, dangerous policies are right in line with JD Vance’s vision for Ohio. But this race is too close for comfort -- the most recent poll has JD and Tim within 1 point of each other! [ ]Can you chip in $25 or more right now to help Tim stay ahead of JD Vance and flip Ohio blue? [ ]Chip in >> This race was already a major target for national Republicans. With this new poll AND Josh Hawley’s recent endorsement even more money will come flooding in against Tim. There’s a reason Josh Hawley hasn’t endorsed in an open Senate primary anywhere else — the Senate majority hinges on Ohio. Republicans can see the writing on the wall: our campaign has what it takes to flip this open Senate seat blue so they’re throwing everything they’ve got at this battleground race. Ohio deserves a Senator who will fight to cut workers in on the deal, not an extremist millionaire who is out of touch with everyday people. [ ]Can we count on you to chip in and help Tim pull ahead in this dead heat race? body:

[**Take Action Now ⟩⟩**](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=49d1caed468b4cb3b83a08f88dd6f33c&_e=NYXDxPjetiHj7uIx3fOeIH1lHfNLstp6-wjHClotHrzdbgHiYO8-vTZy3T994momwKVpeX-T8Me2OAssZsSctMmiNqX05Coct1PrsC0lmA6EStNyhc3YXbsJvW4iSP90mwYJ4Kd3v2rqOwnlPWXfYCMXmSRSTrTnd_Oyh1goSeZW5G5ZCxf0nzhBmhA2jelKrE8ltnKtS_9WQnnhFIMu-r3ILl-nnT9_sIO1gM4t_6MKVE4PXKhZpEsOLL4aJAwUR_i7akG6mzbtr9cf_5w-OQ3m3NxjmfaHyFF_HRAOV0rBg4SSnzYY3NiwD9m6YnQpBJEX9Fp5ScvpVdT7nfjOorwcs-5-P8rLC6fBOyPLF4K9k464oAm_G6DzqGkUQf4RQ1ejRhReWXCftWb4b88OTO6XYqeIngDbNBjj5hpqBMssNTjFjr8-95BTRkPls3T7rNrHfxL3gAZFKmsJMnVlAw%3D%3D)

* * *
| FROM THE DESK OF
**SENATOR TOM COTTON** |
* * *
---|---|---

Peter,

This week is a pivotal moment in our fight to stop Democrats from forever transforming America.

_**Let me explain:**_
Democrats know they can't get 60 votes in the U.S. Senate to pass MASS AMNESTY for millions of illegal immigrants. So, they've rammed it into their $3.5 trillion "budget" bill and are hoping YOU won't notice -- and their deadline for moving this forward is on Friday.

I've been sounding the alarm. And it's clearer than ever that we need you to join us in the fight to retake the Senate in 2022.

[**Please use this secure link to make an emergency donation of $25, $50, or even $100 to help Republican Senators take back the Senate ⟩⟩**](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=49d1caed468b4cb3b83a08f88dd6f33c&_e=NYXDxPjetiHj7uIx3fOeIH1lHfNLstp6-wjHClotHrzdbgHiYO8-vTZy3T994momwKVpeX-T8Me2OAssZsSctMmiNqX05Coct1PrsC0lmA6EStNyhc3YXbsJvW4iSP90mwYJ4Kd3v2rqOwnlPWXfYCMXmSRSTrTnd_Oyh1goSeZW5G5ZCxf0nzhBmhA2jelKrE8ltnKtS_9WQnnhFIMu-r3ILl-nnT9_sIO1gM4t_6MKVE4PXKhZpEsOLL4aJAwUyAfgrIbV7baGT3EiAtpnGQDGZ89SYxDKOIblkgS-zvcbnRol-SoVH1eZAZbuKVhLCYRxAVkESi_x5MKzJqurDu4mBndixmts-9OUBrSBcpaU39Bflif0lmk4vobwn3UBVlcpjtNq4ABBn13ql1fjgKly54lOYQKWgFK8tFydeI_tGT5O47qHTJyakk8-zd3wMsQ7haJD7-xljYIDsifpmg%3D%3D)

This $3.5 trillion debacle has nothing to do with the "budget" and everything to do with changing America as we know it -- and mass amnesty would do exactly that.

**It would encourage more illegal immigration, crush wages for working Americans, and lead to more violent crime.**

Thanks to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, we already have basically open borders and immigration enforcement has been ended. We can't give them mass amnesty too -- but it's up to Patriots like you to stand with me to keep up the pressure.

[**Please, stop what you're doing now and help us fight back by winning the Senate in 2022 ⟩⟩**](http://links.conservativesforrevival.com/u/click?_t=a30b75a9476243838bdfb190856f8157&_m=49d1caed468b4cb3b83a08f88dd6f33c&_e=NYXDxPjetiHj7uIx3fOeIH1lHfNLstp6-wjHClotHrzdbgHiYO8-vTZy3T994momwKVpeX-T8Me2OAssZsSctMmiNqX05Coct1PrsC0lmA6EStNyhc3YXbsJvW4iSP90mwYJ4Kd3v2rqOwnlPWXfYCMXmSRSTrTnd_Oyh1goSeZW5G5ZCxf0nzhBmhA2jelKrE8ltnKtS_9WQnnhFIMu-r3ILl-nnT9_sIO1gM4t_6MKVE4PXKhZpEsOLL4aJAwU-hyOvmTVbqV7ysgUQ3h-dh6Y7oeMMbAnzsMkofKDbGvnZ_9dKqCtULwS5SYhdquntg59eLvY05KxA7sXLANujNqapiTcPHBA9C93HPG1PDHqCKjMscMcaxlZ8wn4hZj6HDi2Ls3O8nLvol0N7OtwLfYjTGAmDs40ntBxPJJMj7SY5lUcZ6NBiN62Axx5E7pKrk4318HINTzCSWXAu4fmwQ%3D%3D)

In service,
Tom Cotton

name: Kevin Faulconer
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021
body:
I’m proud that we ran a campaign based on solutions. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/dfd818b6529fd2d7/7ee86f71cd1758f1c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, I just wanted to take a few moments to thank you from the bottom of my heart for your great support during this campaign. [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/dfd818b6529fd2d7/7edd7dd6a1c9002fc3d6b838967d376c/34943) You all know me. I’ve never been one to be part of the circus. I’ve always been the one who comes in to end the circus. That’s just who I am. California’s problems aren’t going away, and I’m proud that we ran a campaign based on experience and solutions. The path to victory in California is to win by addition – bringing people together from all backgrounds and walks of life. Unfortunately, this race became dominated by national, partisan politics. But I trust the democratic process and know Californians deserve a governor focused on solving California’s problems. That’s why I’m going to take the next few weeks to talk to my family and supporters to figure out what I can do next to serve our great state. Thank you again for being part of this campaign and believing in California. Sincerely, Kevin Faulconer | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/dfd818b6529fd2d7/c517756e58f949f4c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/dfd818b6529fd2d7/6c3a0b316746aa57c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/dfd818b6529fd2d7/e7919de1a865baccc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/dfd818b6529fd2d7/5888f646aa3325aec3d6b838967d376c/34943)

clean_body: Help a Navy SEAL complete his mission. | Peter, Tonight’s mid-month fundraising deadline is our chance to press our advantage to end Kamala’s 50-50 Senate majority. With Biden’s approval plummeting by the day, Kamala being the least popular Vice President in 50 years , and just 1 SEAT to go, our time to FLIP the Senate is here and now. But as things stand, we’re still$7,915 short of our goal... That’s why I’ve extended our 200% MATCH for grassroots supporters like YOU up until the deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M. - - Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Eric Greitens Date: Mon, Sept 13th, 2021 Subject: Kamala knows it’s over To: dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com Peter, The Biden-Harris administration is in free fall... A new poll shows Joe Biden’s approval rating has plummeted to just 39% while Kamala Harris is the least popular vice president in 50 YEARS! Just 1 SEAT is needed to FLIP the Senate -- and Kamala knows her 50-50 majority is coming to an end. But with the mid-month deadline just hours away, I’m counting on America First patriots like YOU to help me CRUSH our goal and finish the job. Crisis after crisis, Biden and Kamala have shown they are truly unfit to lead this country. Either Joe Biden is confused and checking his watch, or Kamala is laughing off a disaster. As a Navy SEAL who put his life on the line to defend this country and our way of life, it is truly infuriating to see. But the American people are waking up to this administration's record of utter failure. We simply cannot wait until 2024 to take back our country... To SAVE America, we must first FLIP the 50-50 Senate. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

[**Take Action Now ⟩⟩**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=808abb2530324645b88e2d45a5852fe6&_e=VK_dGY0wwis5xHlrQiEmDkz5Q5CP25_862ZoUmVfz8TGUSOR-qk4DLGIwppTeIndyy2k2EzqfFQe33Lxd93K3nCX3z0oPSUBsAP2qNrS_yMa6yTFIuo4Vi3ckkJZopXEbTWriquxJxoEGbNBkBJqKBh1ycAmhefemJ6YJ7gCG0q83TcdQsJlgrRWLSd7lFVLl3TusLHx4t8o3bQIhtN9FjTl2-BsbFtIeqUkKiVmAnYurDLRsFxtgu45VL9RCdx9Tjn65UpM3wThDzWtx1MaUOiXMHzAtpeZcP3XnzW1IIAx0GUpHBzjXbTn1sT1Dw-Md8pSXW0Q1BwVwWpy7vqKRB-ORCYnU-sHl3eIyBIs4Yi13e9xQ3mUCr_WmV-0LdymoUFSYFp-JyCQONuWd-rgnmMdquO0IhNpOnHsUgVr9q2lmzbzDFAfhdJfGveDj6y2GY1x88HnvDYTZwFQjF4LyQ%3D%3D)

| FROM THE DESK OF
**SENATOR TOM COTTON** |

---|---|---

Peter,

This week is a pivotal moment in our fight to stop Democrats from forever transforming America.

_**Let me explain:**_
Democrats know they can't get 60 votes in the U.S. Senate to pass MASS AMNESTY for millions of illegal immigrants. So, they've rammed it into their $3.5 trillion "budget" bill and are hoping YOU won't notice -- and their deadline for moving this forward is on Friday.

I've been sounding the alarm. And it's clearer than ever that we need you to join us in the fight to retake the Senate in 2022.

[**Please use this secure link to make an emergency donation of $25, $50, or even $100 to help Republican Senators take back the Senate ⟩⟩**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=808abb2530324645b88e2d45a5852fe6&_e=VK_dGY0wwis5xHlrQiEmDkz5Q5CP25_862ZoUmVfz8TGUSOR-qk4DLGIwppTeIndyy2k2EzqfFQe33Lxd93K3nCX3z0oPSUBsAP2qNrS_yMa6yTFIuo4Vi3ckkJZopXEbTWriquxJxoEGbNBkBJqKBh1ycAmhefemJ6YJ7gCG0q83TcdQsJlgrRWLSd7lFVLl3TusLHx4t8o3bQIhtN9FjTl2-BsbFtIeqUkKiVmAnYurDLRsFxtgu45VL9RCdx99EzLQyk_afgAiz_iDygW3hceqcIxt4s_upIDaeobXCmZ48JKZOzYmcsHJAR46slYLl9VyvRIUobhME3-2ui-IfjfBGVH4yJ54Mb22FOyUQ7KdVvEcUCI37_7kZJ_s0ZexMN92MLvwlT_Ft9MbMYGb0zLGlkx4Ad0ZcE_3yUfjYFn0AkWTDYBkncysvR0_y2uZmd451gteogebWwEHkNFTQ%3D%3D)

This $3.5 trillion debacle has nothing to do with the "budget" and everything to do with changing America as we know it -- and mass amnesty would do exactly that.

**It would encourage more illegal immigration, crush wages for working Americans, and lead to more violent crime.**

Thanks to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, we already have basically open borders and immigration enforcement has been ended. We can't give them mass amnesty too -- but it's up to Patriots like you to stand with me to keep up the pressure.

[**Please, stop what you're doing now and help us fight back by winning the Senate in 2022 ⟩⟩**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=808abb2530324645b88e2d45a5852fe6&_e=VK_dGY0wwis5xHlrQiEmDkz5Q5CP25_862ZoUmVfz8TGUSOR-qk4DLGIwppTeIndyy2k2EzqfFQe33Lxd93K3nCX3z0oPSUBsAP2qNrS_yMa6yTFIuo4Vi3ckkJZopXEbTWriquxJxoEGbNBkBJqKBh1ycAmhefemJ6YJ7gCG0q83TcdQsJlgrRWLSd7lFVLl3TusLHx4t8o3bQIhtN9FjTl2-BsbFtIeqUkKiVmAnYurDLRsFxtgu45VL9RCdx9diJ2igYoqXKmVg0RrpEfoab8NurVwJhWxMQIZGRCNTVple-dwg6a86U5mmSpateyEnl2aAwUnm4_3LTLxxhIaOdasGQ9zJvvUdyeRdWVgBuFbGXu0jsqdCdM7uvaCLPCfZfACtD16e8KnOqPI-s6SD41Th6wuAHv4HRv7RVitLuyL8gRuO1s1hCu-pjGG8GPOk9NT2LiyhB8ePwrwuikuw%3D%3D)

In service,
Tom Cotton

name: Alex Lasry
subject: We have the power to defeat Ron Johnson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin
body:
My campaign is about bringing fresh ideas to Congress so that we can actually help Wisconsinites.
Peter, it’s Alex here.

For too long, we’ve been represented by Ron Johnson who refuses to do anything to help everyday Wisconsinites.

I am fighting for the people of Wisconsin -- not the special interests. My campaign is about bringing fresh ideas to Congress so that we can actually help Wisconsinites.

We have the power to defeat Ron Johnson, and I’m running a competitive campaign that can and will win next November. But I need your help today before midnight tonight to help close the $1,944 gap in our mid-month goal.

**I wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t crucial to our campaign’s success, so can I count on you to chip in before midnight tonight? You can use this link to give $10 or more:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lasry_sept2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35843197/306321332/112948214?refcode=EM_FR_210915FRPM_N_AL_90DA_4_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2VmMDc1ZS03ZjE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GpIanQO2L29-Il6JbX1oydPY2RfpV_tWC24e5L20XTg=)**

Thank you,

Alex

name: Team AOC
subject: Alexandria’s political courage has made her a top target
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria’s political courage to tell it like it is and fight for the policies and protections that voters elected Democrats to win has made her a top target.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210915-2510-header&t=1&akid=2510%2E2526796%2ELyob-n)
The GOP is already gearing up for the 2022 midterm elections.
So far, there are three Republican opponents we know are exploring a run against Alexandria — including our opponent from last year who spent over _$10 million_ trying to unseat us.
We know that whoever wins the Republican primary in this race will have the full weight of the party behind them — including all the right-leaning corporate PACs, lobbyists, and conservative media. With the potential of our district being redrawn, our grassroots campaign needs to raise critical resources _now_ in order to prepare for a challenging and expensive race.
That’s what makes this month’s FEC fundraising deadline so important — and why we’re relying on your support right now.
**We set a goal to publish our strongest fundraising quarter this year, but at this point in the month, we’re still behind where we need to be.** [Can you make a $3 contribution right now to help us catch up on our fundraising and strengthen our campaign to keep Alexandria in Congress before tonight’s mid-month deadline at midnight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210915-2?refcode=em20210915-2510-P_FND_MMF_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2510_2526796_Lyob-n&akid=2510%2E2526796%2ELyob-n)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210915-2?refcode=em20210915-2510-P_FND_MMF_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2510_2526796_Lyob-n&akid=2510%2E2526796%2ELyob-n)**
Alexandria’s political courage to tell it like it is and fight for the policies and protections that voters elected Democrats to win has made her a top target GOP donors — and we can expect that they will spare no expense in trying to unseat her in Congress next year. That’s why we need to hit every fundraising target we set, especially the one we set for the end of this month before we report our numbers to the FEC.
Your contribution of any amount before the deadline will help our campaign fight back against whatever the GOP throws our way, and will demonstrate the strength of our movement to fend off future challengers.
**We’re falling short at the moment, so we really need a surge of grassroots contributions right now.** [A $3 contribution from you today will make a powerful impact in ensuring we hit our September targets — can we count on your $3 contribution before midnight tonight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210915-2?refcode=em20210915-2510-P_FND_MMF_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2510_2526796_Lyob-n&akid=2510%2E2526796%2ELyob-n)
Thank you for everything you do for our movement.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210915-2?refcode=em20210915-2510-P_FND_MMF_OPP&t=23&refcode2=2510_2526796_Lyob-n&akid=2510%2E2526796%2ELyob-n)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210915-2510-P_FND_MMF_OPP&t=24&akid=2510%2E2526796%2ELyob-n)**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: How we act today . . .
body:
Today we celebrate Yom Kippur, the holiest day in the Jewish calendar and the conclusion of our High Holy Days.
| | | | | Patriot,

Today we celebrate Yom Kippur, the holiest day in the Jewish calendar and the conclusion of our High Holy Days. On this day each year, Jews fast and pray. We also ask others for forgiveness and reflect carefully on our own behavior and actions.

Depending on how we act during Rosh Hashanah and Yom Kippur, our fate for the year is decided, and, if we have lived well, we are inscribed in the Book of Life.

Yom Kippur is a chance to deepen our relationship with God through the practice of teshuva, or repentance. As it says in Leviticus: "For on this day shall atonement be made for you, to cleanse you; from all your sins shall ye be clean before the Lord." I encourage politicians in Washington to ask forgiveness from the American people for their many sins against us.

From my family to yours: Have a meaningful fast. G'mar chatima tova.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---

clean_body: Today we celebrate Yom Kippur, the holiest day in the Jewish calendar and the conclusion of our High Holy Days. | | | | | Patriot, Today we celebrate Yom Kippur, the holiest day in the Jewish calendar and the conclusion of our High Holy Days. On this day each year, Jews fast and pray. We also ask others for forgiveness and reflect carefully on our own behavior and actions. Depending on how we act during Rosh Hashanah and Yom Kippur, our fate for the year is decided, and, if we have lived well, we are inscribed in the Book of Life. Yom Kippur is a chance to deepen our relationship with God through the practice of teshuva, or repentance. As it says in Leviticus: "For on this day shall atonement be made for you, to cleanse you; from all your sins shall ye be clean before the Lord." I encourage politicians in Washington to ask forgiveness from the American people for their many sins against us. From my family to yours: Have a meaningful fast. G'mar chatima tova. Respectfully, Laura Loomer (C) 2021 Illoominate Media 720 Lucerne Ave, #1465 LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

I'm the working mom that's going to take down Pelosi This display proves once again that Democrats will never put Americans FIRST. They want to lock you down again while they party together through the night. They use their status and impalpable power to do as they please while forcing everyday citizens to live under their rules. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5560f3168766442e84bf9dc6d12000e1&_e=kHM2gRNlglFajWIIExEBKvdlDajytcu2-fBXDAiZv5pPZA_4bdKzCs-keD6v1fhdQUa6OWwVBlS9h316yIiBrfn2S58FW7VE_6BFVZIoIwNY1J_QbKBmSBY-9MFdbqaDhFA8hMMkG8iT7Lkp2dKYUDm-_35Ouowso67yfR3fz-PnlcexhLL_iwu3-aqPVbt1p8FAu3VdGn183UpAE7Rl1dehspzTWuHz7FRL_ZFx0xV2GHKyuJe3q2g7l7V170usP1T1_085XMFWqfHXuSGk41pLMBhxb9Gz6LU0-W_OAhxDxC0nKlJrwJTdz042RVP54yS2hZ8xqb4MnCooR4sYqolrARBnKQ0c0ynfJOLIsDKGoJdoUlz6LAK8W8v8aTLhUKYRe7LN-eFSl3oh3jyqWjX4lPMO8AjLsNEdBWaNWxCedlHRU8KmLfr55Wp6-wDOx-nxSnXOvZg9C8xPMf9pQvhcoYhxDFlKo2zmYbyX9vCBed80-9Pj8DYaSdDgq28Y)
