Peter,

I want you to take a moment to imagine Nancy Pelosi’s worst nightmare:

**A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, from a swing state like Nevada, defeats a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time.**

This hard-fought victory, in Nevada’s 3rd Congressional District, is the race that finally pries the Speaker’s Gavel from Pelosi’s clenched fist, demoting her to minority leader or better yet – **straight into retirement.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5560f3168766442e84bf9dc6d12000e1&_e=kHM2gRNlglFajWIIExEBKvdlDajytcu2-fBXDAiZv5pPZA_4bdKzCs-keD6v1fhdQUa6OWwVBlS9h316yIiBrfn2S58FW7VE_6BFVZIoIwNY1J_QbKBmSBY-9MFdbqaDhFA8hMMkG8iT7Lkp2dKYUDm-_35Ouowso67yfR3fz-PnlcexhLL_iwu3-aqPVbt1p8FAu3VdGn183UpAE7Rl1dehspzTWuHz7FRL_ZFx0xV2GHKyuJe3q2g7l7V170usP1T1_085XMFWqfHXuSGk41pLMBhxb9Gz6LU0-W_OAhwbs2d9GX3rycMgaLc2WAX_UL4ENqMuTQBxsluyU4E3srl8BTv_BFRVw_B2OEj-oCtsEOp3y4ao5iMkNvzbN9c1TqCIPQ_qAPVRs4NtIUocV1hmW5Hubim8li427E8hq5HV1w4KPBkjfMgJqC9ONQRksQ2ZsipwsOUbPRLb0f2bT05uB-7TZ30wMswZpkN79x3H0jmTvuMOVbIiVS6hiaFN)
**Just as important, with Republican control of the U.S. House of Representatives, we can now stop President Joe Biden’s radical, socialist agenda dead in its tracks.**

CNN, MSNBC, the New York Times, and the Washington Post won’t know what to do with themselves... and it will be glorious! All the phony narratives they’ve run since 2015, when Donald J. Trump first announced his campaign for President, will be exposed for the world to see!!

AOC and her Squad comrades will be relegated to the back bench of Congress, where they can stew about the results, and figure out a new way to resurrect their grand schemes for American socialism. Or, maybe how to apply for dual citizenship in Venezuela.

[**Peter, all of this happened... because you took a chance and donated $25, $35, $50, $100 or more to my campaign for Congress.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5560f3168766442e84bf9dc6d12000e1&_e=kHM2gRNlglFajWIIExEBKvdlDajytcu2-fBXDAiZv5pPZA_4bdKzCs-keD6v1fhdQUa6OWwVBlS9h316yIiBrfn2S58FW7VE_6BFVZIoIwNY1J_QbKBmSBY-9MFdbqaDhFA8hMMkG8iT7Lkp2dKYUDm-_35Ouowso67yfR3fz-PnlcexhLL_iwu3-aqPVbt1p8FAu3VdGn183UpAE7Rl1dehspzTWuHz7FRL_ZFx0xV2GHKyuJe3q2g7l7V170usP1T1_085XMFWqfHXuSGk41pLMBhxb9Gz6LU0-W_OAhyp6wjh3b4BGoF1n8J7xYivK2ZVvV9v89u7aqzK-fSyKeuLJZE3zHctzYOoylZUCcixZToL_z5YR7JbCrablbSlmJVZy5vIxeGVCrLyXPpKtW_vk6EztGZrr7b2HmZbF8wDCe07sOC5dw2dgt-dzzFY1ZKbTaGCYwuUXNCktYW4PneTXmt5F_5K-GdKOuh53Sp305jkXvQsy631pKH7ketX) **My name is April Becker, and in addition to running for Congress in Nevada’s 3rd District, I truly am Nancy Pelosi’s worst nightmare._But it’s not why you might think._**

[**SUPPORT APRIL BECKER NOW -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5560f3168766442e84bf9dc6d12000e1&_e=kHM2gRNlglFajWIIExEBKvdlDajytcu2-fBXDAiZv5pPZA_4bdKzCs-keD6v1fhdQUa6OWwVBlS9h316yIiBrfn2S58FW7VE_6BFVZIoIwNY1J_QbKBmSBY-9MFdbqaDhFA8hMMkG8iT7Lkp2dKYUDm-_35Ouowso67yfR3fz-PnlcexhLL_iwu3-aqPVbt1p8FAu3VdGn183UpAE7Rl1dehspzTWuHz7FRL_ZFx0xV2GHKyuJe3q2g7l7V170usP1T1_085XMFWqfHXuSGk41pLMBhxb9Gz6LU0-W_OAhyn2-isxwYOreaj7easDVaQ5wqaq-v59Mq_KDBb-o-BcU3BuB6y28x1pVlezCC3aV_1oDaTMdPajCWcX-cC28Zq0Dbx94xC2fkdAECAAciGLud15am9_UDW19jWW_NVAc58SUPsJssfd7fmD4ny7B-tDgDwyz1Xt1Z7jaiV6bYoOnWsN3rrQWzGK1NGlBOhAdXQogbWSbtsa71IJglwU1QL)
Right now, Speaker Pelosi is focused on two things: advancing her party’s radical socialist agenda, and protecting her most vocal and vulnerable Democrat colleagues to defend her shrinking majority. **I’m not even on her radar._Nor do I want to be._ **

I’m a working mom with three children. I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school. **I’m a practicing attorney who donates her time fighting for the underdog and taking on tough cases.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5560f3168766442e84bf9dc6d12000e1&_e=kHM2gRNlglFajWIIExEBKvdlDajytcu2-fBXDAiZv5pPZA_4bdKzCs-keD6v1fhdQUa6OWwVBlS9h316yIiBrfn2S58FW7VE_6BFVZIoIwNY1J_QbKBmSBY-9MFdbqaDhFA8hMMkG8iT7Lkp2dKYUDm-_35Ouowso67yfR3fz-PnlcexhLL_iwu3-aqPVbt1p8FAu3VdGn183UpAE7Rl1dehspzTWuHz7FRL_ZFx0xV2GHKyuJe3q2g7l7V170usP1T1_085XMFWqfHXuSGk41pLMBhxb9Gz6LU0-W_OAhxrahy1D_EE6zNMx2bCTiKvdvFjjg-5RpJ7v3v-ByloBwCB1SfoHq0kIyP6mbIK0Uva6KPUvmGGtNcexKgOLJqxd00xD7NZ2s1MufNRXH2iwnMbKU-WZoHObblkprV79withve3e0LXNbEaJlh1B1NVx5XYDWKSacY-o2kCckQiqKZ3D2e4j3hQgq00WYBCU8n8J97WGJ8XZzOZHNmUYZUf)
**I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations.**[**My plan is to take down one of Pelosi’s most trusted partners before she even knows she’s in trouble. By the time she finds out, I’ll have such a groundswell of grassroots support that it will simply be too late.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5560f3168766442e84bf9dc6d12000e1&_e=kHM2gRNlglFajWIIExEBKvdlDajytcu2-fBXDAiZv5pPZA_4bdKzCs-keD6v1fhdQUa6OWwVBlS9h316yIiBrfn2S58FW7VE_6BFVZIoIwNY1J_QbKBmSBY-9MFdbqaDhFA8hMMkG8iT7Lkp2dKYUDm-_35Ouowso67yfR3fz-PnlcexhLL_iwu3-aqPVbt1p8FAu3VdGn183UpAE7Rl1dehspzTWuHz7FRL_ZFx0xV2GHKyuJe3q2g7l7V170usP1T1_085XMFWqfHXuSGk41pLMBhxb9Gz6LU0-W_OAhypeYpGMBsNzAbVi21Sw2RLt00SMrfW-uUJKSOMFqljx0Vedb8r90tHT8-mMb_Qz1mduEiO9IV-EUfwhf4KLc_Z-YDewLex3ULfuxezx-gekFv9gHgCuzc2XY93ZZWciaMIGCjdO2F7e-mgmDpe1UwqnBAbfm_RcgeecaizMl98w9EBoWxEYD8xhZuW6Rqhhqm0thMPgD44UZoTcxcqmBqt)

[**SUPPORT APRIL BECKER NOW -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5560f3168766442e84bf9dc6d12000e1&_e=kHM2gRNlglFajWIIExEBKvdlDajytcu2-fBXDAiZv5pPZA_4bdKzCs-keD6v1fhdQUa6OWwVBlS9h316yIiBrfn2S58FW7VE_6BFVZIoIwNY1J_QbKBmSBY-9MFdbqaDhFA8hMMkG8iT7Lkp2dKYUDm-_35Ouowso67yfR3fz-PnlcexhLL_iwu3-aqPVbt1p8FAu3VdGn183UpAE7Rl1dehspzTWuHz7FRL_ZFx0xV2GHKyuJe3q2g7l7V170usP1T1_085XMFWqfHXuSGk41pLMBhxb9Gz6LU0-W_OAhxtUqpWTN7FgS_aIwQwqMO9nd1-DQRdWHXBAEXLx9A_s9xhWx4ILZC8dDkK5FsBGX7zzCrcRAr0EUlKfdZWuA8AT9OzMUkhdkq38k40-W9UBRcW8RxVup5T9lZ3LeKAcKGZ9cf4fqlf9R1LPZHJgVGMW3vXpl0ZXiLu_ceadKU0CCwqXvv1WCn_AGlv5XZVnVZFIoL9r9XP1H5gA4MRnplX)
I’m for balanced budgets, lower taxes, less spending, strong borders, and more freedom. I believe the cancer of _“cancel culture”_ is one of the greatest challenges we face, and I’m appalled at how quickly the liberals are trying to erase history. _Abraham Lincoln isn’t even safe!_

I could take another ten emails to tell you why I’m running for Congress, and the issues I care about the most, but I’m sure I’d just be preaching to the choir. So rather than list all of the horrible executive orders and laws being passed by President Biden and Speaker Pelosi, let me leave you with just one thought:

**If you’ll stand by my side and make a contribution today, we can take them down.**

[**Whether you send $25, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or even $1,000 - every dollar makes a difference. I’m Nancy Pelosi’s worst nightmare, and she doesn’t even know it. Join my team, make a donation today and we’ll teach her a lesson she’ll never forget.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5560f3168766442e84bf9dc6d12000e1&_e=kHM2gRNlglFajWIIExEBKvdlDajytcu2-fBXDAiZv5pPZA_4bdKzCs-keD6v1fhdQUa6OWwVBlS9h316yIiBrfn2S58FW7VE_6BFVZIoIwNY1J_QbKBmSBY-9MFdbqaDhFA8hMMkG8iT7Lkp2dKYUDm-_35Ouowso67yfR3fz-PnlcexhLL_iwu3-aqPVbt1p8FAu3VdGn183UpAE7Rl1dehspzTWuHz7FRL_ZFx0xV2GHKyuJe3q2g7l7V170usP1T1_085XMFWqfHXuSGk41pLMBhxb9Gz6LU0-W_OAhz_gDLH30l6MxeZk50VHyQqoRY83XJ35QkDh3EhzPULWDnRmlM6j1vz_uai9cMiI4rcuvcUjIwAs_NmjmA-UKIejsBq5z2D2P9jXMyZAH6WF3pPAHYgi4yydloKICcJ4BpP0MZ1McBesaCXJMcvU24jDAJ1rW6yxqNNJiO83rEpdPThTp50pzVMpMIR0KBtbDMzq4Sn3fC9PMKtPTJguus2)

clean_body: I'm the working mom that's going to take down Pelosi This display proves once again that Democrats will never put Americans FIRST. They want to lock you down again while they party together through the night. They use their status and impalpable power to do as they please while forcing everyday citizens to live under their rules. | Peter, I want you to take a moment to imagine Nancy Pelosi’s worst nightmare: A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, from a swing state like Nevada, defeats a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. This hard-fought victory, in Nevada’s 3rd Congressional District, is the race that finally pries the Speaker’s Gavel from Pelosi’s clenched fist, demoting her to minority leader or better yet – straight into retirement. Just as important, with Republican control of the U.S. House of Representatives, we can now stop President Joe Biden’s radical, socialist agenda dead in its tracks. CNN, MSNBC, the New York Times, and the Washington Post won’t know what to do with themselves... and it will be glorious! All the phony narratives they’ve run since 2015, when Donald J. Trump first announced his campaign for President, will be exposed for the world to see!! AOC and her Squad comrades will be relegated to the back bench of Congress, where they can stew about the results, and figure out a new way to resurrect their grand schemes for American socialism. Or, maybe how to apply for dual citizenship in Venezuela. My name is April Becker, and in addition to running for Congress in Nevada’s 3rd District, I truly am Nancy Pelosi’s worst nightmare.But it’s not why you might think. Right now, Speaker Pelosi is focused on two things: advancing her party’s radical socialist agenda, and protecting her most vocal and vulnerable Democrat colleagues to defend her shrinking majority. I’m not even on her radar.Nor do I want to be. I’m a working mom with three children. I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school. I’m a practicing attorney who donates her time fighting for the underdog and taking on tough cases. I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations. I’m for balanced budgets, lower taxes, less spending, strong borders, and more freedom. I believe the cancer of “cancel culture” is one of the greatest challenges we face, and I’m appalled at how quickly the liberals are trying to erase history. Abraham Lincoln isn’t even safe! I could take another ten emails to tell you why I’m running for Congress, and the issues I care about the most, but I’m sure I’d just be preaching to the choir. So rather than list all of the horrible executive orders and laws being passed by President Biden and Speaker Pelosi, let me leave you with just one thought: If you’ll stand by my side and make a contribution today, we can take them down. Thank you, April Becker Republican for Congress (NV-03) | April Becker is a true Nevada success story. As a working mom with young children, April put herself through college and law school at UNLV. April is the owner of April Becker & Associates law firm and is a top-rated litigator and real estate attorney in Las Vegas. A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, April is the key to flipping a target district in the swing state of Nevada, ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid For By Becker for Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

First, Trump threatened to run for President if Republicans retake the House.

Now, he and his Republicans have $102 MILLION in their war chest to unload during the midterms.

Ever since Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate Glenn Youngkin entered the Virginia Governor’s race, he’s threatened to spend up to $75 million of his own fortune on this election.

In a race as tight as this one, that could spell disaster for Democrats.

I don’t need to remind you that not only have the polls shown that this race is a statistical tie — not only is history against the Democrats in this one — but everyone from top analysts at Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ to Virginia elections guru Larry Sabato say that this will be _**the most competitive race of 2021.**_

Republicans are desperate for a win after the shellacking we gave them in 2020, and the Virginia Governor’s race is their best chance to pick up a high profile victory.

clean_body: | | | = | | I’ve got a really important ask for you right now because we don’t have much time left — = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Ever since Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate Glenn Youngkin entered the Virginia Governor’s race, he’s threatened to spend up to $75 million of his own fortune on this election. In a race as tight as this one, that could spell disaster for Democrats. I don’t need to remind you that not only have the polls shown that this race is a statistical tie — not only is history against the Democrats in this one — but everyone from top analysts at Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight to Virginia elections guru Larry Sabato say that this will be the most competitive race of 2021. Republicans are desperate for a win after the shellacking we gave them in 2020, and the Virginia Governor’s race is their best chance to pick up a high profile victory. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, James Carville = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. body:
#
Peter,
We’re so close to hitting our midnight goal of 250 grassroots donations, but we’re still 73 contributions short.
Here’s why those 73 small dollar donations before midnight are so important: **Pramila is a leading voice for progressives in Congress.** So that means her fundraising reflects the strength (or weakness) of the progressive movement.
We’re in the middle of a critical fight for $3.5 trillion of investments in our people and our environment. That’s universal child care and pre-K, Medicare expansion, climate action, humane immigration reform, paid leave, housing and much more. **We can’t show weakness right now.**
[**So, can you help Pramila lead a strong progressive fight? Make one of the 73 grassroots donations we need by midnight and fuel her work for transformative change. $3 or anything at all will help show the strength of our movement.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210915?refcode=em20210915-636&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=636_420207_20PT8h&akid=636%2E420207%2E20PT8h)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210915?refcode=em20210915-636&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=636_420207_20PT8h&akid=636%2E420207%2E20PT8h)**
Pramila doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money because she has always believed in the power of the grassroots and the power of the people to enact real, lasting change. She relies on supporters like you, chipping in any amount to make a difference.
If we dig deep and reach this goal, we can continue building progressive power in Congress and beyond. But what we’re able to accomplish in the weeks and months ahead hinges on hitting goals like this one.
[**Be one of the 73 supporters we need to contribute now. With so much on the line for working people, we can't afford to fall short.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210915?refcode=em20210915-636&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=636_420207_20PT8h&akid=636%2E420207%2E20PT8h)

Lauren Lalonde, Finance Director
Pramila for Congress

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35844598/306336680/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2UyYWY2Ny04NjE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z0It6d6T1nbve4XHxnf4CUbvoxTv7GJmpc_QzTjyvyI=)
Team — I'll keep this quick. We're still behind on our fundraising goal for tonight's mid-month deadline, and _[**I’m about to ask you to chip in $3 to catch us up**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35844599/306336681/-544172133?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20210915_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2UyYWY2Ny04NjE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z0It6d6T1nbve4XHxnf4CUbvoxTv7GJmpc_QzTjyvyI=)_. I’m the only Senator running for re-election that isn’t taking a cent from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists. I'm working hard to eliminate the influence of Big Money from Washington politics and return power to the voices of folks like you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: More Florida, Less Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Fight the Biden tyranny! |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=cf1855a7cf&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Ranty, dictatorial Biden is back! Apparently, he's trying to distract from his approval rating in the 30s by trying new unconstitutional mandates.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=56482dd2b6&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who never ever will hold Biden accountable!**

Been a rough year for the country under Biden.

Inflation over 8% now (not seen since Carter). A shameful and treacherous Afghanistan withdrawal that left Americans behind enemy lines. A crashing economy. Race problems. A humanitarian disaster on the Southern Border.

No wonder Biden wants to change the topic. There is literally nothing going right and he's destroyed everything he's touched.

So his new thing? Killing American businesses and taking on America's governors, like Gov. DeSantis!
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1c7ad652a2&e=afa21b7626)
---
| _Biden rolled out a slew of measures to boost vaccination rates nationwide, requiring proof of vaccination for federal workers and anyone working at a business with at least 100 employees. If people choose to opt out, they will have to submit to weekly COVID-19 testing, a costly and cumbersome alternative to the free vaccine.

He then turned to take on Gov. DeSantis.

After blasting the nearly 80 million Americans who have not gotten vaccinated, the president turned his ire to GOP governors, particularly Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis and Texas Gov. Greg Abbott.

“To make matters worse, there are elected officials actively working to undermine the fight against COVID-19," he said. "Instead of encouraging people to get vaccinated and mask up, they’re ordering mobile morgues for the unvaccinated dying from COVID in their communities.

"Right now, local school officials are trying to keep children safe in a pandemic while their governor picks a fight with them and even threatens their salaries or their jobs. Talk about bullying in schools," Biden added.

"If they’ll not help, if these governors won’t help us beat the pandemic, I’ll use my power as president to get them out of the way," he threatened.

“How could we get to the point in this country where you would not let them earn a living because of their choice on the vaccine?” DeSantis said. “I just think that’s fundamentally wrong. I do not believe that people should lose their jobs over this issue, and we will fight that.”_

I agree with Gov. DeSantis!

Since the start, Florida has led the way. While Gov. DeSantis has made the vaccine and monoclonal antibodies widely available- over 90% of Florida's most vulnerable seniors have received the vaccine- Florida has refused to mandate action, either masks or vaccines.

As a result, Florida is booming AND we are in the bottom third of states in terms of new infections, and infections per million residents.

As for Biden? Twitter influencer Comfortably Smug put it best:

**_“Two weeks to slow the spread is now ‘give us your two weeks notice,'"_**

Biden is a decrepit tyrant and all states, including Florida, need to fight him. HARD.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=86c718aa2b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **As usual, Florida- and Gov. DeSantis- is leading the way. But my question is, WHERE'S OUR LEADERS IN CONGRESS???**

As Biden flails from one disaster of his own making to another, he's using this unconstitutional power grab- far from the first of his regime- to distract from his failures.

_But why aren't Republicans in Congress speaking up? Why can't they use the power they are given to put a check and balance on this jerk?_

Biden's incompetence will go down in history. He won't last the entire term. But we can stop him from his worst offenses.

We must use the power of Congress to investigate and slow down his agenda. Make it grind to a stop. Use parliamentary procedure. and then take back Congress in 2022 and impeach him AND Kamala!

_I'm not an impotent Swamper. I'm a soldier. I will hold Biden and his sycophants accountable. I will vote to impeach and investigate his corrupt regime. My Democrat opponent, Democrat Darren Soto, will not._

What Biden has done- and keeps doing- is impeachable. We must take back Congress in 2022 and oust this demented fool!

We need to change Congress first. That's the only way we hold him accountable. Right now it's all on the governors, but we need stronger leaders in Congress too! [Help me get elected and impeach Biden!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=dbb14d6c12&e=afa21b7626)

[Will you help me win my congressional seat](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=7db9dc6c20&e=afa21b7626)? I got more votes here than any Republican ever in 2020. It's a red-trending area in a red-trending state! We can win it in 2022.

No more "nice guy" Swampy uniparty politics. Help me get to Congress and impeach him!

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=791f7374cc&e=afa21b7626)

I’m in this race because our democracy is in decline, and my very own representative is leading its degradation.

I’m in this race because my unhinged Republican opponent, Ken Calvert, has wasted the last 30 years of my community’s trust and we can no longer afford empty promises and absent representation.

I’m in this race because we deserve leaders that fight for things like voting rights and healthcare, _not the interests of corporations that line their pockets._

I had to reach out to you one last time, friend. We've got a critical mid-month fundraising deadline coming up at midnight tonight, and I need to let my top supporters know that we're just $1,732 short of our goal.
It's so crucial for us to be in a position to win right now – and the stakes are getting higher every day. I refuse to let the Arizona GOP continue to systematically dismantle all of our basic rights – from the right to vote to the right to choose – without fighting back. I will not rest until we've created an Arizona that has reached its full potential for our children and grandchildren.
That's why it's so important for us to stay on track during big fundraising moments like this. I need to ask you one last time:**Please, friend, can you chip in $5, $25, anything you can spare, to close the gap on our mid-month goal before midnight and fuel our fight to flip Arizona blue? **** **

**Here's the best link to give:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/marco-lopez-for-governor_email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35845413/306345715/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk216-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWNkNjcxYi04YTE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8sVIS-K9PCNhDwj_unjlXZmvgJYpNaa7ADvdUMxkmdQ=)**
Thank you for being by my side in this critical hour,

Marco

I'll lay this out as clearly as I can, friend: My number-one goal is to defeat GOP extremists in Arizona and finally flip our governorship blue – but we can't do that without reaching every goal between now and our election. **[Our next major goal is at midnight on Wednesday, and we won't hit it without you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35845415/306345717/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk216-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWNkNjcxYi04YTE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8sVIS-K9PCNhDwj_unjlXZmvgJYpNaa7ADvdUMxkmdQ=)** **So here are the facts – and what I need you to help me do about them.**
**What we're up against:** Arizona's GOP has totally given up on governing, instead focusing all their energy on spreading lies and conspiracies about the 2020 election. They've pushed a sham "election audit," brought in extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Donald Trump to add fuel to the fire and are gearing up to spend _millions_ of dollars to keep Arizona red.
**What it's led to:** Now, an expert at The Washington Post has made clear that the best way for voters to fight back is by electing a Democratic governor. Meanwhile, Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says this race is a "toss-up," meaning we can win! **But our finance team says it'll take another $3,268 by midnight tonight to stay on track. **
**What YOU can do:** Grassroots supporters like you delivered the White House for Joe Biden and the Senate for Democrats – including a win right here in Arizona. With so much at stake in this race, we need to bring that same energy and dedication _again_ , rallying together to build an unbeatable movement that restores Arizona's potential and flips it blue!
**[So here's what I need from you, friend: Before our major mid-month deadline, can you chip in $5, $25 – whatever you can – to fight back against GOP extremists and win this race? If everyone reading this made a donation, I know we could hit our goal before our midnight deadline – and together, finally defeat GOP extremism in Arizona. But time is running out so please, give now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35845416/306345718/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk216-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWNkNjcxYi04YTE2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8sVIS-K9PCNhDwj_unjlXZmvgJYpNaa7ADvdUMxkmdQ=)**

Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Hispanics were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Hispanic,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, **a proud Hispanic Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ab3aebb4afb145f3b0c7087ede78402b&_e=qXcQQVNcIsrW9opHs1vNxVCSnOs12VNDcb8KyRipqpa6OAlltd_xdk958hmKgq4D43BZoj-ipODy4nwixHiE-zmDY2zuZxJEtvN9a5g295b5ZdAX_Keq_Ds1xVFfSYKjG-YrZxkI829g-wtJuWGo3yTET-W4eDwHdYQf-Kg1JUOp0kpd9w8VSAamv2nBb5YmBJnAegGXEnCI3i_poB85fWihY2n1M2cAbVll9yc3AzOKgLwK4ObCPYF-9W1Men170LYLSVAE92mwKHHOIyaNRVcRwnYPAal95SyE6AJBjFtsZHKlOWH74tMEBW2l58KnPcv1gWvyGsYszlcIRuopxeANfjOcw5F_I-c0UcLbMNLjChlKyTkv6cuegboadBRokbuYPNwmtWI9L0SkZWL9jcsspOZv2Mq9kHJgbs4xNxWGi70F9sUMmxeXh0yqe2Lpn8EhDlqF0uh6lT9J5xZJg61_GPqrhfXeyqKaHlCvuE4%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanic's⇒ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ab3aebb4afb145f3b0c7087ede78402b&_e=qXcQQVNcIsrW9opHs1vNxVCSnOs12VNDcb8KyRipqpa6OAlltd_xdk958hmKgq4D43BZoj-ipODy4nwixHiE-zmDY2zuZxJEtvN9a5g295b5ZdAX_Keq_Ds1xVFfSYKjG-YrZxkI829g-wtJuWGo3yTET-W4eDwHdYQf-Kg1JUOp0kpd9w8VSAamv2nBb5YmBJnAegGXEnCI3i_poB85fWihY2n1M2cAbVll9yc3AzOKgLwK4ObCPYF-9W1Men170LYLSVAE92mwKHHOIyaNRROTrmhUCL2Klf2WgYbeLcyFdIgigo366G6J8xkbHInHKnJxPVtCXdDobr2laov5HEty_v7iPtc8m55R0EeY1JUlh0cSUHhzt8koQ1p46cKpf7G9N3sCHBGtBfZ8W3i2WthlNf4m0AqNRC1qylO8m3VU5H9UhGfcge6HZMoj4PnrJ2V1ijLTyewhAyNg2yEewWrjJmVXWXiq-pMCax4-8Hc%3D)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Hispanics?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ab3aebb4afb145f3b0c7087ede78402b&_e=qXcQQVNcIsrW9opHs1vNxVCSnOs12VNDcb8KyRipqpa6OAlltd_xdk958hmKgq4D43BZoj-ipODy4nwixHiE-zmDY2zuZxJEtvN9a5g295b5ZdAX_Keq_Ds1xVFfSYKjG-YrZxkI829g-wtJuWGo3yTET-W4eDwHdYQf-Kg1JUOp0kpd9w8VSAamv2nBb5YmBJnAegGXEnCI3i_poB85fWihY2n1M2cAbVll9yc3AzOKgLwK4ObCPYF-9W1Men170LYLSVAE92mwKHHOIyaNRcSViseEgeicoyKfuszqo_IVu5dm1vh1pnJAPW194EUgA9LBVvcWW4mOmwaYj6kIVBPmBZFmCB9NTcEfabJShD3ZSFkoY6ece9QlAutYOOv-vsdC5IClsM0nXGZ_optpv3jS5eILG-YPukWxksykvnZHgWK6bw4Zz-M1vAKjYZmns8_68KhJTfcwIr12-6a7GNeDjtjsgisp_iOkdfsxEyg%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanic's ⇒ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ab3aebb4afb145f3b0c7087ede78402b&_e=qXcQQVNcIsrW9opHs1vNxVCSnOs12VNDcb8KyRipqpa6OAlltd_xdk958hmKgq4D43BZoj-ipODy4nwixHiE-zmDY2zuZxJEtvN9a5g295b5ZdAX_Keq_Ds1xVFfSYKjG-YrZxkI829g-wtJuWGo3yTET-W4eDwHdYQf-Kg1JUOp0kpd9w8VSAamv2nBb5YmBJnAegGXEnCI3i_poB85fWihY2n1M2cAbVll9yc3AzOKgLwK4ObCPYF-9W1Men170LYLSVAE92mwKHHOIyaNRZU_r20xMrle-td-Lo2tKdBReY1EDwIwC68BaAZ8nrPavHyLVcZc_wDhivupbUPy2y1ktjY9uK8c2TjXOeNeElcdPQW_udHW7zaj-XRV551sMUabuvbwIaH_eEDAGwyHH8nv5XWc0vyDTBdr8ShFEf186o1lOR1N2WSCYribhEF-EVBGMAmWgcs2OvFP5sDycKMhn6ljauBSUjG2w4ANQ3w%3D)
Culturally, Hispanics are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Hispanic communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ab3aebb4afb145f3b0c7087ede78402b&_e=qXcQQVNcIsrW9opHs1vNxVCSnOs12VNDcb8KyRipqpa6OAlltd_xdk958hmKgq4D43BZoj-ipODy4nwixHiE-zmDY2zuZxJEtvN9a5g295b5ZdAX_Keq_Ds1xVFfSYKjG-YrZxkI829g-wtJuWGo3yTET-W4eDwHdYQf-Kg1JUOp0kpd9w8VSAamv2nBb5YmBJnAegGXEnCI3i_poB85fWihY2n1M2cAbVll9yc3AzOKgLwK4ObCPYF-9W1Men170LYLSVAE92mwKHHOIyaNReDc6WybstMQDuzhr9mIY_mz5gCRfMVR1WYgGL4zr-3H2xy_MvkSbvU2LVVUFjgWnnpDz0IVh5l0Jedf4pYG7vqHxzd3KUw5cUfUv7BD8YROzPQr1YWpmSazLR895_FdnbfN06Nm5XTNelFb1Sle8e08xjbja3xC10_AUXOc0zcUaArHGbI0s-fmPZuuINCAWOz9gmCcZdz8GSxYDnuur44%3D)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
Republican for Congress

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ab3aebb4afb145f3b0c7087ede78402b&_e=qXcQQVNcIsrW9opHs1vNxVCSnOs12VNDcb8KyRipqpa6OAlltd_xdk958hmKgq4D43BZoj-ipODy4nwixHiE-zmDY2zuZxJEtvN9a5g295b5ZdAX_Keq_Ds1xVFfSYKjG-YrZxkI829g-wtJuWGo3yTET-W4eDwHdYQf-Kg1JUOp0kpd9w8VSAamv2nBb5YmBJnAegGXEnCI3i_poB85fWihY2n1M2cAbVll9yc3AzOKgLwK4ObCPYF-9W1Men170LYLSVAE92mwKHHOIyaNRXZN5E7PATz9AYwOt32aGdCsRCSPfzuATZuimhEzR3OQ1KTAaT2Sanqzarkzs4qhQ78zjBwB_Wvzv3KilkXuuav8r4UgctkIVnc_Cv4D_d_DRhhFkLsxrqPGEN0HonRX7YRbpoyjNPzRYeVcdpCfLLBjQK_5Itdu4B-vNdpm_Z_BR-FBEIL9yequ83nRdLBDV3B1qKhCH2NS9urBFwXNbxY%3D)

Thank you again for fighting for Gavin Newsom and California’s Democrats. Your support is invaluable.

name: Jan. 6 Commission Survey
subject: Do you support the Jan. 6 Commission, Derek?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
We need to hold insurrectionists accountable | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGKXWAA8SjDCbm30GMPiJH5MvuqLdo5bNLkJTryIHk8wTj25W7NQX0MFkQaX99E5yVjHi1D3dvsHJhcn410O_HOsi2k5HfX7JlHLjNB_fkw0CnckXd-P7MhLVhylh9R6vX5QrHZrOk5rC8sAfmMJXHVl0eEhKlRy1MMJg7PQMlScoMQS3ZD7cr4gWPfqLymAD0Sv3oAWxtKs9XITPhLI6mZYX_IcIb2Ecq98_auSuTOoaWq7HOGeo7v8ig7rdT9ErldAQXcqxz-qME2Vpvk2gO2nuogb-YSeEZL14oiNxiCrlR8Re110FZNTsyQxYxKkEh8uqoy9Py5Xzlr_uczYj_mrDTqsDlzIhQ2UqlWRY_7IE/3fc/sIFhO0tgSgmP4uN3nV1liw/h0/TuLoLdTH4jtLsTqlOG_ylB4GiDqithFWhcLj2VVh4oE)
On January 6th, 2021, violent insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol, putting a bedrock principle of our democracy -- the peaceful transfer of power -- at risk. They were inspired by Donald Trump’s lies and egged on by extremists like Ted Cruz.

Despite the tragic outcome, Republicans keep doubling down on Trump’s anti-democratic lies.

_That’s what makes the January 6 Commission so important. We have to understand why the insurrection happened so we can stop one from ever happening again._

Republicans across the country continue to sabotage our elections. In state after state, they are introducing racist voter suppression bills to stop people from voting. Peter,

This week is a pivotal moment in our fight to stop Democrats from forever transforming America.

_**Let me explain:**_
Democrats know they can't get 60 votes in the U.S. Senate to pass MASS AMNESTY for millions of illegal immigrants. So, they've rammed it into their $3.5 trillion "budget" bill and are hoping YOU won't notice -- and their deadline for moving this forward is on Friday.

This $3.5 trillion debacle has nothing to do with the "budget" and everything to do with changing America as we know it -- and mass amnesty would do exactly that.

**It would encourage more illegal immigration, crush wages for working Americans, and lead to more violent crime.**

Thanks to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, we already have basically open borders and immigration enforcement has been ended. We can't give them mass amnesty too -- but it's up to Patriots like you to stand with me to keep up the pressure.

[**Please, stop what you're doing now and help us fight back by winning the Senate in 2022 ⟩⟩**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=9c676c16cf674d1883547820d920f01d&_e=hWM2JY5DUUKCLX_FQl380ys_SN8oZBmBxW5zMWs7Dn2nXgw325H8facu5Izq0iroUeBBtg5BSCzIZxszfvaTLgWHn5PlOyZXho3-zh7LB5SsGGtsXtA4yeNQe9vRzXb_KR4wXrZUkhSifJKG2y7981pwpC2vcsINfJNju6XltFRtnkNgAgtEPntWDgxlxYihIwgKOdvC-R0znmKZCrPr6Ey2psmdxO_voLHxMGSFG4SEGbUqc1RFsYjoLynaKO-EqEmovlSV4-1YOFqL-RyUT80gtpQwArm_5c2Eu2OnFQtg-sQYkBhHfFviqD4SiLnCMkvhe1X6f2bkkPk4F6-Cnq03hiwTCzAmWWRpdzbm_G8OO78bxs2bO4LkwaeRO9oWpchirx_dU0VJ9aKYpqE6uqXX1rGzKDSxCUui3nIECqDKTNvvKqELmPzCV_XaM72PcDAAJ36HdE0FMNqgwYjiDnI7xrJI4Ox-2zeCNRuG8zM%3D)

clean_body: *FINAL CALL FOR FUNDRAISING If we don’t act quickly, we won’t reach our goal. We just need 51 PATRIOTS to help us reach our goal and stay in the FIGHT against Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left. The House Conservatives Fund is working to get CONSERVATIVES into the House. Our members will support America First policies and hold Joe Biden accountable. It's important to hold America First values such as BACK THE BLUE: America’s police officers are under attack for DOING THEIR JOBS by BLM and their left wing supporters. We back our police who stand for LAW and ORDER. SECURING THE BORDER: A country isn’t a country without control over its borders. Right now, Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi have thrown our Southern Border wide open. We must STOP it. UNLEASHING AMERICAN GREATNESS: President Trump built the greatest economy our country had seen in 40 years. Joe Biden and the Democrats have LOCKED US DOWN and left us with inflation, joblessness and homelessness. The Left are destroying our country. House Conservatives are working to elect conservatives who will work to fix America. Thank you, House Conservatives Fund Founded in 1997, the House Conservatives Fund (HCF) has been the political arm of the Republican Study Committee (RSC), the largest caucus of conservatives in Congress. For more than two decades, HCF has been pursuing its mission of electing and retaining members who are committed to our core conservative principles. HCF’s current roster of 140 members understands that our mission has never been more urgent than it is today. House Conservatives Fund . | | | | | ****CONFIDENTIAL MEMO DELETE - AFTER READING****
**FIRST** : Pelosi and the Radical Left OUTRAISED and OUTSPENT freedom-loving patriots by MILLIONS - _tilting the odds of victory in her favor._

**THEN** : The latest poll said the fate of the House Majority will be decided by ONE POINT - _that 's within the margin of error_. **[Patriot, this means whether or not we win or lose will be decided by the SMALLEST of margins... making hitting our goals critically important.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ed1ed07b418543c0bb7994d744e29cca&_e=0JK6kyWty5ivmRruypHXylDpGhUXAkoTnCwOCCNnDQdtGsabP_TKS9_cuEdlAjPItLcRkehwPV8wPUDdhf_eLGbDPrA-C6OaWCxli8UnoeDR_vLDwbEtn76Vn-kqzvMrx4AyB2NQN3lPgGisEctk_hFWhkiLbtI2WyxVkZcmN6xAG6gjGkOyt2iPyamUq5vlAeIaU1Ed9zioQMvA0nDo73-injxqR5XnzXHyMY-_T05AeXqNZ5QGwbbOyEB906rKcuR3pC1oDpMZAHv6Y47Z8lzqG9PRizwCA5MJ0VXCAW6xbBG7a4v_TU6CLFOZSTbMIEhiyDp0Qy5dgSAujKaEuSZQ_NzDYZQ2aw0CzTSb6yCidD388gIugM9bjJBSzOPl9V2Sni-o7mhqV5OSJNNQsFIK9qHH4Pwb-w_dWri6FPog3flGm2N3UAq8lqdukFxRKHirArW_ugGCdngIAZvqMONoAT6f0R9MaM9YTDu6tFIzf62Za4PzzNNGk7oq9nQcrz0gbllZvhRoF68iHY5ngw%3D%3D "Patriot, this means whether or not we win or lose will be decided by the SMALLEST of margins... making hitting our goals critically important.")**

**NOW** : Nancy Pelosi has announced she is launching "the biggest defense ever known in modern history to protect every single one of [her] Democrats." Pelosi already has MILLIONS in her back pocket and an entire Rolodex of dark money donors. _Which makes the following even more devastating..._

**EVEN WORSE** : We are going to MISS our CRITICAL mid-month deadline. This is a CRUSHING BLOW to conservatives across the nation and puts victory in jeopardy. Pelosi's already raising record sums. _**As of right now, we do not have the funds to fight back.**_

I can't, in good faith, sit idle and let Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left destroy our nation. I can't, in good faith, not act knowing we need just FIVE SEATS to take back the House. **[That's why today, I'm asking for your support.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ed1ed07b418543c0bb7994d744e29cca&_e=0JK6kyWty5ivmRruypHXylDpGhUXAkoTnCwOCCNnDQdtGsabP_TKS9_cuEdlAjPItLcRkehwPV8wPUDdhf_eLGbDPrA-C6OaWCxli8UnoeDR_vLDwbEtn76Vn-kqzvMrx4AyB2NQN3lPgGisEctk_hFWhkiLbtI2WyxVkZcmN6xAG6gjGkOyt2iPyamUq5vlAeIaU1Ed9zioQMvA0nDo73-injxqR5XnzXHyMY-_T05AeXqNZ5QGwbbOyEB906rKcuR3pC1oDpMZAHv6Y47Z8lzqG9PRizwCA5MJ0VXCAW6xbBG7a4v_TU6CLFOZSTbM50UTq2Bl57zKTm-qpmPDRKshOmtOXcdaHzGRZbSEkGiFXkjeLBRlw4-N6vPAD1uU3iMo0RWvcKXKRSa5Uv6Dw7EjeLprM2ii7azYA50rO5fDrGuefKgz487Ac1TtkilFFD2IUusPqNANJv7ngo5YuGb0zK36zq0xRUnUuQcAEtQ5BbBgisaBdIsddrIpYYNfww-RFLTJNBzFTHw_N0QKew%3D%3D "That’s why today, I’m asking for your support.")**

**[Can I count on you to chip in just $5 right now to close the fundraising gap? If every person who gets this chips in $5, we will have the necessary resources to take Pelosi on and WIN.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ed1ed07b418543c0bb7994d744e29cca&_e=0JK6kyWty5ivmRruypHXylDpGhUXAkoTnCwOCCNnDQdtGsabP_TKS9_cuEdlAjPItLcRkehwPV8wPUDdhf_eLGbDPrA-C6OaWCxli8UnoeDR_vLDwbEtn76Vn-kqzvMrx4AyB2NQN3lPgGisEctk_hFWhkiLbtI2WyxVkZcmN6xAG6gjGkOyt2iPyamUq5vlAeIaU1Ed9zioQMvA0nDo73-injxqR5XnzXHyMY-_T05AeXqNZ5QGwbbOyEB906rKcuR3pC1oDpMZAHv6Y47Z8lzqG9PRizwCA5MJ0VXCAW6xbBG7a4v_TU6CLFOZSTbMLXeDCNeOkEJReYAb-8_hmMx-rmOCDLOAqtrYFe-dlWCgnwmXb5VmaR3rt4Esw_4bqEXxrrvQ9YNL2A6qfW0f9Y2VUHPXB0MXTLJNd8PFYNB8e6ZimOek200-Zyikom_33SAvL4t-z0ePTiGb4NQzbtCwgmt4NcM7huk8HXXyHOJoOuH6ZbrYLlIm83EGp_xZN41aqaaZaE92VwuSFwLqIw%3D%3D "Can I count on you to chip in just $5 right now to close the fundraising gap? If every person who gets this chips in $5, we will have the necessary resources to take Pelosi on and WIN.") But if even a single patriot ignores this call to action, we will lose the House for good.**

Patriot, we have NEVER been better positioned to take back the House. And I know with your support, we can make it happen. BUT, missing our goal even ONE TIME is a DEVASTATING BLOW.

**[So, can I count on you to rush in $5 right now?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ed1ed07b418543c0bb7994d744e29cca&_e=0JK6kyWty5ivmRruypHXylDpGhUXAkoTnCwOCCNnDQdtGsabP_TKS9_cuEdlAjPItLcRkehwPV8wPUDdhf_eLGbDPrA-C6OaWCxli8UnoeDR_vLDwbEtn76Vn-kqzvMrx4AyB2NQN3lPgGisEctk_hFWhkiLbtI2WyxVkZcmN6xAG6gjGkOyt2iPyamUq5vlAeIaU1Ed9zioQMvA0nDo73-injxqR5XnzXHyMY-_T05AeXqNZ5QGwbbOyEB906rKcuR3pC1oDpMZAHv6Y47Z8lzqG9PRizwCA5MJ0VXCAW6xbBG7a4v_TU6CLFOZSTbMP1avLLyxFoo-9LYlTb3EE3p8qfveebASkYK1wBz-qCRA2QcAVO6tg0AYIavSy0Uq8xUlPZi0MzmMNUZMXsOqzbGCZLOqXLroeN6nEXdSXF65gV_Ku7_kRgKp_BNmR0UWurBBTTwebLQuTNnW9hREbTNmFUO-AgdwiAsrcJHs2YbRC7QkvQE3ccE3MHPX23dVkN8R47lRmueu98QCjOK_TQ%3D%3D "So, can I count on you to rush in $5 right now?")** We're running out of time to make up lost ground.

name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: Help Erica Smith challenge the status quo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Just look at what happened in North Carolina 2020.
#
**Campaign fundraising for progressive Democratic women in North Carolina hasn’t exactly been _historically sexy._**
Just look at what happened in North Carolina 2020. The Democratic establishment nominated a milquetoast, moderate male candidate for U.S. Senate. They raised more than $25 MILLION — and still lost to the GOP.
[**_Will you help Erica Smith challenge the status quo and post the strongest FEC report possible at the end of the month? Can you make a $5 donation to our campaign right now? We’re about $1,769 away from getting back on track._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14816?refcode=em20210915-444&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=444%2E3698%2EWTLPkJ)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/14816?refcode=em20210915-444&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=444%2E3698%2EWTLPkJ)**
When we say we need your grassroots support, we really mean it. **According to the Center for Responsive Politics, Black women candidates raise on average about HALF of what white candidates raise.**
That’s why a $5 contribution today is so important. Not only will it help close our $1,769 fundraising gap. It gives Erica Smith a fighting chance at uniting all North Carolinians as the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate — something a milquetoast, moderate male candidate can't do.

Folks,

Yesterday, the voters of California showed loud and clear that Trump-aligned candidates are not winners here in the Golden State.

**So why do we continue to put up with Trump’s favorite Congressman: Kevin McCarthy?[Chip in any amount today to help me send McCarthy into early retirement.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLoMlWftfe6n0Lnuy4IcA77L-taVFv96WFHXUshDv7vQ8O98-PzwBxH0MgMbK3fctrQ5jvHQcb3_pyYLf0XEPLEvLUzZfyy6kGnlzbtKMZZpVFemk9k1URvXeyL2ZabB_Y8eXrvkZslZfiNsHZ2aLDIl4Jf0PkOYNOKO4Zu0Szibdpvjgs_5Z5j3VSNpXmMJEew31Hues3zgxRXOGk4ho_PN_7XDIg9FZKZL7fm1uTLUU2kL-EacArMbrdEAweVGjufJq6NSk7MYTy2gJsR5OF8l1Vg2OYmNdmSDZaVcrZIQm_sxbbsmD41X-uhMEE5LMZSKcNYsNUM_TocaHH4IYoFXA/3fc/1SWG3uE6RpG-yTkeLR9Iog/h1/zMKMrql_lO3hChBi9325wZMnr8AF_LJPCS4UZFkmyMw)**

But as long as leaders like Kevin McCarthy continue to defy the wishes of Californians, we’ll never be able to take on the issues that matter most. **SENATOR TOM COTTON** |

Fellow Conservative,

This week is a pivotal moment in our fight to stop Democrats from forever transforming America.

_**Let me explain:**_
Democrats know they can't get 60 votes in the U.S. Senate to pass MASS AMNESTY for millions of illegal immigrants. So, they've rammed it into their $3.5 trillion "budget" bill and are hoping YOU won't notice -- and their deadline for moving this forward is on Friday.

I've been sounding the alarm. And it's clearer than ever that we need you to join us in the fight to retake the Senate in 2022.

[**Please use this secure link to make an emergency donation of $25, $50, or even $100 to help Republican Senators take back the Senate ⟩⟩**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d17bec7f3834baf9080bd28138eb24d&_e=By9i9HhF1noaYYCMLTPYyuSJohmsLKtSkXxUpF0l7OEpLPrtyYY5Sso43mhqneEFeI6ulNRt1vWKxxoesJYEOXcB-Ks4sLbEi00-lIEMvIaaQHKvKEHWN0WIQPCHa1Z2BVBKEaqKJR6m1-AyWx_QrcXZjWmCxjNt96k32yiKxDiMjnHgKiC9azfOtkRh1D4fgQtXmPc8XqnWNWJR-MjY4RbrDeg3k8FRXdYNyfmejLm-4XWtW2rYgHUmv88lhkbc_oJb0duh6w4nQqax6nQuwUDJ7IsvQK3dr0Q7BQdOov9pj87MnQKBFIRsdXrfPgEqK5dKsVWVbTwPVDLiL12wIrPONGDUTx9DQ8bYLf9CnZGXHXjyPrB6wlqkJWyAiMBvbfVLwOjxlYihBvr36t2oGpbC0LaRqwM_vin07tEcX3FH4Hk0PIuDRwyGcuTnm0UrY6jLFVh-zVXNWw8AW1GlLsYHBmysw9ORRijT7DCUa8A%3D)

This $3.5 trillion debacle has nothing to do with the "budget" and everything to do with changing America as we know it -- and mass amnesty would do exactly that.

**It would encourage more illegal immigration, crush wages for working Americans, and lead to more violent crime.**

Thanks to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, we already have basically open borders and immigration enforcement has been ended. We can't give them mass amnesty too -- but it's up to Patriots like you to stand with me to keep up the pressure.

[**Please, stop what you're doing now and help us fight back by winning the Senate in 2022 ⟩⟩**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d17bec7f3834baf9080bd28138eb24d&_e=By9i9HhF1noaYYCMLTPYyuSJohmsLKtSkXxUpF0l7OEpLPrtyYY5Sso43mhqneEFeI6ulNRt1vWKxxoesJYEOXcB-Ks4sLbEi00-lIEMvIaaQHKvKEHWN0WIQPCHa1Z2BVBKEaqKJR6m1-AyWx_QrcXZjWmCxjNt96k32yiKxDiMjnHgKiC9azfOtkRh1D4fgQtXmPc8XqnWNWJR-MjY4RbrDeg3k8FRXdYNyfmejLm-4XWtW2rYgHUmv88lhkbc_oJb0duh6w4nQqax6nQuwfZOzdke51OsTEPZOYyEEIFXhLA0bUbn3zO1VrCNyh5SNIoFEq_rREuf2V3tzZNi5mpMuJqpefgibm14BA15nu8yO1OO-qrKWCUNtvupFBUVHyX3Mn2p8G8WjAEb-BM0mMPbQmC2WQvWYUSmAj9PG38jIFs0a6JmeS4Ph6a33ASQQ_3s-hYAYzMT6PrlTBDw1ZFdzJIsLKQf2wd5Kjz5v6Y%3D)

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: we thought you deserved an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
If you live or have been in Arizona for even a few hours, you know the ads against us are already relentless.
#

$3.
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make before midnight.
We’re running a mid-month fundraising drive because we started September so slowly, and since this is an FEC deadline month we HAVE to catch up — and we’re not there yet.
If that’s all you need to hear before chipping in, use this link:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210915-2-15&t=1&refcode2=1346_6688874_bzus_8&akid=1346%2E6688874%2Ebzus_8)
Otherwise, let us explain why this request is so important:
When our FEC fundraising deadline ends, we’re legally required to report not just how much money we’ve raised, but we’ll also release the number of donations we’ve received.
These donations are critical.
Because if you live, or have even just been in Arizona for a few days, you know the ads against us are already relentless.
That’s why this ask is so important. Especially before midnight:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to help Mark Kelly before our mid-month fundraising drive ends at midnight tonight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210915-2-15&t=2&refcode2=1346_6688874_bzus_8&akid=1346%2E6688874%2Ebzus_8)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210915-2-15&t=3&refcode2=1346_6688874_bzus_8&akid=1346%2E6688874%2Ebzus_8)**
Mark simply cannot do this alone.
— Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=1346%2E6688874%2Ebzus_8).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

Thanks to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, we already have basically open borders and immigration enforcement has been ended. We can't give them mass amnesty too -- but it's up to Patriots like you to stand with me to keep up the pressure. In service, Tom Cotton If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. body:
Of all of Joe Biden’s failures, this may be the worst. | | | | |

| Peter,

Of all Joe Biden’s failures, this may be the worst.

The military was bringing home the bodies of the heroes who died in the Kabul suicide bombing. Honoring the fallen is a solemn ritual, and one of any president’s highest duties. The president stands for all Americans – in respect, grief, and gratitude for the sacrifice of our fallen protectors.

**Joe apparently had other places he wanted to be.**

He was so bored and impatient with the ceremony that he was _caught checking the time_ : one final insult from a failed commander-in-chief to the heroes he betrayed.

The disaster in Afghanistan is Joe Biden’s fault. His appointees are incompetent. Even his military commanders seem to care more about woke politics than winning wars and keeping Americans safe.

_**Joe Biden and his woke socialist comrades want to recreate America in their own image: arrogant, condescending, dishonorable, dishonest, petulant, and cruel.**_

[**These liberals must be stopped!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=fb16138753&e=b2c16e6198)

No one election can undo the harm Biden’s contemptuous ineptitude has wrought. But the Democrats’ corruption does show us how important every election is now.

Next year, there will be 435 elections for seats in the U.S. House of Representatives. And in every single race, there is really just one question: _Do you want someone to serve Joe Biden’s malignant incompetence or someone to serve the United States of America?_

[**Join the fight to save America. Support and expand the House Freedom Caucus now!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=754bccab6a&e=b2c16e6198)

**The House Freedom Caucus is the group of conservatives in Congress who work together to fight for America's future. They put principle ahead of their party and fight for less government and more freedom for all Americans.**

The 2022 congressional races are already underway. Across the country, principled conservatives are challenging woke socialist Democrats and Establishment Republicans. Both parties in D.C. are trying to hide this fact, but 2022 is shaping up to be the biggest anti-Washington election in history.

**We can't blow this opportunity.** That's why the House Freedom Fund is already on the ground in several districts and vetting candidates in dozens more. It’s not enough to make this a Republican wave election – it must be an America First tsunami.

[**Give now to help secure America's future!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=cadd73e0e6&e=b2c16e6198)

Don’t let Joe Biden’s insult stand. Answer it today with a contribution to the House Freedom Fund. With your help, Biden and his cronies won’t have to check their watches anymore. They’ll have plenty of time for all sorts of things when they’re out of office.

Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to promote conservative leadership in Washington.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
House Freedom Fund

clean_body: Of all of Joe Biden’s failures, this may be the worst. | | | | | Can't read this? | | | | | | | | | | Peter, Of all Joe Biden’s failures, this may be the worst. The military was bringing home the bodies of the heroes who died in the Kabul suicide bombing. Honoring the fallen is a solemn ritual, and one of any president’s highest duties. The president stands for all Americans – in respect, grief, and gratitude for the sacrifice of our fallen protectors. Joe apparently had other places he wanted to be. He was so bored and impatient with the ceremony that he was caught checking the time : one final insult from a failed commander-in-chief to the heroes he betrayed. The disaster in Afghanistan is Joe Biden’s fault. His appointees are incompetent. Even his military commanders seem to care more about woke politics than winning wars and keeping Americans safe. Joe Biden and his woke socialist comrades want to recreate America in their own image: arrogant, condescending, dishonorable, dishonest, petulant, and cruel. No one election can undo the harm Biden’s contemptuous ineptitude has wrought. But the Democrats’ corruption does show us how important every election is now. Next year, there will be 435 elections for seats in the U.S. House of Representatives. And in every single race, there is really just one question: Do you want someone to serve Joe Biden’s malignant incompetence or someone to serve the United States of America? The House Freedom Caucus is the group of conservatives in Congress who work together to fight for America's future. They put principle ahead of their party and fight for less government and more freedom for all Americans. The 2022 congressional races are already underway. Across the country, principled conservatives are challenging woke socialist Democrats and Establishment Republicans. Both parties in D.C. are trying to hide this fact, but 2022 is shaping up to be the biggest anti-Washington election in history. We can't blow this opportunity. That's why the House Freedom Fund is already on the ground in several districts and vetting candidates in dozens more. It’s not enough to make this a Republican wave election – it must be an America First tsunami. Don’t let Joe Biden’s insult stand. Answer it today with a contribution to the House Freedom Fund. With your help, Biden and his cronies won’t have to check their watches anymore. They’ll have plenty of time for all sorts of things when they’re out of office. Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to promote conservative leadership in Washington. name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: Stop the Mandate Madness!
body:
| | | | Sleepy Joe is about to get a real wake up call!
---
---
Dear Peter,
Attorney General Patrick Morrisey is out in front nationally fighting against mandates.
He released an important state legal opinion late last week pushing back against mandates and then announced today he expects to be in federal court challenging the ill-conceived and unconstitutional Biden mandates as early as next week!
President Biden thinks he can ignore the law and our Constitution. But he can’t.
Sleepy Joe is about to get a real wake up call. Republican attorneys general are coming together to fight against this overreaching executive.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jacobs=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Biden has failed
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/69a5cfd1058d/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-4963674?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
| **_President Biden has failed our nation._**

**He caused devastation in Afghanistan, putting American citizens and our allies directly in harm's way.** His hasty withdrawal handed Afghanistan over to the Taliban, which will only give rise to the resurgence of terror organizations.

**He’s left our southern border open to criminals and illegal drugs that are entering our nation in record numbers.** The last five months we have seen record breaking illegal entries, and we can only expect those numbers to keep going up.

**He canceled the Keystone pipeline, destroyed our energy independence, and recently BEGGED OPEC for additional oil.** That’s right, Biden begged middle eastern countries that are state sponsors of terrorism to give us oil while he kills our ability to produce it here.

A presidency that started as gaffes, blunders, and a socialist wishlist, has **_quickly devolved into a President who is a danger to our nation. _**

Biden has proved in just eight months that we cannot trust democrats with the keys to our country. **He’s not asleep at the wheel - he's actively heading for a cliff. **

We CANNOT allow this any longer. Right now, we are stuck with incompetent President for over THREE YEARS. That’s why we need the house back immediately. We NEED to take back the house in 2022 - our nation is in dire straits.

[**_I know I can count on you in what is one of the most important times in our lifetime. Biden is a danger and Nancy Pelosi is enabling him. She’s letting him run our country into the ground, we need to FIRE HER._**](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=0195d240b5&e=13f35c4add)

name: John Fetterman
subject: *Veeeery* short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’ve gotta stay on track every step of the way.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210915-2655-header&t=1&akid=2655%2E434096%2EcLo46o)
Peter,
I promise I'll keep this _veeeery_ short:
We're just a couple hours away from our mid-month fundraising deadline, and a few hundred bucks shy of where we need to be in order to keep our September fundraising on track.
[**_Will you donate your first $5 to our campaign before midnight so we can build a campaign that truly lifts up every voice in every one of PA's 67 counties?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30061?refcode=em20210915-2655&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2655%2E434096%2EcLo46o)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30061?refcode=em20210915-2655&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2655%2E434096%2EcLo46o)**
Look, keeping our fundraising on track *every* step of the way is important. Maybe even more important than the Pirates beating the Reds tonight (you get the idea, Peter).
**After all, at the end of the month, I am required by Federal Elections Committee law to make our latest fundraising numbers completely public.** From there, everyone and anyone will be able to see how much money we raised, and make judgments about how strong our campaign is.
This is the final time you'll hear from my team and me ahead of tonight's mid-month deadline, so I've just gotta ask one more time:
[**_Will you chip in $5 or more before the September mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30061?refcode=em20210915-2655&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2655%2E434096%2EcLo46o)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30061?refcode=em20210915-2655&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=41&akid=2655%2E434096%2EcLo46o)**
Thank you,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210915-2655-footer&t=42&refcode2=2655_434096_cLo46o&akid=2655%2E434096%2EcLo46o)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: Leave no man behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRED KELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_m=a776aab56008424db05cd3b81d41ee3e&_e=mpjQWEe9ROyC0ByZ7J_kN8LDZ1c6wiDkPpQHKIKWLBI0D3CYGzVUD2uVIMQtwDdLJ4alGfWHf1ktFEJN7NysX9NaJtdf2CS2BMV3fJHGfBCmBI1PlCcFUC0FGnTgFleTSEzhm-UPSj0fWN_UyEl9DwaKhLOQ3HJq5QbFI5M1xsVAa6V2ANkuo6RoICsGVNVBU-qtHKCrDNRkrpYS-2A5WmqHUFtTOp8voOApjwT975gu7-gPnKSZpvWA53kxw1_0inG5-OOz4xwto_BoB8aveXs-r75qv-XLZSPZy799pvg0VTlDSh5sJjnU3eTQbBHP)
---
| Friend, 11 years ago this week, when I was serving as a bomb technician under Joint Special Operations Command in the Army, my life changed forever. I lost both legs and a finger when a roadside bomb blew up beneath me while in the Kandahar region of Afghanistan.

If it weren’t for the bravery and selflessness of my fellow soldiers, and the grace of God, _I very well could have lost my life_.

What I remember most clearly from that day is my fellow soldiers sprinting towards the bomb instead of away from my motionless body. They rushed in the direction where an explosive device had just detonated, putting their own lives in danger to save mine.

While I may have lost my ability to continue being an asset on the battlefield that day, I didn’t lose my drive to keep fighting for our amazing country. So, I learned to walk again, graduated from college and set my sights on a new mission: restoring America First greatness to the United States.

On this anniversary of that explosion, will you help me win this latest battle for the future of our country?
---
| [JOIN THE FIGHT](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_m=a776aab56008424db05cd3b81d41ee3e&_e=mpjQWEe9ROyC0ByZ7J_kN8LDZ1c6wiDkPpQHKIKWLBI0D3CYGzVUD2uVIMQtwDdLJ4alGfWHf1ktFEJN7NysX9NaJtdf2CS2BMV3fJHGfBCnZ06kpdu0QWgGJ_LNi4As3rjH0E9So93PJ3s1p9XUqKZVvcRT1e43eji5PoG4eZ9Ga6GIQDn-19xvkJL7f0ztJmbuZLN0DrBVYWteel1xtlUdx7tzhmJCAg7A1YsmjgYIRBzxoFapsCHC_Vulpyd64BErhVcxUYrw9IKSZ1zdbYo95jV4EIoG8F-zCz6y990cuMOWKcDGNAsl7lXhLqtU "JOIN THE FIGHT")
---
| I wouldn't be alive today if it weren't for the most solemn of mantras: leave no man behind.

Unfortunately, Joe Biden has done the exact opposite. He has abandoned Americans and our allies in Afghanistan, and in doing so, he has betrayed the men and women I served alongside.

**His behavior is completely unforgivable, and as a result, Joe Biden does not deserve to have the words “commander” or “chief” anywhere in his title.

If you agree, please help me hold Joe Biden accountable for his betrayal and stop his disastrous America Last agenda:**
---
| [DONATE $25](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_m=a776aab56008424db05cd3b81d41ee3e&_e=mpjQWEe9ROyC0ByZ7J_kN8LDZ1c6wiDkPpQHKIKWLBI0D3CYGzVUD2uVIMQtwDdLJ4alGfWHf1ktFEJN7NysX3v8TH6hmO8lNNmdJaYuWp0vjHxo5_EwZCnYC82_U8KHsUmFa215bezYvasyyw1L0_PMxRrMK8XXr25C2rfEhYCibEuskTA1M7UpV5raOBrEuo3tH8AYmPO3aa5Ty3WB6SY9meBxTGOaK95LCnhim-KKqBdZgH3SeM7FRkyoLMujTgabsMF7AK5prJ6mwnNGu3vjNYc_bXkEVD3DELU0cZVodgP9h_tSkYKh7WDQFxKYzu3tlRM0POwanXLMLTRCjA%3D%3D "DONATE $25")

| [DONATE $100](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_m=a776aab56008424db05cd3b81d41ee3e&_e=mpjQWEe9ROyC0ByZ7J_kN8LDZ1c6wiDkPpQHKIKWLBI0D3CYGzVUD2uVIMQtwDdLJ4alGfWHf1ktFEJN7NysX3v8TH6hmO8lNNmdJaYuWp2533AhSHZvdH-Mpj34GBd6t9HQrLyGZMKwZ8GDTsuyz3iLaifJFrqP4r5uKLnzsAJHyEdHX-0LoisNBHX8TsaRSUMRSv_o2MoUjp25h7koYDez8cSFZuDGVcQkfVM-A2crp6d0ngkJox9MXbhal2-CkwjxuHN5_sV6lOur7PggqtEMBNs7TOg6JLX_L05rZBnHUSTsl_7J7cP9QxOBwGWK8uWPqpPMLAHmfiBm_k6z0g%3D%3D "DONATE $100")

| I want to thank you all from the bottom of my heart for your support in letting me continue my service to our country in Congress. My prosthetic legs may hold me back from serving on the battlefield in Afghanistan, but I will always serve you and the America First movement in Congress with everything I’ve got!
---

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=885%2E3611125%2EnepVX0 ][IMG]

I have huge news, folks. This race is a dead heat:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/3246?t=1007&akid=885%2E3611125%2EnepVX0 ]Tim Ryan leads JD Vance 37% to 36%.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/3246?t=1008&akid=885%2E3611125%2EnepVX0 ]Keep the lead!

New polling shows that no matter the matchup, if the race for Ohio’s
Senate seat were held today, the outcome would be within single digits. In
fact, I'm leading Republican JD Vance by just one point.

Vance has a $10 million billionaire-funded super PAC behind him and my
other GOP opponents are multi-millionaires able to self-fund their
campaigns. This poll is truly a testament to the power of our grassroots
campaign!

This poll proves we have what it takes to flip this open Senate seat BLUE
and expand our Democratic Senate majority, but in a battleground race like
this one, national Republicans are working overtime to stop our momentum.
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/3246?t=1009&akid=885%2E3611125%2EnepVX0 ]Can I count on you to chip in today to make sure we keep the lead in

_**BLACK AND LATINO COMMUNITIES ARE CONSERVATIVE COMMUNITIES
THAT’S WHY WE’RE REACHING OUT TO THEM AND WE NEED YOUR HELP **_
* * *

**It’s true, Fellow American- The most Conservative people in this nation come from the Black and Latino communities, and they’re the ones we reach out to the least.** These communities have been tricked for decades by Democrats using fear and lies to win their votes. It’s time we change that narrative to better our nation.

Statistically, Black and Latino Americans are the most church-going, blue-collar, and family-oriented people in this nation who just want good jobs, school choice for their children, and a community full of Mom & Pop shops. _**That is exactly what Conservatives want, that’s why I need your help.**_

[** Help bring Black and Latino Americans back to the Republican Party! **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=101bc1dc63d74510861fa70524059ab4&_e=kKEv2K21B2hbSARvkVMOyu16rfeN0ddFSV3KstnqNAL86zNOeHPxZL71e9wZR6zlO0V_NaHU0Ciir97fNw8B5DShU-If7oUwNk24Pt82OXVLpr-CxVpPoLLnGuqi6SSRUu58HGDtPUO2a0umrgl-SxX06sw_LSeydUnIPoOUnlsM8V4REPeNNr__KHdcUAHCHpvkTHDEXUZBgeiNpT6u7xUjOzOuCVCspyzeOXfwJRoPbmb_WumqNvGNe69F8v0-SQIdzD_yfV8YejQ4DNL2vm51mzNdfEmjnxdR2GwHqg6kxEBFgyKHuw5jq2q0GeX9ilb18rfq7cUud93cq3N6EW4oog8cg-oBTsxDuXeLkOWgSwa4bnG11vYelZ4Ap-7YW2V1JfMQOkUro-5xJvpLVSbef9LsONhF_9VeJMcpdnNIPjGTh42mvNtIrujqz3FX8SdMxIU5_xUEDYs8vBxX8fycDJna-2_DfNOUik_AaRE%3D)
**Since 2016 more individuals from these demographics have voted for a Republican than ever before. If Conservatives don’t reach out to these communities, then that progress** _**will be lost.**_ That’s why the Young Politician Committee is launching _One Nation Summits_ in every major city, and why I’m reaching out to you today. I need your help to bring Conservative leadership back to cities that are drowning in violence and poverty because of failed Democrat policies.

These efforts will decide the fate of this nation and change the political playing field for generations to come. [**Will you take a stand and help us free these communities from the lies of the Democrats?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=101bc1dc63d74510861fa70524059ab4&_e=kKEv2K21B2hbSARvkVMOyu16rfeN0ddFSV3KstnqNAL86zNOeHPxZL71e9wZR6zlO0V_NaHU0Ciir97fNw8B5DShU-If7oUwNk24Pt82OXVLpr-CxVpPoLLnGuqi6SSRUu58HGDtPUO2a0umrgl-SxX06sw_LSeydUnIPoOUnlsM8V4REPeNNr__KHdcUAHCHpvkTHDEXUZBgeiNpT6u7xUjOzOuCVCspyzeOXfwJRoPbmb_WumqNvGNe69F8v0-SQIdzD_yfV8YejQ4DNL2vn8cg0QvrG8bWVGkZf8WoQfDU8Qncmmp4D4kpyUzbgrq5MjIDxCWqQpllVbGwindM4hMIeSVpfkOVg3s2uQeqWjpTxxghVECBd9OYBsfLWezjyJ47kfHkr2KB_rKRlXNDIN46ejf_obFojCKf3UYGGwNFQ8Lv-Xig0qGjsJvp71Cr_agcDPZFeppCwsWToNZ4uSKCQ_EQBUUBcsh_G5wpqw%3D)

Democrats have a huge head start on us, so if you’re dedicated to bringing Conservative values and free thought to all Americans while defeating Democrat Dictators in the inner cities, then please help us. [**It doesn’t matter if it’s just $5 or $10, any support you can give will help save these communities from another lifetime of being manipulated by these Democrats.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=101bc1dc63d74510861fa70524059ab4&_e=kKEv2K21B2hbSARvkVMOyu16rfeN0ddFSV3KstnqNAL86zNOeHPxZL71e9wZR6zlO0V_NaHU0Ciir97fNw8B5DShU-If7oUwNk24Pt82OXVLpr-CxVpPoLLnGuqi6SSRUu58HGDtPUO2a0umrgl-SxX06sw_LSeydUnIPoOUnlsM8V4REPeNNr__KHdcUAHCHpvkTHDEXUZBgeiNpT6u7xUjOzOuCVCspyzeOXfwJRoPbmb_WumqNvGNe69F8v0-SQIdzD_yfV8YejQ4DNL2vlCU2XDiuvlmrbtxSG2RxjYfMccruZTcTNqEY6bVa8U4ant7edURA55EFNcIxJdcrfqrMiGW0kr4ZEAi_82qwfCFQiZGIBw4o919FfHM2Kfho6YVwmgiQVTzRBhvzIL2y4I1CgNRUlnUkHXZtYMyfurbmSuq1ySSHjcU5iLqC0jkLiEuSetLiAr5f18V6wJbXLhDbGZVQeku582x0mHGOUQ%3D)

Thank you,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=101bc1dc63d74510861fa70524059ab4&_e=kKEv2K21B2hbSARvkVMOyu16rfeN0ddFSV3KstnqNAL86zNOeHPxZL71e9wZR6zlO0V_NaHU0Ciir97fNw8B5DShU-If7oUwNk24Pt82OXVLpr-CxVpPoLLnGuqi6SSRUu58HGDtPUO2a0umrgl-SxX06sw_LSeydUnIPoOUnlsM8V4REPeNNr__KHdcUAHCHpvkTHDEXUZBgeiNpT6u7xUjOzOuCVCspyzeOXfwJRoPbmb_WumqNvGNe69F8v0-SQIdzD_yfV8YejQ4DNL2vt9mxR0UKIWlDqTsXhgEqjJRWzOm07HDzP2JU9mlD-uPmG8KpOlwSq6DD7-eSmijgxVXBNVDcVyvTLwvg4SsxfBmup9466EOJsahZrCxIC6EsoLKTKxINMiDDM442Y5CpAkyceV8g5Y6i6rYlZmTMoUze5fdzLF9nRgb_lxVh6D-1jYfIreEYmJdTw1mJWIUHIwznlTcyWLyt_Vh4qc8PKA%3D)
**Jacob Wynn**
Chairman, Young Politician Committee
